one day a vendor went to the store to buy things the store had different types of things inside such as candy toys and books the vendor was very excited to find something special but when the vendor went to the checkout line they realized they didnt have enough money to pay for the things they wanted the vendor became very sad and decided to leave the store on the way back they passed by the park there they saw many people playing enjoying the sunshine the vendor suddenly had an idea they decided to pack up some of the things they had and sold them at the park everyone loved the different items and the vendor soon made enough money to buy all they wanted from the store the moral of the story is that you dont need money to make money just be creative and resourceful and you can find all sorts of different ways to make your dreams come true
once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy timmy was very tired because he had been playing outside all day when he came inside his mommy asked him what he wanted for a snack timmy thought for a moment and then said i choose jam on my toast please his mommy smiled and made him some toast with jam timmy ate it all up and felt much better then he went to take a nap because he was still tired from playing outside while he was sleeping timmy dreamed about all the different kinds of jam he could try when he woke up he asked his mommy if they could go to the store to buy some new jam flavors she said yes and they had a fun adventure trying different jams together timmy was happy he chose to have jam on his toast earlier because it led to a fun day with his mommy
once there was a boy named jack he loved to go to the mill he would push open the door and feel the warm air inside it was quiet and still he liked to look around watching the mill work then he would push the buttons on the big machine and wait for the mill to grind the grain one day he decided to take a nap on the warm floor he closed his eyes and felt the warmth of the sun shining on him suddenly he heard a sound he opened his eyes and saw a little mouse pushing through the grain bags jack was so surprised he couldnt help but laugh he got up and chased the mouse pushing it out of the mill the next day jack came back to the mill he felt excited to push the buttons and watch the grain get milled he made sure to stay away from the mouse just in case it came back

sara and ben were friends who liked to play in the garden they liked to dig and plant and water the flowers and vegetables one day they saw a big red radish in the ground they wanted to eat it so they pulled it out wow look at this radish sara said it is so big and juicy let me see ben said he grabbed the radish from sara and ran away it is mine mine mine sara was sad and angry she chased after ben but he was too fast he ran to the hill and climbed up he wanted to eat the radish all by himself but when he reached the top he saw a big ugly bird the bird had a long beak and sharp claws it saw the radish in bens hand and wanted to eat it too it flew down and snatched the radish from ben it soared into the sky with the radish in its mouth hey give me back my radish ben shouted he tried to catch the bird but he was too slow he fell down the hill and hurt himself he cried and cried sara heard bens cry and ran to him she saw him lying on the ground with scratches and bruises she saw the bird flying away with the radish she felt sorry for ben but she also felt he was wrong ben why did you take the radish from me sara asked we could have shared it and enjoyed it together but you were greedy and selfish now you have nothing and you are hurt that is not nice ben realized he had made a mistake he felt ashamed and sorry he said to sara you are right sara i was greedy and selfish i should have shared the radish with you i am sorry can you forgive me sara nodded and hugged ben she said i forgive you ben but next time remember to be kind and generous sharing is caring that is the moral of the story

lila and rani were sisters who liked to play in the forest they made spears from sticks and stones and pretended to hunt animals one day they saw a big rabbit hopping near a bush they wanted to catch it for their dinner lets test our spears lila whispered to rani you go left and i go right we will throw our spears at the same time rani nodded and they crept closer to the rabbit they counted to three and threw their spears but the rabbit was clever and saw them it jumped away and ran into the bush oh no we missed lila said the rabbit is too fast and smart maybe we can trick it rani said look there is a carrot on the ground we can use it as bait rani picked up the carrot and placed it near the bush she hid behind a tree and waited lila hid behind another tree and held her spear they hoped the rabbit would come out and eat the carrot soon they heard a rustle in the bush the rabbit poked its head out and sniffed the air it saw the carrot and licked its lips it hopped out of the bush and moved towards the carrot now rani shouted she and lila threw their spears again this time they hit the rabbit and it fell to the ground yay we got it lila cheered we are good hunters they ran to the rabbit and picked it up they were proud of their spears and their clever plan they took the rabbit home and cooked it for their dinner they shared it with their family and told them their story their family praised them and said they were brave and smart lila and rani smiled and hugged each other they loved to play in the forest

lila and ben were friends who liked to play in the park one day they saw a shiny crystal on the ground it was blue and sparkly and made them happy they both wanted to have it but there was only one crystal lila said i saw it first it is mine ben said no i saw it too it is mine they started to pull and tug on the crystal trying to take it from each other they did not share or say sorry they were angry and mean a big dog came by and saw the crystal he thought it was a toy and wanted to play with it he ran towards lila and ben and barked loudly he scared them and made them let go of the crystal he grabbed it with his teeth and ran away lila and ben were sad and cried they had lost the crystal and their friend they wished they had been nice and shared they learned that being greedy and selfish does not provide happiness they were not proud of themselves they hoped to find the dog and get the crystal back but they never did the end

they asked mom smiled and said yes we can go but first we have to buy tickets wait here for a minute okay ben and mia nodded and waited near a pole the pole was very high and had a rope on it ben wondered what the rope was for he wanted to touch it look mia a rope he said i want to pull it maybe something fun will happen mia shook her head no ben dont do that mom said to wait the rope might be for the circus you might break something but ben did not listen he reached for the rope and pulled it hard suddenly he heard a loud noise he looked up and saw a big ball falling from the sky the ball was red and shiny it was a firework it was going to strike the tent ben what did you do mia cried you made a firework go off it will burn the tent we have to run ben was scared he let go of the rope and ran with mia they found their mom and told her what happened mom was angry and sad ben you did a very bad thing you did not listen to me you did not listen to mia you played with something you did not know you put yourself and others in danger you ruined the circus for everyone how do you feel ben felt ashamed he looked at the tent and saw a hole in it he saw the people running and screaming he saw the firemen coming to put out the fire he saw the circus people crying and shouting i feel sorry mom i feel sorry mia i feel sorry circus people i did not mean to do it i was curious i wanted to have fun but i was wrong i was foolish i learned my lesson i will never do it again mom hugged ben and mia she said im glad you are safe im glad you are sorry but sorry is not enough you have to make up for what you did you have to apologize to the circus people you have to help them fix the tent you have to show them you care that is the right thing to do ben and mia nodded they walked to the circus people and said they were sorry they offered to help them fix the tent they offered to share their toys and snacks the circus people were still angry and sad but they also saw that ben and mia were sincere and kind they accepted their apology and their help they thanked them and gave them a hug ben and mia felt better they learned that curiosity is good but not when it hurts others they learned that listening is important especially to mom and mia they learned that saying sorry is good but doing sorry is better they learned that being kind and helpful is the best way to make friends they learned a lot from the circus

once upon a time there was a lonely fish named fin he lived in a big blue sea fin had a special skill he could turn into any color he wanted his friends the other fish loved to watch him change colors one day fin found a shiny scale on the sea floor he picked it up and decided to show it to his friends fin turned red then blue then green and all his friends were happy to see the colors change fin gave the shiny scale to his best friend a small crab they played with the scale all day long they took turns turning it over and watching it shine in the sun the lonely fish was not lonely anymore he had his friends and the shiny scale to keep him company and they all lived happily ever after

once there was a dull chamber inside it was so quiet and boring but then one day something exciting happened suddenly the door opened and in stepped a tall man he brought a big surprise with him he had a big box filled with presents the 3 year old was so happy she quickly opened one of the presents and it was a soft new toy she hugged it and thanked the man the man smiled and brought out more surprises each one was so fun and special every time the 3 year old opened one she thanked the man with a big smile the man brought out one last surprise and it was the best one yet it was a big bouncy ball the 3 year old was so excited that she couldn tmt stop thanking the man the man smiled and waved goodbye as he left the dull chamber the 3 year old was full of happiness and joy she played with her new toys all day thankful for the surprise she got in the dull chamber
lily was a bee who liked to fly very fast she did not listen to her mom or dad who told her to be careful and stay close to the hive she wanted to see everything in the garden and the sky one day she saw a big red flower that smelled very sweet she flew towards it but did not see the spider web that was in front of it she got stuck in the sticky web and could not move she was scared and cried for help help me help me she buzzed sam was a bee who was flying nearby he heard lilys cry and flew to see what was wrong he saw her trapped in the web and felt sorry for her dont worry lily i will help you he said he used his strong jaws to cut the web and free lily he helped her fly back to the hive thank you sam you are very kind lily said you are welcome lily but you should be more careful the garden and the sky are full of dangers you should listen to your mom and dad and stay close to the hive sam said lily nodded and said sorry she learned her lesson and never flew too far or too fast again she and sam became good friends and flew together in the garden and the sky but always close to the hive
once upon a time there was a boy named timmy timmy loved to watch tv he would watch it all day long one day timmys mom asked him what he wanted to be when he grew up timmy said he wanted to design tv shows his mom thought that was interesting so timmy started to learn more about designing tv shows he learned how to draw characters and write stories he even made his own tv show with his toys his mom thought it was very interesting and watched it with him years went by and timmy grew up to be a famous tv show designer he made many interesting shows that kids loved to watch and every time he saw a tv he smiled and remembered how it all started when he was just a little boy with a big dream
once upon a time there was a little boy called tim who lived on a farm one day he decided that he was going to play by the stable his mum gave him a warning she told him to take care and to stay away from the animals because the stable was very noisy tim nodded but as soon as his mum went inside he started running around and trying to play with the animals one of the horses who was called snow got scared and started making even more noise tims mum heard the noise and came running back outside tim i warned you to stay away from the stable you must always listen to what i tell you his mum said as she hugged him tightly animals can be very different from us we need to be careful so that nobody gets hurt tim promised to always listen to his mum from then on and to always be careful around animals he learned that its important to respect them because things can go wrong very quickly if we dont
once upon a time there was a huge bear he was walking around in the woods looking for a friend he wanted someone to play with he came across a little rabbit hopping around the bear asked the rabbit do you want to play with me the rabbit answered yes let tms play tag the bear and the rabbit started running and jumping around the woods the bear was so big and the rabbit was so small that the bear had trouble running around then the rabbit said to the bear can you fold your foot you will be able to run faster the bear tried and he could move faster and better the bear and the rabbit laughed and continued playing and running around until they were both too tired they said goodbye and went on their way

the little girl amy was walking in the park with her mom she was having so much fun she saw a nice green insect hopping around on the grass she smiled and laughed she ran to her mom and said look mom a nice bug she watched the insect jumping around and laughed again suddenly the bugs friends came to join it more bugs were hopping around amy was so happy she laughed even louder she ran around trying to catch the bugs she was careful not to hurt them they were having such fun amy and her mom stayed in the park until it was dark amy was very tired but she was still smiling she said goodbye to her insect friends and thanked them for playing with her she gave them a nice hug and waved goodbye amy and her mom walked home hand in hand they both laughed remembering the afternoon with the insects it had been a very nice day

once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved going to the port with her family to see the big boats one day they went to the port and saw a scary monster on one of the boats it scared lily so much that she cried and wanted to go home her family tried to calm her down but she was still scared they decided to leave the port and go home on the way home they got into a car accident everyone was okay except for lily she was hurt badly and had to go to the hospital lilys family was grateful that they were all alive but they were sad that lily was hurt they realized that they should have listened to lily when she was scared and left the port earlier from then on they always listened to lily when she was scared and made sure to keep her safe
once upon a time there was a big gorilla in the jungle he was very strong and had thick fur one day he went to the store to buy bananas but when he got there he saw that all the bananas were gone he was very sad and angry because he loved bananas the gorilla asked the store worker where the bananas were the worker said that they were all sold out the gorilla didnt like that answer he started to bang on the walls and throw things around the store worker was scared and called for help soon some other animals came to the store to help calm the gorilla down they brought him some other fruits to eat instead of bananas the gorilla was still upset but he was happy to have something to eat from that day on he learned to store some extra bananas at home so he would never run out again the end
jimmy and abby were playing outside the sun was shining and the birds were singing suddenly jimmy saw muddy puddles he was excited and wanted to jump in but abby disagreed she was careful and didnt want to get her shoes muddy jimmy kept asking her to jump in but abby still disagreed finally jimmy got an idea he had a bucket he could fill with the muddy water abby thought it was a good idea so they both ran to the nearest mud puddle and filled jimmys bucket with the mud as the bucket filled abby got more excited they splashed and laughed soon the bucket was full abby and jimmy built a mud castle in the back yard it was the best day ever
once there was a zebra he was so careful in all that he did everywhere he went he looked around carefully and paid attention to the details one day he went to a new place he wanted to be extra careful and make sure he didnt get lost as he looked around he saw something interesting a big pond he watched as the sun shone on the water he walked up to the pond getting closer and closer he was so curious when he was finally close enough he saw some fish swimming in the water thats when he saw the most beautiful thing of all a zebra it was a zebra just like him he wanted to get a closer look so he walked up to the edge of the pond but he was so careless and in his excitement he slipped and fell into the water he was so scared and almost started to cry but then the other zebra came over to him and helped him get out of the pond the two zebras stayed together for a long time enjoying the beautiful day
sara was very enthusiastic about going to the park with her mom and dad she loved to swing slide and play with the sand she put on her hat shoes and coat and ran to the car are we there yet she asked many times on the way soon sweetie soon her mom said but when they got to the park sara saw something that made her panic there were many bees flying around the flowers and the trees sara was scared of bees she thought they would sting her and hurt her mom dad look bees she cried i dont want to go to the park her mom and dad tried to calm her down they told her that the bees were not interested in her and that they were just looking for nectar and pollen they said that if she left them alone they would leave her alone too come on sara dont be afraid her dad said the park is fun lets go and swing together sara was not sure she still felt nervous she held her moms hand tightly ok dad but what if a bee stings me she asked then we will have some medicine for you her mom said we have a cream that will make the sting go away and we will give you a hug and a kiss but i dont think that will happen the bees are busy and happy they dont want to bother you sara looked at the bees again they did seem busy and happy they buzzed and flew from flower to flower they did not come near her maybe they are not so bad she said she let go of her moms hand and took her dads hand she walked with them to the swing she felt a little brave she got on the swing and her dad pushed her gently she felt the wind in her hair and the sun on her face she smiled and laughed she forgot about the bees she had fun at the park

once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to receive cards from her friends one day lilys friend sent her a card in the mail lily was so happy and excited to receive it she opened the envelope and read the card it said happy birthday lily lily was so happy but then she became frustrated she realized that her birthday was not for another three months she asked her mom why did my friend send me a birthday card now her mom explained that sometimes people send cards early because they might forget later lily was still frustrated but she decided to write a thank you card back to her friend she thanked her friend for the card and told her that she was excited for her birthday in three months unfortunately a few days later lilys friend got very sick and had to go to the hospital lily was sad and worried about her friend she wanted to visit her in the hospital but her mom said they couldnt go because of the germs a few weeks later lily received another card in the mail this time it was from her friends mom the card said that lilys friend had passed away lily was very sad and cried a lot she was frustrated that she couldnt visit her friend in the hospital and say goodbye from that day on lily kept the card from her friend close to her heart and she always remembered the happy times they had together

once upon a time there was a girl who loved to swim she wanted to go swim in the sea but it was too far away so she decided to swim in the lake near her home she was so excited when she reached the lake the girl was amazed by the sparkly still water she put on her special swimsuit and jumped into the lake she swam around for a long time feeling the powerful strength of the water the girl decided to try something new and she began to stir the water with her hands and feet she was amazed by what happened the water formed into beautiful patterns she continued stirring and it made her feel so excited and happy once she was done the girl felt very proud of herself she had discovered a new way to enjoy the water and she felt so powerful the girl smiled and silently thanked the lake for such a wonderful experience she then jumped back in and enjoyed her swim

tom was a rabbit who liked to eat celery he ate celery every day for breakfast lunch and dinner he liked the green and crunchy celery very much he did not like to share his celery with anyone one day tom saw a big and yellow carrot in the garden he thought the carrot looked very tasty he wanted to try the carrot he left his celery behind and ran to the carrot he did not see the trap that the farmer had set the trap snapped on toms leg and hurt him a lot he cried and cried but no one came to help him he was stuck in the trap he could not move he could not eat he could not go back to his celery he looked at his celery and felt very sad he wished he had not left his celery he wished he had shared his celery with his friends he missed his celery and his friends he learned that celery was better than carrot and sharing was better than being greedy but it was too late the farmer came and took tom away he put tom in a cage and sold him to a pet shop tom never saw his celery or his friends again he had a bad ending

once upon a time there was a little boy called luke he was only three years old and loved to explore he went outside one day and noticed an interesting mist around in the air he found it fascinating so he stared at it until it began to settle all around him he was so curious he decided he wanted to try to catch it he tried to step in it but it felt icy cold luke then thought of a better idea to use his hands he tried to scoop up the mist and he was so determined to do it after a few tries he managed it he had scooped up a little mist and was very proud he saw a friend of his and called out to her look what i did he shouted she looked impressed and said thats really interesting luke luke smiled proudly and stayed playing with the mist a little longer before going back home
once upon a time there was a baby bear named bob he loved to go outside and explore one day he went to an old tree he felt something soft on the trees bark he rubbed it and the bark began to move it was an original creature bob was so excited he wanted to find out what it was he followed it into a cave at the bottom of the tree inside the cave he saw a big creature that looked just like the one from the tree it was a friendly dragon the dragon offered to take bob on a magical journey bob said yes and the dragon flew away with him they went high up in the sky and beyond bob had so much fun flying around with the dragon at the end of the day the dragon brought bob back to the tree bob hugged the dragon and thanked it for the wonderful adventure the dragon smiled and said goodbye bob rubbed the original creature one more time he said goodbye and went home he never forgot the magical journey he shared with the dragon

wrong he sees the lumber paper stuck in the printer he says oh no what have you done you jammed the printer with the lumber paper now i have to fix it sara and ben are sorry they say we are sorry dad we wanted to print our pictures on the lumber paper we did not know it would jam the printer dad is not angry he says its okay i understand you were curious and creative but next time ask me before once upon a time there was a king who loved to dance he was very important but he was sad because no one else wanted to dance with him one night he went for a walk and heard some strange noises coming from the woods he got closer and saw a fairy with some small creatures she was singing and making them dance the king was so happy to see it he wanted to join in the fun the fairy stopped and looked at the king and asked if he wanted to make the dance too the king was thrilled and immediately started to dance with the small creatures everyone was celebrating and having a great time the king was so happy he even laughed the king learned that day that dance was very important and that it brought joy to everyone he thanked the fairy for teaching him this and then went home to share his newly learned knowledge with everyone else

once upon a time there was a big jungle with many animals one day a kind man came to the jungle and gave all the animals some food he provided them with bananas apples and carrots the animals were very happy and thanked the man in the jungle there was a parrot who loved to sing and talk he was very loud and could be heard from far away one day the man heard the parrot singing and he thought it was very beautiful he decided to take the parrot with him and bring him to his home the parrot was very happy to go with the man but he missed his friends in the jungle so the man decided to bring the parrot back to the jungle and let him live with his friends the parrot was grateful to the man for providing him with a home and for bringing him back to his friends from that day on the parrot sang even louder and all the animals in the jungle were happy to hear him

once upon a time there was a little girl named lily one day she went to the store with her mommy to buy some fruits when they arrived at the store lily saw a toy that she really wanted she asked her mommy if she could have it but her mommy said it was too expensive and they couldnt afford it lily was sad and started to cry a nice old lady who was standing nearby saw lily crying and whispered to her dont be afraid little one everything has a price but not everything is worth it lily stopped crying and looked at the old lady confused the old lady continued the toy may be expensive but it wont make you happy for long you have to learn to be happy with what you have lily listened to the old lady and stopped crying she realized that her mommy was right and that the toy wasnt worth the price from that day on lily learned to be happy with what she had and never asked for expensive toys again the moral of the story is that sometimes the things we want are not worth the price and we should learn to be happy with what we have

once upon a time there was a dry queen she was very wise and kind to everybody she met one day she heard a loud call coming from far away the queen found out that the call was coming from a little bird she wanted to help the little bird so she went to find it when she arrived at the birds nest she saw that the nest was dry it was too dry for the little bird to live in the queen called out to some of her animals and asked for their help one of the animals brought some water another brought some soft grass and the third brought some leaves the queen and the animals worked together to build a new nice wet nest for the bird the little bird thanked the queen and flew away everyone rejoiced and all the animals were happy that their kind queen helped the bird and they all lived happily ever after

once upon a time there was a little bug named tim tim was a slow bug he liked to crawl around in the garden one day tim found something shiny in the dirt it was a small piece of gold tim wanted to show his friends the gold so he crawled very slowly carrying the gold on his back along the way he met a big ant named ben ben saw the gold and wanted it too but tim was a good bug and did not want to share tim and ben had a race to see who could crawl the fastest if tim won he could keep the gold if ben won he would get the gold they both crawled as fast as they could tim was slow but he tried very hard in the end tim won the race he was so happy to keep the gold ben was sad but he learned that it was not nice to take things from others tim shared a little bit of the gold with ben and they became good friends they played together in the garden every day
once upon a time there lived a mighty hunter he lived in a small house in the middle of a great forest every day he would wander through the forest looking for animals to hunt one morning the hunter was on his way to hunt for his dinner but he stopped in his tracks he heard a high pitched noise coming from a nearby creek he looked around and found a small baby squirrel in peril its tiny legs were stuck in the mud and it couldnt escape the hunter thought for a moment and then decided to delay his hunt instead he gently moved the small animal from the mud and placed it on a nearby tree branch the squirrel happily chattered at the hunter before scurrying away the hunter smiled and continued on his way safe in the knowledge that his kindness had saved the small animal from then on he was known as the mighty hunter who always helped anything in need
once upon a time there was a hunter who lived in the woods he was a very shy hunter so he rarely spoke to anyone one day the hunter found a sack in the woods he was so curious about the sack that he decided to open it when he opened the sack out popped a little fairy the fairy was so scared that she flew away but she kept looking back over her shoulder the hunter being a very shy person did not know what to do he wanted to apologize to the fairy and ask where she had come from but the words just wouldnt come out the fairy flew away leaving the hunter feeling very embarrassed the next day the hunter went out in search of the fairy to apologize he searched all day until he finally found her the hunter was so relieved to see her he apologized right away the fairy thanked him for being so kind and said she had come from a magical world in the deepest part of the woods she said that if the hunter ever needed help he should just come and look for her the hunter and the fairy became friends and the hunter soon overcame his shyness from that day forth the hunter was always ready to help anyone in need

once upon a time there was a little frog named freddy freddy was an ordinary frog who lived in a swamp with his family and friends one day while playing with his friends freddy heard a loud scream he hopped over to see what was happening and saw that his friend lily was stuck in the mud in the middle of the swamp freddy knew he had to help his friend so he hopped into the mud and tried to pull her out but the mud was too thick and sticky freddy started to scream for help and soon all his friends came to help together they were able to pull lily out of the mud and back onto solid ground after that day freddy realized that even though he was an ordinary frog he could still do extraordinary things to help his friends and from then on whenever he heard someone scream he knew he had to go and help

once upon a time there was a grumpy bear he liked to roam the forest looking for food one day he stumbled upon a pot filled with delicious berries the bear reached out with his paw and grabbed a big handful of berries suddenly the ground beneath him began to shake the bear toppled over and the pot of berries went flying the bear was so grumpy that he had lost the pot of food he growled and grumbled his way back to his cave without any food the bear was very sad but he didnt want to give up with hope in his heart he ventured back into the forest to look for food after searching for a long time the bear finally came across a different pot this one filled with sweet smelling honey the bear was so happy he jumped with joy and filled his belly with the delicious honey what a relief it was for the bear to not lose this special pot of food from then on the bear was never grumpy again and lived happily ever after

and angry she wanted to play with some blocks too she asked tom to give her some blocks but tom said no he said they were all his blocks lily waited for tom to finish his tower she hoped he would let scared she did not know why tom was so angry she did not know the book was his grandfathers book she did not know the book was very old and special she did not mean to rip the pages she felt very guilty she started to cry their mother heard the noise and came to see what was wrong she saw tom and lily she saw the book and the pages she saw the tower and the blocks she understood what happened she was very sad and disappointed she told tom and lily to sit down and listen she told them that the book was a gift from their grandfather he gave it to them before he died he wanted them to learn about the world and to love each other he loved them very much she told them that the book was very precious and irreplaceable she told them that they should not have played with it without asking she told them that they should have been more careful and respectful she also told them that the blocks were theirs to share she told them that they should not have been selfish and greedy she told them that they should have played together and helped each other she told them that they should have been more kind and generous she told them that they had both made a big mistake she told them that they had both hurt each other and themselves she told them that they had both broken their grandfathers heart she told them that they should both feel sorry and ashamed she asked them what they should do to make things better tom and lily looked at each other they both felt very sorry and ashamed they both felt very guilty they both wanted to make things better they said they were sorry to each other they hugged each other they said they loved each other they said they were sorry to their mother they hugged her they said they loved her they said they were sorry to their grandfather they looked at his picture they said they loved him they asked their mother if they could fix the book she said they could try she said they could glue the pages back together she said they could make a new cover play with the blocks she said they could she said they could share the blocks and build something together she said they could make something that their grandfather would like she said they could make once upon a time in a small village there lived a fragile little bird named lily every day lily would wake up early to see the sunrise she loved to watch the sky change colors as the sun came up one morning lily met a wise old owl named oliver why are you up so early little bird asked oliver i like to study the sunrise said lily it is so pretty and makes me happy oliver smiled and said i like to study the night sky the stars and moon are beautiful too but now i will join you to watch the sunrise so lily and oliver sat together watching the sunrise and talking about the sky as the days went by lily and oliver became good friends they loved to study the sky together and they learned many new things lily even began to stay up late to see the stars and moon with oliver in the end lily and the wise owl oliver had many happy days watching the sunrise and the night sky they learned that no matter how fragile you may be you can still enjoy the beauty of the world around you

once upon a time there lived a young boy called jack he had a mild heart and was always very kind to others one day jack decided to take a walk in the park as he enjoyed feeling the gentle sunshine and fresh air on his way through the park he saw an old man who was crying and seemed to be in pain jack went over and asked the man what was wrong through his tears the old man told jack that he was suffering from a broken heart the old man went on to explain that a close friend of his had passed away recently and he was so sad that his heart felt like it was breaking jack tms mild heart ached for the old man and he wanted to help jack told the man i want to help make your heart feel better do you like to play the old man nodded and so jack spent the rest of the afternoon with the old man playing games laughing and having fun when they were done the old man smiled and his heart felt a little less heavy jack bid the old man farewell and they both went on their way from that day onwards whenever jack passed by the park the old man and jack exchanged smiles and their hearts were filled with warmth and mildness

once upon a time there lived a boy named max he was 3 years old and he loved to make things out of pieces of paper one day max was trying to cut a paper bird with his scissors but the scissors kept slipping he was getting very frustrated this is no fun he said feeling very miserable just then maxs mom walked in she smiled at him and said hey max why dont you take a break and come put your scissors away max sighed and nodded he put his scissors away in the drawer and carefully went to find his mom when he found her they hugged and she said i know its hard to do things sometimes but dont ever feel awful about it you can always try again later max knew she was right and he smiled he felt much better the end

once upon a time there was a happy duck who loved to whistle he was very proud of his beautiful whistling but he wanted it to be even better so one day he decided to go look for a special drink which would help to make his whistling even more perfect he searched and searched but he couldnt find anything but then he came across a pond and he saw something sparkling in the water he bent down and he scooped it up in his beak it was the perfect drink it was cold and sweet and it made him feel amazing he drank it in one big gulp and then he started to whistle but this time his whistling was even better than before it was perfect the duck was so happy that he danced around the pond flapping his wings he was so proud that he had found the special drink from then on the duck spent every day looking for more of the special drink so that he could make his whistling perfect he had lots of fun and he never stopped whistling

once upon a time there was a curious cow who was always looking for something new one day the cow decided to explore beyond its usual boundaries but what the cow didnt know was that the new path ahead would separate it from the other cows for a very long time the cow kept going more curious than ever before as it walked further away the other cows noticed and started to call out but the cow kept walking and eventually the sound of the other cows faded away everything seemed unfamiliar but the cow was determined to keep going unfortunately the cow didnt realize how far it had gone and before long it was completely lost the cow looked around but all the scenery seemed strange and unfamiliar then just as the cow started to worry it heard the sound of the other cows again the cow followed the sound and eventually it found its way back to where it had started the cow was relieved to be back with the other cows and it never ventured that far away again however it did remain curious about what was out there beyond its familiar boundaries

once upon a time there was a brave hero who always wanted to help others one day the hero was walking in the dry desert and saw an animal in trouble the hero ran to help the animal but it refused his help but the brave hero still wanted to help so he found the animal some food and gave it water so it didnt get too dry that made the animal happy and it accepted the heros help the next day the hero was walking in the dry desert again and he saw another animal who was stuck the hero helped it but it refused his help too the hero was so determined to help the animal so he made a shelter out of sticks and leaves so that the animal would be safe from the dry sun he also found the animal some food and water the brave hero was tired from helping others but he was happy to know he had made a difference even if others refused his help the hero was still a hero

sara and ben were playing in the snow they made a big snowman with a hat and a carrot nose they were very happy but then a big boy came he was mean and rude he said this is my snowman go away he pushed sara and ben and made them fall sara and ben were sad and scared they did not want to fight they said please dont be mean we can share the snowman it is big enough for all of us but the big boy did not listen he said no it is mine i will make it bigger and better he took some powder from his pocket and threw it on the snowman he said this is magic powder it will make the snowman grow and obey me but the powder was not magic it was pepper the snowman sneezed and sneezed the hat and the carrot nose flew away the snowman fell apart the big boy was covered in snow and pepper he cried and ran away sara and ben felt sorry for the big boy they said he was not fit to play with us he was selfish and rude he did not know how to share and be kind they decided to make a new snowman they used the hat and the carrot nose that they found they also found a scarf and some buttons they made the snowman smile they said this is our snowman he is happy and friendly he likes to share and be kind they played with the snowman until it was time to go home they said goodbye snowman we will come back tomorrow we hope you will not melt the moral of the story is sharing and kindness are better than selfishness and rudeness
lily was a cute bunny who lived in the forest she liked to hop and play with her friends but she was also very curious one day she saw a big shiny thing in a clearing it was a crown that belonged to the king of the animals wow what is this lily said she wanted to touch it and see how it felt but then she heard a loud roar it was the king a fierce lion who was coming back to get his crown who are you the king said he saw lily near his crown and was angry did you try to steal my crown lily was scared she shook her head and said no no i was just looking im sorry mr king please dont hurt me the king looked at lily and saw that she was telling the truth he also saw that she was cute and harmless he decided to be kind and said its okay little bunny i forgive you but you should be careful the forest is full of dangers you need to trust your friends and stay away from strangers lily nodded and said thank you mr king you are very wise and good can i be your friend the king smiled and said sure you can be my friend but you have to promise me one thing never touch my crown again it is very important and precious to me lily promised and said i promise mr king i will never touch your crown again i will respect you and your things the king and lily became friends and often talked and played in the forest lily learned a lot from the king and the king enjoyed her company they trusted each other and were happy

the garage it was shiny and round and made a click sound when she turned it she liked to pretend that the knob was a magic key that could open any door she would put it in her pocket and go around the house trying to open different rooms sometimes she would find something new and exciting like a big hat or a soft blanket sometimes she would find nothing at all but she did not mind she always had her knob with her one day her mom told her that they had to move to a new house sara was sad and scared she did not want to leave her old house and her friends she did not know what the new house would be like she packed her toy box in a big box but she kept her knob in her pocket she hoped that it would help her find new things in the new house when they arrived at the new house sara was curious it was bigger and brighter than her old house it had many rooms and windows and stairs she wanted to explore it with her knob but her mom said that she had to stay in her room for a while until they unpacked everything sara was bored and lonely she wished she had someone to play with she looked around her room it had a bed a closet a dresser and a lamp she did not see anything that looked fun she took out her knob and tried to open the closet it did not work she tried to open the dresser it did not work she tried to open the lamp it did not work she felt sad and angry she threw her knob on the floor she did not want it anymore she lay down on her bed and cried she missed her old house and her friends she did not like her new house and her room she did not like her knob she wished she had something else to play with after a while she heard a knock on the door she wiped her tears and got up she opened the door and saw a boy standing there he had brown hair and green eyes and a big smile he said his name was tom and he lived next door he said he wanted to be her friend and play with her he said he brought something for her he held out his hand and showed her a small knob it was shiny and round and made a click sound when he turned it he said he found it in the garage and he thought it was a magic key that could open any door he said he liked to pretend that it could open any door he said he wanted to share it with her and explore the new house together he asked her if she wanted to play with him and his knob sara looked at him and his knob she felt a warm feeling in her chest she smiled and nodded she said her name was sara and she liked to play with knobs too she said she had one just like his she picked up her knob from the floor and showed it to him he said it was cool and they could have two magic keys he said they could have more fun and find more things sara agreed and took his hand she put her knob in her pocket and followed him out of the room she felt happy and excited she did not feel sad and scared anymore she liked her new house and her new friend she liked her knob she valued it very much she knew it was not easy to find a knob like that she knew it was not easy to find a friend like that she knew she was lucky she knew she would have a lot of fun

once upon a time there was a little bird named pete pete loved to explore the forest around his home but he was always careful to lock the doors of his nest so he could stay safe one day pete decided to go explore a new part of the forest and he forgot to lock his nest while he was out a big and dangerous fox came by and saw the door unlocked he opened it and saw that pete wasnt home the fox quickly went inside and started to mess with all of petes things he moved things around ate all of petes food and soon the nest was a total disaster when pete came back and saw the mess he was sad and scared what happened here he asked the fox the fox just smiled and said i wanted to show you the dangerous result of not locking the door of your home then he ran away pete quickly ran to his parents who had seen the whole thing and told them what happened his parents hugged him and taught him a good lesson always lock the doors of your home otherwise you are in danger moral of the story always lock your doors because there can be dangerous results if you dont

once upon a time there was a little boy named frank frank was only three years old and wanted to explore the world one day he came upon a big swamp the swamp was strange and gray frank was scared to venture in but he was very curious he asked his mom mommy can i go into the swamp his mom looked at the swamp it was very creepy but she knew her son was brave she said yes but be careful frank was excited and jumped into the swamp he explored the swamp for a long time and paid close attention to all the details he enjoyed himself very much in the swamp the swamp was full of surprises and he found many exciting creatures and plants he played until he was too tired and called out to his mom his mom smiled and said lets go home now and so they returned home and frank was filled with stories to tell his friends he was so happy that he paid close attention and explored the gray swamp

once upon a time there was a girl called sally sally was three years old and was very excited one morning because she was going to have a bath she jumped into the bathtub and lay there in the warm soapy water she splashed about enjoying the feeling of the bubbles on her skin but then things changed sally got an anxious feeling in her tummy she started to feel scared as she lay there in her bath and she didnt know why she looked around the bathroom but nothing seemed to be wrong suddenly sallys mummy came and knelt down beside the bathtub she told sally not to worry and gave her a big warm hug she reminded sally that she was always there to give her love and keep her safe so sally put on a brave face and finished her bath afterwards she felt much better with her mummys help she had defeated her anxious feeling and she had had a fun bubbly time in the bathtub

lily was a little girl who liked to help her mom in the kitchen she had a pink apron with flowers on it that she wore when she cooked one morning she wanted to make pancakes for breakfast she woke up early and went to the kitchen she saw a big bowl a spoon some eggs some milk and some flour she climbed on a chair and put the apron on she cracked the eggs and poured the milk into the bowl she stirred with the spoon she added some flour and stirred some more she was very proud of her batter she turned on the stove and put a pan on it she poured some batter into the pan she waited for bubbles to appear she heard her mom coming down the stairs she smiled and said mom i made pancakes for you her mom saw lily on the chair with the apron and the pan she smelled the pancakes she was very happy and surprised she hugged lily and said thank you sweetie you are so kind and clever she took the pan from lily and flipped the pancake she put it on a plate and gave it to lily she made more pancakes for both of them they ate the pancakes with butter and honey they were very yummy and warm lily and her mom had a nice breakfast together they talked and laughed lily felt very happy she loved her mom and her apron she thought cooking was fun she wanted to make more pancakes next time

lily liked to examine things she liked to look at them very closely and touch them and smell them and sometimes taste them she examined everything in her room her toys her books her clothes her bed but her favorite thing to examine was the big cushion on the sofa it was soft and fluffy and had many colors and patterns one day lily decided to examine the cushion more than ever she pulled it off the sofa and dragged it to the floor she opened the zipper and peeked inside she saw something shiny and brilliant it was a necklace with many sparkly stones lily was very curious and excited she took out the necklace and put it around her neck she felt like a princess she ran to the mirror and admired herself she smiled and said look at me im so pretty she did not know that the necklace belonged to her mom who had hidden it inside the cushion for a special occasion she did not know that her mom was looking for the necklace and was very worried soon her mom came into the room and saw lily with the necklace she gasped and said lily what are you doing thats my necklace where did you find it lily turned around and saw her mom she felt scared and guilty she said im sorry mom i was examining the cushion and i found it its so brilliant can i keep it her mom sighed and shook her head she said no lily you cant keep it its very special and expensive i was going to wear it for your dads birthday you should not examine things that are not yours you should ask me first now give me the necklace and put the cushion back on the sofa lily nodded and did as she was told she gave her mom the necklace and hugged her she said im sorry mom i love you her mom smiled and hugged her back she said i love you too lily but next time please be more careful lily learned her lesson and never examined the cushion again

their mom and dad gave them the blocks as a gift and they were very expensive one day lily and tom were playing with the blocks in their room they were having fun but they did not clean up after themselves they left the blocks all over the floor and did not put them back in the box their mom came to their room and saw the mess she was not happy lily and tom you need to clean up your blocks she said they are expensive and you should take care of them if you leave them on the floor someone might step on them and break them or hurt themselves you should also measure how much space you have and not scatter the blocks everywhere that way you can play with them again tomorrow lily and tom did not listen to their mom they thought she was being mean and they wanted to keep playing they ignored her and went to the living room where they found more toys to play with they left the blocks on the floor in their room later their dad came home from work he was tired and he wanted to see his children he went to their room and did not see the blocks on the floor he stepped on one of them and it hurt his foot he also broke the block and it made a loud noise he was angry and sad he called lily and tom and showed them what happened he told them how much he loved them and how much he paid for the blocks he told them how they should listen to their mom and clean up their toys he told them how they should measure how much space they have and not scatter the toys everywhere he told them how they should be grateful for what they have and not waste it lily and tom felt sorry for their dad they realized they were wrong and they apologized they hugged their dad and said they loved him they went to their room and cleaned up the blocks they put them back in the box and measured how much space they had they did not scatter the toys anymore they learned their lesson and they were happy

once upon a time there was a green frog he was very happy jumping around in his pond one day he heard a loud splash when he looked up he saw a big red fish slapping its tail in the water the big fish was trying to catch some bugs the frog was scared he tried to jump away but the fish was too fast the fish slapped its tail right on the frogs skin the frog was so shocked he jumped straight out of the water into the grass the frog was relieved he looked back at the pond but the fish had gone he was safe but very tired he decided to have a nap in the green grass and thanked the lucky stars that he still had his own skin

anna and ben were twins who liked to swim in the sea they had a big boat with their dad and mom one day they saw a reef with many fish and corals anna wanted to dive and see the reef up close ben was scared and wanted to stay on the boat come on ben lets dive and see the reef its so pretty and colorful maybe we can find a starfish or a seahorse anna said no anna i dont want to dive the reef is too deep and dark maybe there are sharks or eels or crabs that can bite us i want to stay on the boat and play with my toys ben said anna and ben disagreed they both wanted to do different things they started to argue and shout their dad and mom heard them and came to see what was wrong anna and ben why are you fighting you should share and take turns the reef is a wonderful place to explore but you have to be careful and listen to us there are some fierce animals that can hurt you if you get too close or touch them we can dive together and show you the reef but you have to wear your goggles and vests and hold our hands or you can stay on the boat and watch the fish from the window but you have to be nice and respectful to each other what do you want to do their dad said anna and ben thought for a moment they both loved their dad and mom and wanted to make them happy they also loved each other and did not want to fight they decided to compromise and take turns anna agreed to stay on the boat with ben for a while and play with his toys ben agreed to dive with anna and their dad and mom for a while and see the reef they hugged and said sorry they had a fun and safe day at the sea they learned a lot about the reef and the fish they also learned to disagree without being mean

at saras teeth and make them clean and healthy sara tried to be brave and good she opened her mouth and let the dentist look the dentist used a small mirror and a metal tool she said sara had a cavity a cavity was a small hole in a tooth that made it hurt sara felt scared dont worry sara i can fix your cavity i will give you some medicine to make your tooth numb then i will fill the hole with a special material it will not hurt it will be over soon do you want to watch a cartoon on the tv the dentist said sara nodded she liked cartoons she watched a cartoon about a dog and a cat who were friends the dentist gave her some medicine in a small needle sara felt a pinch then she felt nothing the dentist filled her cavity sara did not feel anything she was brave and good the dentist was stickers she picked a sticker with a picture of a pie she smiled she remembered pie she hoped mom would let her have pie thank you dentist you are nice can i have pie now sara asked the dentist laughed she looked at mom mom nodded yes you can have pie but only a small piece and you have to brush your teeth well after pie is good but too much pie is bad for your teeth do you understand the dentist said sara nodded she understood she thanked the dentist again she hugged mom she was happy she did not miss pie she got in the car with mom and they drove home sara smelled the pie in the oven once upon a time there was a little fish named nemo who lived in the ocean nemo loved to swim and play with his fish friends one day nemo saw something shiny at the bottom of the ocean he swam down to take a closer look as he got closer he saw that it was a beautiful seashell nemo picked up the seashell and showed it to his friend sammy the crab look sammy i found a pretty seashell it must belong to someone special nemo said sammy looked at the seashell and said that seashell belongs to the queen of the ocean she is very powerful and lives in an icy palace deep in the ocean nemo was curious and wanted to meet the queen of the ocean he swam deeper and deeper until he saw the icy palace when he got there he saw the queen of the ocean holding the same seashell that seashell belongs to you your majesty nemo said the queen was impressed by nemos honesty and bravery she thanked him and gave him a special gift from that day on nemo knew that he belonged in the ocean with his fish friends and the queen of the ocean

once upon a time in a small harbor lived a unique fish named finny finny was not like other fish he had bright colors and always swam in circles all the other fish liked to watch finny swim one day a big fish named bubbles saw finny and said finny why do you always repeat swimming in circles finny replied i like it its fun and makes me special bubbles thought for a moment then said can i try too finny smiled and said of course bubbles bubbles tried to swim in circles like finny but he was not very good at it he got dizzy and bumped into a big rock bubbles got hurt and started to cry finny felt bad and tried to help bubbles but it was too late bubbles had to go away and live in another harbor all the other fish were sad and missed bubbles they learned that not everyone can be unique like finny and sometimes trying new things can have a bad ending

can we look in the hole sara asked tom maybe but be careful there might be something scary in there tom said they walked closer to the pine tree and peeked in the hole it was dark and empty they saw nothing but dirt and leaves can we go in sara asked again i dont know it looks too small for us tom said but sara was curious she crawled into the hole and said come on tom its not scary its fun tom followed her but he felt nervous he wished they had brought a flashlight he hoped they would not get lost they crawled deeper into the hole until they saw a faint light at the end they reached the light and saw another hole they looked out and saw a different part of the woods they saw a pond and a bridge and some ducks wow this is cool sara said we found a secret tunnel maybe we should go back tom said mom and dad might be looking for us but sara wanted to explore more she said lets go see the ducks maybe they have babies she crawled out of the hole and ran to the pond tom followed her but he felt more nervous he wondered if they could find their way back they reached the pond and saw the ducks they were cute and fluffy sara and tom smiled and tried to feed them some bread but then they heard a loud quack and saw a big duck with a red head it was angry and chased them away run tom run sara shouted they ran back to the hole but they saw something else they saw a big bear with a black fur it was hungry and smelled them it roared and followed them help sara help tom cried they ran faster and faster until they reached the hole they crawled in and hoped the bear would not fit they heard it scratch and growl and try to get in they were scared and cried they crawled back to the other hole where they had come from they hoped to see their house and their parents but they saw something else they saw a big fire with a red flame it was burning the woods and the pine tree it crackled and smoked and reached the hole they felt the heat and the pain they screamed and screamed until they woke up they were in their beds in their room in their house they were safe and sound it was all a dream they hugged each other and said im sorry sara im sorry tom they heard their mom and dad come in they asked them what was wrong they told them about their dream they said they were sorry for being naughty and going into the hole their mom and dad hugged them and said its okay sara its okay tom were glad youre okay we love you they said they loved them too they said they would never go into the hole again they said they would always listen to their mom and dad they went back to sleep and dreamed of happy things

once upon a time there was a big brown bear the bear was very hungry and wanted to eat some honey he went to the beehive but it was too high for him to reach so he lay down on the ground and tried to think of a way to get the honey suddenly he saw a rope nearby he picked it up and tried to tie it around the beehive but the rope was too short and it didnt fit around the beehive the bear was sad and hungry just then a little bird flew by and saw the bear the bird asked the bear what was wrong the bear told the bird that he was hungry and wanted some honey but he couldnt reach the beehive the bird had an idea she flew up to the beehive and pecked at it until it fell to the ground the bear was so happy and he thanked the bird for helping him they both ate some honey together and became good friends
once there was a little fish who lived in the sea he was having a very nice day and was swimming around looking for food when suddenly he saw a hook he was so scared he quickly hid behind a rock the fish was very uncomfortable he wanted to stay away from the hook but he was also very curious he wanted to know what it was so he decided to move a little closer to take a look he moved slowly and carefully towards the hook and he could see that it was there to catch fish he had to find a way to stay away and stay safe so the fish had an idea he saw that there were some weeds near the hook he swam over and hid underneath them now the fish felt much more comfortable he was hidden underneath the weeds and he could stay away from the hook he was safe and happy now

once upon a time there was a little bridge in a big forest the bridge was very icy because it was winter many animals lived in the forest and they liked to play near the bridge one day a small rabbit had a question he asked his friend the squirrel how can we cross the icy bridge without slipping the squirrel thought and thought then he had an idea lets hold hands and be very careful when we walk he said so the rabbit and the squirrel held hands and crossed the icy bridge together they were very careful and did not slip when they reached the other side they were so happy now they could play in the snow and enjoy the winter day from that day on all the animals in the forest helped each other cross the icy bridge
once there was a lonely foot he didnt have any friends and he was very sad every day he went to the park but no one wanted to play with him one day while he was in the park he heard a voice it said i need help can you solve my problem the foot couldnt believe it someone wanted his help the foot looked around but he couldnt see anyone so he called out where are you then he looked up and saw a bird high up in the tree the bird was stuck in some sticky sap and it couldnt get down the foot laughed and said i know how to solve that problem he quickly ran and found some stones which he put around the tree then the foot climbed up the stones and rescued the bird the foot and the bird became good friends and now they go to the park together every day the foot is no longer lonely and he is so proud that he solved the birds problem
once upon a time there was a lazy dog named spot spot loved to eat cherries from a big cherry tree one day spot saw a little cat named fluffy sitting under the tree fluffy said i cant reach the cherries can you help me spot liked fluffy and wanted to help but he was too lazy to move fluffy was sad but she trusted spot and waited for him to help spot thought and thought about helping fluffy but he was too lazy to move the sun went down and it was dark fluffy was still waiting for spot to help her in the end they both went to sleep without any cherries

once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy timmy loved to play outside in the rain he would jump in puddles and get very wet one day timmys bike broke and he didnt know how to fix it his dad said they needed to take it to the mechanic the mechanic was a man who fixed things like cars and bikes he looked at timmys bike and told him what was wrong he said they needed to include a new chain timmy didnt know what that meant but he trusted the mechanic the next day timmy went to pick up his bike it was fixed and looked brand new timmy was so happy and rode it all around the neighborhood he even rode it in the rain and got wet again but he didnt mind because his bike was working perfectly
anna and her mom went to the station to catch a train anna liked the station she saw many people and things she saw big trains and small trains she saw red trains and blue trains she saw a man with a hat and a whistle he was the train man mom can i talk to the train man anna asked okay but be quick our train is coming soon mom said anna ran to the train man she smiled at him he smiled back he was kind hello little girl do you like trains he asked yes i love trains they are fast and loud and fun anna said i love trains too i work with trains do you want to see my whistle he asked yes please anna said the train man showed anna his whistle it was shiny and silver he blew it softly it made a sound wow thats cool can i try anna asked sure but be careful dont blow it too hard it might scare the trains he said he gave anna his whistle anna put it in her mouth she blew it hard it made a loud sound blink blink blink the lights at the station changed the trains heard the whistle they thought it was a signal they started to move anna what are you doing stop that mom shouted she ran to anna she grabbed her hand she pulled her away from the train man sorry sorry sorry anna said but it was too late the trains were confused they bumped into each other they crashed they made a big mess there was smoke and fire and noise people screamed and ran the station was broken anna and her mom were scared they hid behind a wall they hugged each other they cried the train man was sad he lost his whistle he lost his job he lost his smile he cried too the end

once upon a time there lived a pretty kitty named jack every day jack went for walks in the garden looking for new and exciting things to discover one day jack heard a rustle in the bushes he quietly crept up to take a closer look and discovered a big tail poking out from the shrubbery jack followed the tail until he came across a tiny baby mouse what a surprise he said jumping back in shock the little mouse was frightened and started to run away but jack said wait i wont hurt you the mouse stopped and looked up at jack who smiled and said what a pretty tail you have would you like me to show you around the garden the mouse smiled so jack took its paw and led it around the garden showing it all the pretty flowers and yummy berries at the end of their adventure jack and the mouse said goodbye before leaving the mouse said thank you for discovering me and letting me explore the garden i had so much fun jack waved goodbye feeling very pleased with himself he had made a new friend and discovered a very special tail

once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy he loved to play in the park with his friends one day they found a stick that looked like a weapon it was easy for them to imagine they were knights fighting a dragon as they played timmy noticed a squirrel shaking on a tree he thought it was funny and tried to shake the tree too but he was too small and the tree was too big later that day they saw a big dog running towards them timmy remembered the stick they found earlier and picked it up he shook it at the dog pretending it was a weapon the dog got scared and ran away timmy and his friends were happy they were safe

once upon a time there was a little bunny named hop hop loved to play with his friends in the forest one day hops friend a little bird named tweet flew away and didnt come back hop was very sad and missed tweet a lot one day hops mother told him that even though tweet wasnt there they could still keep her memory deep in their hearts hop didnt understand what a memory was but his mother explained that it was like a special feeling that you keep when you think about someone you love hop felt a little better knowing that he could keep tweets memory with him always but he still felt sad and missed tweets hugs then hops mother told him that he could hug himself and feel the love that he and tweet shared hop hugged himself and felt a warm feeling inside from that day on hop learned that even though friends may leave their memories and love can stay with us forever

once there was an adorable squirrel named bo bo loved to have fun in the forest and make new friends one day he found a twig laying on the ground bo wanted to make his twig special so he spent all day polishing it he worked so hard that the twig sparkled in the sun soon all the other animals in the forest noticed bos twig they thought it was the most beautiful twig in the world bo was so happy and danced around with his twig everybody wanted a twig just like bos so bo happily shared his secret with his new friends he taught them how to polish the twigs until they sparkled like his now all the animals in the forest have their own twigs that shine like stars bo is so proud of his twig and all the other twigs too they sparkle in the sun and it makes bo smile every day
lily and max were best friends they liked to play in the park after school one day they saw a big slide lily wanted to go on the slide but max was scared come on max it will be fun lily said she skipped to the slide and climbed up the ladder no lily it is too high i will fall and hurt my brain max said he stayed on the ground and watched lily lily slid down the slide and laughed she felt happy and brave she skipped back to max and said see max it is not scary you can do it too max shook his head he felt sleepy and sad he did not want to try the slide he said no lily i want to go home i am tired and i need a nap lily frowned she did not want to go home she wanted to play more she said but max we just got here dont be a baby the slide is fun max and lily started to argue they raised their voices and said mean things to each other they forgot that they were best friends a lady who worked at the park heard them she came over and said hey kids what is going on why are you fighting lily and max stopped and looked at the lady they felt ashamed and sorry they said we are sorry lady we were fighting about the slide lily wanted me to go on it but i was scared i wanted to go home but lily wanted to play more the lady smiled and said i see well it is okay to have different feelings and opinions but it is not okay to be rude and hurtful to your friend you should respect each other and try to understand each other maybe you can find a way to compromise and have fun together lily and max nodded they realized that they were wrong they said you are right lady we are sorry friend we love you and we dont want to fight they hugged and made up they decided to play on the swings instead of the slide they took turns and pushed each other they laughed and had fun they were happy and best friends again
ben is a big boy who goes to school he likes to learn new things and play with his friends but he does not like the loud noise that the bell makes when it is time to go inside the bell scares him and makes him cry one day his teacher sees him crying and asks him what is wrong ben tells her that the bell is too loud and it hurts his ears the teacher is kind and patient she tells him that the bell is just a way to let them know when to do things and it is not meant to scare them she gives him a hug and a sticker she also has an idea she lets ben sit at a special desk near the door where he can see the clock she tells him that when the clock shows a certain time it means the bell will ring soon she shows him how to cover his ears with his hands if he wants to she says he can do this until he feels more comfortable with the bell ben likes the special desk and the clock he feels safer and happier he still covers his ears sometimes but he does not cry anymore he thanks his teacher for being so nice and patient he also makes new friends who sit near him and help him he learns to like the bell because it means he can do fun things at school

once upon a time there was a gloomy pepper it was an unhappy pepper because no one ever paid any attention to it each day it would sit sadly in the corner of the garden one day a little girl come to the garden she saw the pepper and smiled she went to the kitchen and came back with a bowl of water she began to pour the water over the pepper the pepper felt the water and was so happy it was as if it was waking up again suddenly the pepper sprouted colourful leaves everyone was so amazed the little girl kept pouring water on the pepper and made sure it stayed happy from that day on the pepper was much brighter and everyone in the garden sang along with it

once upon a time there were two best friends a kangaroo and a tortoise lets have a race said the kangaroo im sure i will win because im so fast the tortoise replied no way i never win races im too slow but the kangaroo was so eager to race that he convinced the tortoise to join in they started their race and the kangaroo was fast he zoomed ahead and was almost at the finish line suddenly the kangaroo saw the tortoise slowly but steadily making progress to the kangaroos surprise the tortoise made it to the finish line first the kangaroo was amazed and said to the tortoise how did you win youre so slow the tortoise replied in life its not always about being fast patience hard work and determination can take you further than speed alone that is the history of us slow moving tortoises moral of the story slow and steady wins the race

one day paul and his mom were in the park paul noticed a rabbit hopping around he was curious and wanted to know what it was doing mom what is he doing paul asked he is organizing the piles of leaves his mom explained he is being very persistent paul watched in amazement as the rabbit worked hard to organize the leaves he watched as the rabbit gathered the leaves in big piles and then hopped away with a smile paul thought the rabbit was very brave and determined he wanted to help and be as brave and persistent as the rabbit so he ran over and began to organize the leaves with the rabbit paul and the rabbit worked together until all the leaves were organized when they were done they sat and enjoyed the result of their hard work paul was happy that he could help and felt a little more brave and persistent like the rabbit
once upon a time there was a restless little girl who wanted to go on an adventure so her mummy said she could take a towel with her and go for a walk in the park the little girl was so excited she quickly ran off to get her towel when she arrived in the park she saw a strange old man sitting by a tree he was very still so the little girl approached him and asked what are you doing the old man smiled and answered i tmm just resting it tms so peaceful here the little girl wrapped her towel around her and sat down beside him together they enjoyed the peace and quiet of the park the little girl continued to be curious so she asked the old man many questions he seemed happy to answer them all he told her stories and they shared laughs at last the sun set and the little girl knew it was time to go home she said goodbye to the old man and headed off with her towel feeling content and ready for her next adventure

once upon a time there was a lazy polar bear who lived inside an igloo every day he liked to sleep and eat but one day he heard a noise he trembled with fear and didnt know what to do suddenly he heard a scratching sound he poked his head out of the igloo and saw a little arctic fox the fox was trying to get into the igloo the polar bear jumped up and chased the fox away he did not want it to eat his food the fox scurried away and the bear returned to his igloo he was so relieved that he sighed and had a big sleep the next day however the bear was too lazy to go out of the igloo he stayed inside and decided to just eat and sleep but that arctic fox was still lurking outside and the polar bear had to be careful he was glad to be safe and warm inside his cosy igloo

once upon a time there was a beautiful tiger he loved to explore the world and try new things one day he decided to go for a walk in the jungle as he walked he saw some yummy fruit lying on the ground he decided to eat it he enjoyed the sweet taste and asked for more he had so much fun eating the fruit soon he came to a beautiful stream he decided to take a break and drink some water after taking a few sips he noticed a big round rock the tiger was curious about the rock and decided to take a closer look suddenly he heard a loud noise it was a big and beautiful butterfly the tiger was so amazed it was a sight to behold the butterfly flew away into the sky and the tiger watched it go after his adventure the tiger was very tired he decided it was time to go back home so he walked back to his den when he got there he was so happy and laid down for a nice rest he had such a fun day
