once upon a time there was a boy called tim he was three years old and loved to play with his toys one day tim decided to take a walk outside as he strolled along he noticed something strange it was a big scary fish swimming in the river tim wanted to get a closer look so he snuck up to the bank of the river and peered down into the water to his surprise the fish was a bright yellow colour and it seemed to be waiting for something tim decided he had to find out what the fish wanted he smiled and asked the fish what is your request the fish replied i would like some tuna can you find me some tim was so excited he quickly rushed home and returned with a freshly caught tuna he slowly placed the tuna in the water in front of the fish the fish jumped up and gobbled up the tuna it thanked tim with a nod and then quickly swam away tim was amazed he quickly realized that he had just made a new friend and he learned that with a bit of courage nothing is too scary

once upon a time there was a graceful queen she loved watching the birds fly in the sky whenever the birds flew the queen would admire them and applaud one day the queen saw a bird with a hook in its beak the queen was very surprised and worried for the poor bird as she watched it flew down and started pulling at a vine the queen was very impressed with the birds determination and gracefulness she applauded it and said well done little one you have worked so hard the bird heard the queen and bowed back to her with respect the queen knew the bird was thankful for her praise and applauded it even more and from that day onward the queen always applauded the birds that had the most grace and determination
lily was a little mouse who liked to follow her big brother leo leo was very brave and smart and he knew many things he told lily stories about the king of the forest a big lion who was strong and kind lily wanted to see the king but leo said it was too far and too dangerous one day leo went out to look for food and lily decided to follow him she was very curious and wanted to have an adventure she did not tell leo because she knew he would say no she ran after him but she was not careful she did not watch where she was going and she did not listen for other animals soon she lost sight of leo and she found herself in a strange place she saw big trees and big rocks and big shadows she heard loud noises and she smelled strange smells she was scared and she wished she had stayed with leo she did not know how to go back suddenly she saw a big shape coming out of the bushes it was the king of the forest the big lion he looked at lily with his yellow eyes and he roared lily was very afraid and she froze she thought the king would eat her but the king did not eat her he came closer and he spoke to her he said little mouse what are you doing here this is not your place you are too small and too weak to be here you could get hurt or worse where is your family lily was surprised and she answered i followed my big brother leo but i lost him i wanted to see you the king of the forest but i did not know it was so scary i want to go back but i dont know how please dont hurt me mr king the king smiled and he said dont worry little mouse i wont hurt you i am the king and i protect all the animals in the forest even the smallest ones like you but you must be careful and you must listen to your brother he knows what is best for you he loves you and he wants you to be safe now come with me and i will help you find him the king lifted lily gently with his paw and he carried her on his back he walked through the forest and he asked the other animals if they had seen leo he found him near a stream looking for lily he was very worried and he was very happy to see her he thanked the king and he hugged lily he said lily im so glad youre okay but why did you follow me you know its dangerous you could have been hurt or worse you must never do that again you must stay with me or with mom and dad we love you and we want you to be safe lily nodded and she said im sorry leo i was silly and i was not careful i wanted to see the king but i did not know it was so scary i learned my lesson i will never do that again i will stay with you or with mom and dad i love you and i want to be safe the king smiled and he said you are a good mouse lily and you are a good brother leo you have learned a valuable lesson today be careful and listen to your family they know what is once upon a time there was a little girl named jo jo loved to jump around and play one day jo was playing the piano as she was playing the piano she started to feel funny she looked up and let out a big sneeze it felt so good when she sneezed jos mom was in the living room and heard her sneezing mom said jo i think its time for some fresh air to make your nose not so smelly jo smiled and agreed jo and her mom went for a walk outside jo felt so good after the fresh air that she started to jump around and play again the next morning jo woke up and wanted to play the piano again but when she tried to play the piano it was still too smelly jos mom told her that they would need to get some special cleaner to clean the piano jo was excited to help clean the piano finally the piano was nice and clean jo smiled and started playing the piano again she was so happy to be able to make music with the piano now jo and her mom could listen to her play the piano without having a smelly nose the end

once upon a time there was a little boy named tim tim loved to play outside in the sunny weather one day he saw a girl named sally sally was new in town and wanted to make friends hi im tim he said do you like the weather today its incredible yes its so nice and warm sally replied i love sunny days tim and sally played together all day they had so much fun but then tims mom came outside and mentioned it was time to go home tim didnt want to leave his new friend but he had to listen to his mom as tim walked away he felt sad he didnt know when he would see sally again the fun day had a bad ending but tim hoped they could play together again soon
peter was so excited he had been playing with his friends all day and now they were taking a walk near the woods when they arrived they saw a big stream with many stones on one side peter asked his friends if they wanted to go and explore his friends said no so peter went by himself as he stepped onto the stones he slid on one and landed in the stream at first he was scared but then he saw something cute swimming around in the water it was a small frog peter wanted to pick it up but the frog refused he tried again but the frog refused he decided to accept what the frog refused and let it stay in the stream so then he just played in the stream and watched the small frog hopping around the moral of the story is that sometimes it is important to accept other peoples wishes and respect their refusal
once there was a little girl called daisy daisy loved playing with her favourite cushion every day she would take it outside and hug it one day when daisy was playing with her cushion it started to rain the rain drops made the cushion wet daisy became very sad she ran to her mother and said mommy my cushion is wet her mother hugged daisy and said its ok sweetheart dont worry we can fix this daisys mum brought her a big bowl of warm water and put some sunshine in the bowl she said put your cushion in the bowl the sunshine and warm water will make the cushion dry again daisy watched as the sunshine and warm water melted away the wetness of her cushion soon her cushion was dry once again daisy was so grateful and hugged her cushion she smiled and said thank you mummy
once there was a girl named joy she was three years old and liked to explore there was one thing she liked to do more than anything and that was to reach for the stars the other day joy looked around her room and saw something she had never seen before it was a funny looking notebook with an open cover it was so colourful and fun she grabbed it quickly and opened it up suddenly a voice said what do you want it was coming from inside the notebook joy was so surprised i want to reach the star said joy the voice answered well joy this notebook can help you reach your dream turn the page and youll see how joy turned the page and there was a map with a star right in the middle joy was so excited she followed the map and sure enough soon she was standing right beneath a star joy had reached her dream

once upon a time there was a lonely arrow he had no friends or family and always felt so alone he had nothing to do all day until one day he had an idea he thought i should decorate myself so the arrow grabbed some bright colors and began to decorate himself he painted stripes and swirls polka dots and stars he even decorated himself with a big happy smile once he was finished he thought he looked pretty good he was still very lonely but he looked happy and proud as he flew through the sky everywhere he went he made people smile all the birds and animals enjoyed looking at him and soon enough he made lots of friends who were always happy to see him the lonely arrow was never lonely again he enjoyed the decorations he had created so much that he kept decorating himself every single day
once upon a time there was a brave boy named sam one day sam was walking in the park and he saw a delicious looking piece of gum on the ground sam thought it was the best day ever he picked up the gum and said yummy im so happy i found this gum suddenly a strange voice came from behind sam hey kid why dont you stay here and play with me it said sam was scared but he was brave and he said no thank you im going home now but the voice said oh please stay or else something bad will happen sam was so scared but he was brave and he said no im going home now suddenly the voice became really angry and it shouted fine then youre going to regret it if you dont stay here with me sam was so scared but he kept walking chewing his delicious gum the whole way when he got home his mom asked why he was so late sam answered that a strange voice had scared him but she just said thats too bad im glad you were brave sam never saw the voice again but he never forgot that scary experience in the park and he never stopped being brave

one day a little girl was looking out her bedroom window she saw a peaceful pink bird perched atop a tree branch the girl was amazed and never wanted the bird to disappear she opened her window and carefully crept outside so she could get a closer look the little girl tiptoed between the trees and weeds with her arms outstretched when she got close enough the peaceful pink bird flew away in a hurry disappointed the girl looked out into the sky but the bird had completely disappeared the little girl was sad and returned to her bedroom window but just then the peaceful pink bird flew back and perch itself on the same branch as before the girl was overjoyed and smiled as she watched the beautiful bird the bird and the girl admired each other until the sun set and it was bedtime
anna and ben are twins who like to play in the kitchen they have a big box of salt that they use to make shapes and patterns on the table they also have some spoons and cups that they balance on top of each other one day they decide to make a tower of salt and spoons anna is very enthusiastic and wants to make the tower as high as possible she pours salt on the table and stacks spoons on top of each other ben is more careful and tries to make the tower stable and neat he tells anna to slow down and not use too much salt anna stop you are making a mess ben says no im not im making a great tower anna says yes you are look the salt is spilling everywhere and the spoons are falling down ben says no they are not you are just jealous of my tower anna says they start to argue and push each other the tower wobbles and crashes to the floor salt and spoons scatter all over the kitchen anna and ben are shocked and sad they look at each other and feel sorry im sorry ben i was too enthusiastic and i didnt listen to you anna says im sorry anna i was too bossy and i didnt let you have fun ben says they hug and say they are sorry they decide to work together and clean up the mess they also decide to make a new tower of salt and spoons but this time they balance it better and use less salt they are happy and proud of their tower they show it to their mom and dad who praise them for their teamwork and creativity
once upon a time in a large field there was a large plane the large plane had big wings and a long nose it could fly high in the sky and make a loud noise the large plane loved to fly and see the world from above one day the large plane saw a little girl sitting on the ground the little girl was weeping she was very sad the large plane wanted to help the little girl so it flew down to the ground and stopped near her the little girl looked up at the large plane and stopped weeping she was surprised and happy to see the plane the plane asked the girl if she wanted to go for a ride in the sky the little girl said yes and they flew high in the sky together the little girl was happy and the large plane was happy too they became good friends and had many fun adventures together

one day a dog named max went out to play in the yard it was icy and cold but max did not care he liked to run and jump in the snow max found a big stick on the ground he picked it up and started to chew on it max was very happy max saw a big icy hill in the yard he wanted to go up the hill max ran and ran but the icy hill was very slippery he tried to go up the hill many times but he could not do it max was sad max tried one more time to go up the icy hill he ran as fast as he could but he slipped and fell down max was hurt and cold he could not play in the yard anymore max went back inside his house and cried the day was not fun for max
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to paint with her fingers and make pretty pictures one day her mommy asked her to help paint the room lily was so excited she had never painted a whole room before they went to the store and picked out a rare color called lavender lily thought it looked like a pretty flower they brought the paint home and started to paint the walls lily had so much fun dipping her brush in the paint and making big strokes after a few hours the room was all painted and looked so beautiful lily was proud of herself for helping her mommy they both sat down on the floor and admired their work lily thought the room looked like a magical fairy tale land from that day on lily loved to paint even more and couldnt wait to paint another room
once upon a time there was an elderly prince who lived in a big castle he was very kind and loved to whistle while he worked in his garden one day a little girl came to the castle and asked the prince if she could help him with his garden the prince was happy to have some company and said yes as they worked in the garden the little girl noticed the princes whistle and asked him if he could teach her how to whistle too the prince smiled and showed her how to pucker her lips and blow air through them to make a sound after a few tries the little girl was able to whistle just like the prince they continued to work in the garden and talk about their favorite things the little girl told the prince about her love for flowers and the prince told her about his adventures when he was younger they had so much fun together that the little girl didnt want to leave before she left the prince gave her a flower from his garden and told her that she was welcome to come back and visit anytime she wanted the little girl thanked the prince and skipped away whistling all the way home

once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy timmy loved to play outside but one day he saw a missile in the sky it made him feel scared and he ran inside to tell his mom his mom explained to him that sometimes things can be scary but its important to stay calm and ask for help later that day it started to rain timmy loved the rain because he could splash in puddles and play with his umbrella but the rain was also wild and it made him think about the missile again he remembered what his mom said and stayed calm the moral of the story is that its okay to feel scared sometimes but we should always ask for help and stay calm and even when things seem wild we can still enjoy the simple things like playing in the rain

once upon a time there was a little girl called alice one day she decided to go on a big adventure she crawled around to lots of different places after a while she found herself in a desert with lots of cactuses all around her everything was very hot and very dry but alice was brave and so she kept going as she crawled around she noticed a distant mountain it looked very tall and very high alice decided that she wanted to go to the mountain so she kept crawling and crawling and crawling until she reached the mountain but it was too high to climb then alice looked up and saw a big bird flying in the sky she shouted to the bird what can i do to get to the top of the mountain the bird replied fly alice thought about it for a moment then smiled and said i cant fly but i can crawl so she began to crawl up the side of the mountain slowly but surely eventually she reached the top and saw the most beautiful view from the top alice was so happy she had completed her big adventure she smiled and waved to her bird friend and then started to crawl back home

tom was a young boy who liked to help his dad with the wood his dad had a big axe that he used to chop the wood tom wanted to use the axe too but his dad said it was too sharp and heavy for him one day tom saw the axe lying on the ground near the woodpile he thought his dad was not looking so he ran to the axe and tried to lift it but the axe was too heavy for him and he dropped it on a rock the axe made a loud clang and the blade broke tom was scared and sad he broke his dads axe he did not know what to do he hid the axe behind some bushes and ran to his room his dad heard the clang and went to see what happened he saw the broken axe and the rock he knew tom had tried to use the axe he was angry and worried he went to toms room and knocked on the door tom come out i need to talk to you his dad said tom opened the door and looked at his dad he saw his dads angry face and felt sorry dad im sorry i broke your axe i wanted to help you with the wood i did not mean to break it tom said his dad sighed and hugged him tom im glad you are sorry but you should not touch my axe it is dangerous and not for you you could have hurt yourself or someone else you need to be careful and listen to me his dad said i know dad im sorry i wont touch your axe again can you fix it tom asked his dad smiled and nodded yes i can fix it i can repair it with some glue and a new handle but you have to help me you have to find the broken piece and bring it to me and you have to promise me you will never touch my axe again his dad said i promise dad i will help you i will find the broken piece and bring it to you and i will never touch your axe again tom said tom and his dad went to the woodpile and found the broken piece they took it to the shed and repaired the axe they worked together and had fun tom learned how to repair things and his dad forgave him they hugged and said they loved each other they were happy
once upon a time there was a purple dog named max max was very obedient and always listened to his owner lily one day lily needed to send a letter to her friend she asked max if he could go to the post office and send the letter for her max wagged his tail and barked happily saying yes i can do it max ran to the post office with the letter in his mouth when he got there he saw a little girl crying max went up to her and asked her what was wrong the little girl said she lost her toy and couldnt find it max felt sad for her and wanted to help he asked the little girl to describe her toy and he went to look for it after a few minutes max found the toy and brought it back to the little girl she was so happy and thanked max max then remembered he had to send the letter for lily he ran back to lilys house and gave her the good news about the little girl and the toy lily was so happy and proud of max for being such a good and helpful dog
once upon a time there was a green frog named fred he was hopping around looking for something to do then one day he saw something shiny and bright it was a very pretty butterfly the butterfly was glowing with every color of the rainbow but fred thought she was the most beautiful when her wings were a bright shade of green he wanted to follow her so he hopped after her the butterfly flew down to a pond and started drinking from it fred saw that the water was very sour so he decided not to drink from it instead he stayed on the lily pad and watched the butterfly she was leading the way and fred wanted to know where she was going suddenly the butterfly flew high up in the sky and disappeared fred was sad to see her go but he knew he had to keep looking for new things he hopped off the lily pad looked around and smiled he knew that soon something fun would come his way
once upon a time there was a little bunny named bun bun liked to dig in the dirt and find things to eat one day bun found a big root it was so big that bun had to mix the dirt around it to get it out bun was so happy with the root that he decided to share it with his friends his friends thought it was adorable how big the root was they all had a great time munching on it together from that day on bun and his friends would always mix the dirt around to find more roots to eat they thought it was the most fun thing to do and they always found the most adorable roots to share together
once there was a young girl called louisa she had bright eyes and big ears every morning she ran to the lake to bathe one day she was being careless and jumped into the lake without looking suddenly her foot got caught and she couldnt move she was scared and started to cry a frog nearby heard her crying and said dont worry young one i can help you the frog took out a key and set her free louisa thanked the frog she promised to be more careful and said goodbye she went home changed into her night clothes and ran to the lake to bathe again this time she was extra careful and enjoyed the peaceful feeling of being in the water of the lake she smiled
one day a little girl named amy went to her friends house her friend tim had a big piano in his room amy wanted to play the piano but tim said no it is fragile you might break it amy was sad and went to sit in a corner she looked at the piano and thought i can play it just a little and it wont break so she got up and played a small song on the piano but oh no one of the piano keys broke tim was very upset and told amy i told you not to play the piano amy felt sorry and said im sorry tim i didnt mean to break it tim and amy went to tims mom and told her about the broken piano key tims mom was not angry she said its okay we can fix it tim and amy helped tims mom fix the piano key they were very careful because the piano was fragile after they fixed it they played a song together on the piano tim and amy were happy and they learned to listen and be careful with fragile things

once upon a time there was a wild sugar it was so sweet that even the birds wanted to eat it but the sugar would not budge all it did all day was sleep one day a little boy came along he had three years and was very brave he wanted to wake up the sugar so he shook it and shouted but nothing happened the sugar was still sleeping so the boy took some water and sprinkled it on the sugar suddenly the wild sugar woke up it was so happy and jumped around then it ran away and disappeared the little boy was so excited but all he could do was watch as the wild sugar scampered away the next day the little boy went back to the spot he had seen the wild sugar and found a sweet treat waiting for him the wild sugar had left a surprise for him a little sugary treat

once upon a time there was a ranch with a loud bell every day the bell chimed loud long and clear the owner of the ranch joe would always finish his chores with the ringing of the bell one day when joe was finishing his work he noticed something strange he heard other sounds coming from the bell like a voice and laughter joe couldnt believe his ears and went to investigate when he reached the bell tower he saw three small children one of them held a hammer and the other two giggled and shouted joe was surprised to find out that the children were trying to finish the bell and make it even louder while joe was scolding the children he noticed one of them had a toy shovel in her hand then he realized they were trying to help him dig a new pond joe thanked the children and gave them a special reward from then on joe always finished his work with a wave of his hand and the sound of laughter

once upon a time there was a happy yellow bird who loved to dance every night when the sun went down it would go to a pit in the ground and dance the night away one day a little boy saw the yellow bird dancing in the pit hello there the boy said what are you doing the bird stopped twirling and looked up at him i am dancing it said would you like to dance with me the boy smiled and jumped down into the pit he spun around and around just like the yellow bird they danced and laughed until the stars came out when it was time to go the boy waved goodbye to his new friend goodbye he said i hope i see you again soon the little yellow bird nodded and flew away into the night sky it was a magical evening and the boy was so happy he had danced with the yellow bird
sam and lily were at the zoo with their mom they saw many animals like lions monkeys and elephants but their favorite was the ostrich the ostrich had a long neck big eyes and thick feathers it ran very fast and made funny noises can we feed the ostrich mom sam asked sure honey lets go to the fence and get some seeds from the bucket mom said sam and lily took some seeds and held them in their hands they walked to the fence and looked for the ostrich they saw it in the corner with its head in the sand hey ostrich come here lily called we have some yummy seeds for you the ostrich heard lily and lifted its head it saw the seeds and ran to the fence it pecked at sam and lilys hands and ate the seeds sam and lily giggled and stroked its feathers youre so soft and warm ostrich sam said youre so funny and fast ostrich lily said the ostrich liked sam and lily it followed them along the fence and made happy noises it wanted to play with them look mom the ostrich likes us sam said it does indeed you two are very kind and gentle mom said can we take the ostrich home mom lily asked mom smiled and shook her head no sweetie we cant the ostrich belongs to the zoo it has a home here with its friends and keepers but we can come back and visit it anytime okay mom bye ostrich well see you soon sam and lily said they waved to the ostrich and left the ostrich waved back with its wing and watched them go it was happy to have met sam and lily they were its new friends

once upon a time a little bird was flying through the sky his wings were so big and strong he could go wherever his heart desired he was so excited for his adventures one day as he was flying by he spotted something that made him slow down it was a group of animals surrounding one small shy hedgehog the hedgehog was saying funny things and everyone was laughing and clapping the bird was so amazed by the hedgehogs courage he flew down and applauded too the hedgehog was so surprised and happy that the bird was clapping too he began to fly circles around the animals who laughed and clapped even more then the birds whooshed up into the air and flew to his nest in the tree from then on the little bird and the hedgehog were bestest friends they would fly together around their favorite meadow playing and singing songs whenever one of them was feeling scared the other would give them a nudge and remind them that they werent alone whenever the little bird flew back to his nest he always ended his day with a kind gentle applause for his new friend

lily would bring some peanuts to max and they would play together one day lily found a big bag of peanuts in the kitchen she was very happy she thought she could take some to max and have a lot of fun she did not ask her mom or dad if she could have the peanuts she just took the bag and ran outside she found max on a branch and waved to him max max look what i have she shouted peanuts lots of peanuts come and get some max was very excited he jumped down from the branch and ran to lily he grabbed a handful of peanuts and stuffed them in his mouth he made happy noises and thanked lily lily smiled and opened the bag wider she wanted to give max more peanuts but then she heard a loud voice behind her lily what are you doing it was her dad he looked angry and worried those are not peanuts they are nuts for the birds they have salt and spices on them they are not good for you or max you could get sick why did you take them without asking lily felt scared and sad she did not know the nuts were for the birds she did not know they had salt and spices she did not want to get sick or make max sick she dropped the bag and started to cry im sorry dad im sorry i just wanted to give max some peanuts i like peanuts i like max i did not mean to do something bad her dad sighed and hugged her he was not angry anymore but he was still worried he looked at max who was coughing and spitting out the nuts he did not look happy max im sorry too i did not know lily took the nuts they are not good for you you need to drink some water and eat some grass maybe you will feel better max nodded and ran to a nearby fountain he drank some water and ate some grass he felt a little better but he still had a bad taste in his mouth he looked at lily and her dad he was not mad at them but he was sad lily and her dad walked to the fountain they wanted to say sorry to max again they also wanted to give him some real peanuts the ones that were perfect for him they hoped he would forgive them and still be their friend they regretted taking the nuts for the birds they learned to ask before they take something they learned to be careful with what they eat and share they learned to love peanuts and max more

luke was a little boy who really liked to jump he ran up to the playground every day to play with all the other kids one day when luke was playing in the playground he noticed a big scary spike in the middle of the ground he felt scared so he started to run away from it the other kids noticed him running away so they all ran towards the spike they wanted to jump over it but then one of the children said he wanted to jump first he was being selfish and didnt want to share luke took a deep breath and decided that he wanted to jump over the spike too he was feeling brave he started running and jumped as high as he could he made it over the spike the other kids cheered and clapped luke felt proud of himself now he didnt feel scared of the spike anymore he was jumping higher and higher every day
once there was a little boy named john john loved going for walks with his family on one of his walks he saw a bird he thought it was so pretty and he wanted to spoil it he asked his mum if he could spoil the bird with some food his mum said no so instead they sat down and watched the bird the bird sang a lovely song and john really enjoyed listening time passed and eventually the bird flew away john was a bit sad because he could not spoil the bird then his mum said they could do something else that was fun she took john to the park but the park was boring so they decided to go to the beach instead john was so excited when he saw the beach he got to play in the sand and make a sandcastle he threw breadcrumbs into the sea and watched the birds eat them he finally got to spoil some birds john loved the beach and he couldnt believe how much fun it was he couldnt wait to go back soon

once upon a time there was a little dog named spot spot loved bones they were his favorite thing to eat one day spots owner came home with a big juicy bone spot was so excited he couldnt wait to eat it but there was a problem the bone was too big for spot to eat all at once his owner told him he had to prepare the bone first spot didnt know what that meant but he watched as his owner took the bone and put it in the fridge the next day spots owner took the bone out of the fridge and gave it to spot the bone was cold but spot didnt mind he started to chew on it and it was so tasty but then he noticed something strange the bone was getting smaller and smaller spot started to worry that he wouldnt have any bone left to eat but then his owner came back with another bone spot was so happy he knew he had to prepare this one too he watched as his owner put the bone in the fridge and he knew that soon he would have another tasty treat to enjoy

there was once a little girl named susie who loved to play outside one day she decided to explore the garden in her backyard she walked around and saw many things including some radishes susie knew radishes were vegetables but she had never seen one before she was very curious and decided to try one happily susie managed to pick a radish and bring it to her mom her mom said that radishes are actually quite tasty and encouraged susie to try one susie agreed she bit into the radish and was surprised by how sweet it was she finished the radish and was feeling lucky unfortunately her luck didnt last later that night susie suddenly felt very itchy she told her mom who then realized what had happened susie was allergic to radishes fortunately they were able to manage susies allergies and she recovered quickly from then on susie was extra careful when exploring outside she never ate anything without checking with her mom first though she was never able to eat radishes again susie became wiser and was very lucky to have managed the situation without major complications

hiding there she ran to the tree and peeked inside the hole it was very dark and she could not see anything she heard a small voice say boo lily jumped back and screamed she saw ben come out of the hole laughing he had a flashlight in his hand ben you scared me lily said why did you hide in the dark hole ben smiled and said i wanted to find a good hiding spot the dark hole was perfect no one can see me there lily frowned and said but it is not fun to hide in the dark it is scary and cold and you cant see anything ben shrugged and said i dont mind the dark i have my flashlight and i can see you when you come close lily shook her head and said i dont like the dark it makes me feel alone and sad and i cant see your face ben looked at lily and saw that she was upset he felt sorry for scaring her he said im sorry lily i didnt mean to make you feel bad do you want me to explain why i like the dark lily nodded and said yes please explain to me why you like the dark ben took lilys hand and said come ill show you he led her to the hole and turned on his flashlight he said look the dark is not so bad it is like a secret place where you can imagine anything you can pretend you are in a cave or a spaceship or a castle you can make up stories and have fun lily looked at the hole and saw that it was not so scary with the flashlight she saw some rocks some leaves and some bugs she said i see the dark is like a game you can use your flashlight to make shapes and shadows ben nodded and said yes exactly the dark is like a game and you can play with me we can be friends in the dark lily smiled and said ok ben ill try to play with you in the dark but can we also play in the light sometimes ben smiled and said of course lily we can play in the light too we can play hide and seek anywhere as long as we are together lily hugged ben and said thank you ben you are a good friend you explained to me why you like the dark and you made me feel better ben hugged lily and said youre welcome lily you are a good friend too you listened to me and you gave me a chance and you made me happy they both laughed and said lets play again they ran out of the hole and looked for a new hiding spot they played until it was time to go home they had fun in the dark and in the light they were happy

one day a tall tree and a small bush grew in a park they liked to talk and dance to the rhythm of the wind the tall tree would sway back and forth while the small bush would wiggle and jiggle one day a big storm came the wind blew very hard the tall tree said hold on small bush dont let the wind blow you away the small bush tried to hold on but the wind was too strong it split the small bush in half after the storm the tall tree looked at the small bush and said im sorry you got split but dont worry we can still dance together the small bush now in two parts wiggled and jiggled even more they danced to the rhythm of the wind happy to be together again

once upon a time there was a little girl named lucy she was just three years old and she loved to play outside with her friends one day lucys mum said to her lucy its time to go inside and put your dress on but lucy wanted to keep playing she heard her mum but she was too busy playing to listen so she ran off and kept playing soon it started raining and lucy ran back to the house her mum saw her and said see i told you to put your dress on now you are all wet and its very silly lucy didnt mean to be foolish she just wanted to keep playing but she knew that she had to listen to her mum at all times so lucy put on her dress and had a warm cup of milk before bedtime from then on she remembered to always listen to her mum no matter how much she wanted to keep playing
once upon a time there lived an enormous dragon he lived in a deep cave in the middle of a forest one day he decided to explore the forest he flew up high and balanced himself in the sky above the trees he saw a beautiful meadow where a little girl was playing with her dolls he was very curious so he flew down and landed by her side the little girl was amazed by the enormous dragon and asked him what his name was the dragon replied my name is john what tms your name the little girl seemed excited and shared with him her name my name is lily john the dragon and lily played together all day she taught him how to balance the dolls on their heads and fly around the meadow it was the most fun john ever had he thanked lily for such a wonderful day and flew back to his cave in the forest from then on every day john balanced himself in the sky above the forest and looked out for lily
once upon a time there was a sweet little bear one day he got an invitation in the mail and was so excited he couldnt believe his luck he was going to the best party and invited all his friends when the day of the party came the little bear was so happy he put on his cutest outfit and raced to the party at the party there were lots of delicious treats the little bear ate so much that he couldnt eat any more the next morning the little bear found that some of the treats had rotted overnight he was so sad and disappointed but he still had a fun time at the party
once upon a time there was a little girl she had an exciting day ahead and wanted to get going quickly she rushed up to her garden and saw a bush with lots of yummy berries on it she was so happy she wanted to try one of the berries right away but just as she was about to eat it she heard a noise when she looked up she saw that it was her mom she felt embarrassed but it was too late to do anything about it her mom was kind and explained that she should never eat something without asking her first the little girl promised to do what her mom said she tried to hide her red face as she and her mom laughed about it together then she ran off to have some more fun in the garden but this time she promised to only pick the berries when mom was there to say it was ok
ben and lily were playing with their blocks in the living room they liked to build towers and bridges and castles they were having fun and making a lot of noise look lily i made a big tower ben said showing his blocks to his sister wow ben thats very good lily said but i made a better bridge see she pointed to her blocks that spanned the sofa and the coffee table they kept playing and talking until their mom came in she looked tired and had a headache she said ben lily its time to finish you have to put away your blocks and get ready for bed and please be quiet mommy needs some silence ben and lily did not want to stop playing they liked their blocks and they were not sleepy they said no mommy we want to play more we dont want to finish we dont want to be quiet mommy was not happy she said ben lily you have to listen to me its late and you have school tomorrow and its very hot in here you need to rest and cool down now finish your blocks and go to your room or else no story time for you ben and lily did not like that they loved story time they did not want to miss it they looked at each other and nodded they said ok mommy we will finish we will be quiet we will go to bed but can you read us a story please mommy smiled she said yes i can read you a story but only if you finish your blocks and go to your room quickly and no more noise ok ben and lily said ok mommy we promise they finished their blocks and put them in the box they went to their room and got into their beds they waited for mommy to come and read them a story they were quiet and good they made mommy happy and they had a nice story time
once upon a time there was a fish called jax who loved to swim every day he would go to the nearby stream for a nice swim one day he noticed something interesting happening on the bookshelf near the river jax swam closer to take a closer look and to his surprise he saw two naughty mice who were playing with a tiny pink car jax was about to swim away when one of the mice called out to him mouse 1 hey little fishy do you want to have some fun with us jax oh that sounds like fun what can i do mouse 2 swim around us and well chase you in the car jax quickly agreed and they started playing the game jax had the most fun he had ever had all the while the sun was setting and jax was getting very tired jax thanks for the fun i need to go home now the mice waved goodbye and jax happily swam back home dreaming of his next adventure

once upon a time there was a wide green meadow in the meadow there was a big green tree in that tree there were lots of juicy grapes a little girl went to the meadow she could see all the grapes in the tree the little girl wanted to catch a grape she ran towards the tree and reached out her hand to grab one she was too short to reach the grapes the little girl wanted to catch the grape very much she came up with an idea she found a small box and put it under the tree she stood on the box now she was tall enough to reach the grape she grabbed it in her hand the little girl was so happy she had caught a big juicy red grape she was smiling as she ate it
ben has a toy car that can zip around the floor he likes to make it go fast and make noises like vroom and beep he plays with his car every day after school one day his car stops moving ben tries to push it but it does not zip he looks at the bottom and sees a small door he opens it and finds a battery the battery is old and has no power ben is sad he wants his car to zip again he asks his mom for a new battery his mom says she will get one later but she has to do some work now ben waits and waits but his mom is busy he decides to look for a new battery himself he goes to his room and opens his toy box he sees many toys but no batteries he sees a flashlight a robot a radio and a clock he thinks maybe they have batteries inside he opens the flashlight and finds a battery he takes it out and puts it in his car he turns on his car and it zips again he is happy he makes it go fast and make noises like vroom and beep he goes to his mom and shows her his car his mom is cheerful she hugs him and says he is smart and clever she says she is proud of him ben smiles and zips his car around the room he is happy
once upon a time there was a nice little girl who had a big heart her heart was so big and so kind that she was always forgiving others one day the little girl was out running around she came across a boy who was crying the little girl put her hand on his shoulder and asked him what was wrong the boy said my dad made me so mad the little girl put her arm around the boy and said you can always forgive your dad you never know what will happen the boy looked up with brightened eyes and said thank you i will forgive him the little girl saw something special in the boy she smiled knowing she had given him a creative solution to his problem she then gave him a hug goodbye and the little girl went on her way the boy thanked the little girl and promised to remember her helpful advice little did he know he would be put to the test soon sure enough the next day his dad made another mistake the boy remembered the little girls advice and he decided to forgive his dad the little girl smiled knowing that her helpful advice had been the key to the boys success she was so pleased that her message of forgiveness had been so powerful
tom and lily were twins who liked to play in the big building where they lived one day they found a shiny button in the hall it was red and round and had a picture of a fire on it tom and lily wondered what it did lets push it and see tom said no dont do that it might be dangerous lily said but tom was curious and pushed the button anyway suddenly a loud noise came from the wall it was a siren that made tom and lily feel scared they saw a door open and people came out they looked angry and worried what did you do one of them shouted tom and lily did not know what to say they saw another door open it was the elevator it had a sign that said down tom and lily thought maybe they could hide in there come on lets go in the elevator tom said ok but hurry lily said they ran to the elevator and got in they pushed another button that had a picture of a star on it they hoped it would take them to a nice place but the elevator did not move it was stuck tom and lily felt trapped they heard more sirens and people outside they wished they had not pushed the button they wished they had listened to lily they wished they could go back to their home they hugged each other and waited for someone to help them they learned a lesson that day they learned that some buttons are not for playing they learned that some buttons are dangerous they learned that some buttons can make things scatter

once upon a time there was a girl named lily who loved to wear jewelry she had a necklace with a shiny diamond and a bracelet with pretty pearls one day a clever fox saw lilys jewelry and wanted it for himself the fox asked lily many questions like can i see your necklace and where did you get your bracelet lily being kind answered all of the foxs questions the fox then tricked lily and stole her jewelry when she wasnt looking lily was very sad and cried a lot she asked her parents for help but they couldnt find the clever fox lily learned a lesson that day to be careful with strangers and to not trust them too easily from that day on she never wore any jewelry again the end
once upon a time there was a poor man who walked with a cane he needed the cane to help him walk because his leg hurt one day his friend came to him and asked to borrow the cane the poor man was kind and said yes he could lend the cane to his friend the friend used the cane for a little while and then brought it back to the poor man the poor man was happy to have his cane back because he needed it to walk even though the poor man didnt have much he was still happy to help his friend he knew that sometimes people need help and its important to be kind and lend a hand or a cane when you can
once upon a time there was a clown called jack he was an incredible clown and loved to make children laugh he went to many places to do his shows on one of his shows he met a little girl called dolly she was really excited to see him and asked if he can provide her some fun jack agreed and proceeded to put on an amazing show for her when it was finally the end of the show dolly thanked him for the incredible performance jack was feeling really proud of himself and said to dolly im glad you liked my show was it fun dolly smiled widely and excitedly replied yes it was amazing but before she could say anything else a thunder lit up the sky the sky suddenly turned dark and a heavy rain started pouring dollys parents called for her and she had to leave unfortunately jack never got to say goodbye and dolly never found out about his incredible show again
anna and ben were playing in the park with their mom they saw a big truck with a sign that said fancy toilets they were curious and wanted to see what was inside mom can we go and look at the fancy toilets anna asked sure but be careful and dont touch anything mom said anna and ben ran to the truck and opened the door they saw many toilets that looked different from the ones at home some were pink some were blue some had flowers some had stars they also saw a big mirror a sink and a soap dispenser wow these are fancy toilets ben said look this one has a button anna said pointing to a toilet with a small panel next to it she pressed the button and suddenly a jet of water sprayed out of the toilet and hit her in the face ahh its wet its wet anna screamed ben laughed and said thats not a button thats a bidet its for washing your bottom anna was not happy she ran to the sink and tried to dry her face with a paper towel but the paper towel was stuck in the dispenser help i cant get the paper towel out anna cried mom heard the noise and came to the truck she saw anna and ben in a mess what happened here mom asked we were examining the fancy toilets but they are too fancy for us anna said mom smiled and said i see well lets go and find a normal toilet for you to use and next time dont press any buttons you dont know anna and ben nodded and followed mom out of the truck they decided that fancy toilets were not for them they liked their simple toilets at home better

ben likes to play with his blocks he has many blocks of different colors and shapes he can make towers bridges houses and more he likes to solve problems with his blocks he thinks it is fun one day he wants to make a big rainbow with his blocks he finds all the blocks that are red orange yellow green blue and purple he puts them in a row on the floor he makes a strip of each color he is happy but then he sees a problem his rainbow is not regular some strips are longer than others some strips are shorter than others his rainbow looks crooked and messy he is sad he thinks hard how can he make his rainbow regular he counts his blocks he sees that he has more blocks of some colors than others he needs to make the strips the same he needs to use the same number of blocks for each color he takes some blocks away from the longer strips he adds some blocks to the shorter strips he moves his blocks around until he has six strips that are the same he makes his rainbow regular he is happy he looks at his rainbow he thinks it is beautiful he smiles he solved his problem with his blocks he is proud

once there was a clever rabbit called judy one day judy saw a big tree she wanted to cut it down so she could make a house but she couldnt find a saw so she looked around for something else to use suddenly she saw a little frog called fred judy had an idea she asked fred if he could help her to cut down the tree she smiled and said can you make me a saw fred thought for a moment then he said yes i can he clapped his hands and the biggest saw appeared judy was very happy and clapped her hands too they cut down the tree and judy was able to make a nice house judy was very thankful for freds help and thanked him for being so clever the moral of this story is that if you are clever and think outside the box you can achieve your goals

once upon a time there was a man called george who owned an axe george loved using his axe to chop wood and make fires one day george was walking in the forest when he noticed it had become very cold he decided to build a fire so he took out his axe and chopped some wood as george was chopping the wood he heard a voice laughing he stopped and looked around but couldnt see anyone he was confused and said whos there suddenly a small creature appear from a bush it was a mischievous elf george asked the elf why he was laughing and the elf said i was laughing at you trying to build a fire its much too cold for that george listened to the elf and decided not to build a fire he understood that it was much too cold outside and that making a fire would be a waste of time george thanked the creature for its advice and soon went home he learnt an important lesson that day some jokes are not meant to be taken seriously

once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy he loved to play in his room with his toys one day he noticed that his room was very messy he decided to tidy it up all by himself as he was cleaning he saw something appear in the corner of his room it was a monster timmy was scared but he remembered his parents telling him that monsters werent real he tried to ignore it and continued cleaning but the monster kept appearing and scaring timmy he tried to tell his parents but they didnt believe him one night the monster came out from under his bed and took timmy away the moral of the story is that sometimes its okay to ask for help when were scared its important to tell someone if we think theres a monster in our room and not to be afraid to ask for help tidying up
ernie was playing in his room when he heard a terrible noise coming from outside he stepped outside to investigate and he saw that his dad was out in the garden involved in a big project ernie was very curious so he asked his dad what he was doing his dad said he was making something with a hammer ernie was so excited and asked if he could help his dad let him try hammering for a few minutes but it was too difficult for him after a few attempts ernie dropped the hammer and it made a terrible noise his dad was mad because the hammer was broken he said ernie was too young to help and sent him back inside ernie was sad and confused he had been so careful why was his dad so mad suddenly ernie realized what had happened he had made a terrible mess ernie was embarrassed and he knew he had to fix it but he didnt know how he was really scared and he began to cry ernies dad quickly came to his side and hugged him tight he said that it was okay and he understood why the hammer broke he said a real hammer was much too heavy for ernie then his dad went back outside and got a special toy hammer for ernie they spent the rest of the afternoon making things together and it was a lot of fun
one day a little bear was walking through the forest when he noticed the sky was starting to turn grey he heard a deep rumble that seemed to come from the sky suddenly it started to snow and the bear felt himself freeze he had to find somewhere warm and fast luckily he found a big cave nearby and he made his way inside when he stepped inside he saw a family of bears huddled together for warmth he asked if he could join them and the mama bear said yes she was a kind obedient bear and was happy for her family to help a stranger in need the bears shared their food and soon the little bear was too warm together they all stayed in the cave until morning when the sun rose again with a smile on his face the little bear said goodbye to his new friends and thanked them for being so kind and obedient
once upon a time there was a lively little girl named lily she loved playing with her kite lilys kite was very special because it had brightly coloured streamers that would blow in the wind one day lily took her kite to the park to have fun with it but as she was getting ready to fly it it suddenly flew away lily was so sad she ran to her mom and said mommy my kite flew away her mom smiled and said its okay sweetheart we can find the kite and go back to the park to fly it again so lily and her mom drove back to the park when they got there lilys kite was still flying in the sky lilys mom hugged her and said you forgive the kite for flying away and now it can forgive you for letting it go thats why it stayed lily was so happy and from then on whenever lilly flew her kite she always remembered to forgive it for occasionally flying away
tommy liked to soar in the air he had a big red kite that he flew with his dad in the park he felt happy when he saw his kite go up and down and left and right he liked to make his kite do tricks and loops one day tommy wanted to fly his kite at home he asked his dad but his dad said no he said it was too windy and there was not enough space he said they could go to the park later tommy was sad he wanted to soar now he had an idea he went to the kitchen and opened the fridge he saw a big balloon that his mom had bought for his birthday it was blue and shiny and had a string tommy smiled he took the balloon and ran to his room he tied the balloon to his kite and opened the window he threw his kite and balloon outside and watched them soar in the air he felt happy again he thought he was very clever but he was not the wind was too strong it blew his kite and balloon away tommy saw them fly higher and higher until he could not see them anymore he felt very sad he had lost his kite and his balloon he was also in trouble he had taken the balloon from the fridge without asking he knew his mom would be angry he heard his mom call his name she sounded troubled she had seen the empty fridge and the open window she knew what tommy had done she came to his room and asked him where his kite and balloon were tommy did not know what to say he felt sorry and scared he wished he had listened to his dad

once upon a time there was a rabbit and a fox they were very good friends and liked to play together all the time one day the fox said to the rabbit i have a secret let tms go and find a peaceful spot to share it so the two friends hopped off together and stopped at a grassy place under a big tree the fox whispered his secret to the rabbit who gasped in surprise when the rabbit asked what the secret was the fox just smiled and said it tms a secret you tmll have to find out for yourself so the two friends set off to explore giggling and hopping all the way finally they stopped again and the fox told the rabbit his wonderful secret he said we can be friends forever the rabbit was so happy and they hugged each other feeling very peaceful and hugged each other they both agreed to keep their secret forever the fox and rabbit were best friends ever since and were so grateful for their wonderful secret
one day a beautiful fish with a big bow on her head was swimming in the water the fishs name was bella she saw a big scale on the ground bella wanted to play with the scale but she was scared she did not know what it was bella swam around the scale looking at it from far away she saw her friend bob the crab and asked him what is this big thing bob said it is a scale we can play with it but we need to be careful bella and bob played with the scale but they did not know that there was a mean shark nearby the mean shark saw bella and bob playing with the scale he wanted the scale for himself the shark came closer and closer to bella and bob when they saw him they were scared but bella was brave she swam fast and hit the shark with her big bow the shark was surprised and swam away bella and bob were safe and they played with the scale all day long

once upon a time there was a little puppy named max max was very loyal to his owner a kind girl named lily max loved to play with lily and follow her wherever she went one day lily accidentally dropped a jar of cookies on the ground the jar broke into many pieces and the cookies scattered everywhere max was very sad because he knew that lily loved those cookies and he didnt want her to suffer so max decided to be a good dog and help lily clean up the mess he picked up the broken pieces of the jar with his mouth and put them in the trash then he gathered all the cookies and put them in a new jar for lily lily was very happy and hugged max tightly she knew that max was a loyal and helpful friend who always wanted to make her happy from that day on lily made sure to keep the cookies out of reach so that max wouldnt have to see her suffer again

once upon a time two friendly friends were walking through a field one said to the other look at the sun it is so bright today the second friend smiled why dont we take a picnic lunch here in the field his friend eagerly said yes they quickly loaded the picnic basket with sandwiches apples and juice they spread a blanket and sat down in the middle of the field they talked and laughed as they shared their lunch suddenly a beautiful butterfly flew across the field they both watched it flutter away in the wind one of them said that was so friendly the other agreed yes it was lets take another walk and see what else we can find so they set off through the tall grass and colourful flowers in the distance they could see a friendly animal in the field the friends ran closer and saw that it was a gentle horse it neighed and came towards them the horse was so friendly that they decided to take a ride they loaded the horses back with blankets and then hopped on together they enjoyed the ride around the field feeling the sun on their faces and the wind in their hair at the end of the day the friends waved goodbye to the friendly horse as they walked back home they had had a wonderful day filled with adventure and laughter

once upon a time there was a dependable frog called mary mary lived in a muddy pond and every day she would hop around the pond looking for something to eat one day mary saw something strange it was a little pink kitten stuck in the mud she knew she had to rescue it so she hopped over to the kitten and started to pull it out mary kept pulling and eventually the kitten was free the kitten gave mary a big hug and thanked her for rescuing it mary was so happy to have helped the kitten mary said goodbye to the kitten and continued hopping around her muddy pond she was glad that she was able to be so dependable and help her new friend the end

once upon a time there was a little bunny named betsy betsy liked to play hide and seek with her friends one day betsy found a regular hiding spot behind a bush she giggled as her friends looked for her after a while betsy got bored and wanted to leave she looked for the exit but couldnt find it she hopped around and around but the exit was nowhere to be seen betsy started to get scared and wished she had never hidden in the first place just when betsy thought she would never find the exit she saw a bird flying overhead the bird showed her the way out and betsy was so happy to be free from that day on betsy always made sure to remember where the exit was before playing hide and seek

once upon a time there was a clever little dog named max he lived in a small house with his family one day max saw a big hole in the fence he thought it was a great chance for an escape to have some fun outside max went through the hole and met a big cat the cat said i saw you escape why did you leave your home max sighed and said i wanted to have fun outside the cat smiled and said lets play together but remember to go back home later max and the cat played all day they ran jumped and laughed but soon max started to miss his family he said to the cat i had fun but i need to go back home now my family must be worried about me the cat agreed and helped max find his way home maxs family was so happy to see him they hugged him and said we were worried about you max please dont escape again max learned that having fun is good but its important to stay safe and not make his family worry the moral of the story is its good to have fun but always remember to stay safe and think about your familys feelings

once upon a time in a big forest there lived a deer the deer was very dull he did not like to play with the other animals one day a rabbit came to the deer and said why are you always so dull come play with us the deer replied no i want to sleep all day i do not like to play the rabbit felt sad and went away the other animals did not like the dull deer they thought he was not fun to be around one day a big storm came to the forest the wind was strong and the rain was heavy all the animals ran to find a safe place to hide the dull deer was still sleeping the rabbit saw him and said wake up deer there is a big storm we need to find a safe place to hide the deer woke up and followed the rabbit they found a big cave to hide in all the animals were safe inside the cave the storm went away and the sun came out the deer was happy that the rabbit had helped him from that day on the dull deer learned the importance of having friends he started to play with the other animals and became a happy deer the moral of the story is having friends is important and we should always be there for each other

tom and mia liked to swim in the sea they saw many fish and shells and corals they liked to play with the fish and touch the corals they did not know that the corals were alive and could get hurt one day they met a big turtle the turtle was old and wise he said to them hello little ones do you like the reef yes we do tom and mia said the reef is very pretty and fun im glad you like it the turtle said but you should be careful the reef is also very fragile and important the fish and the corals need the reef to live and grow if you play too rough or touch too much you can damage the reef and make the fish and the corals sad tom and mia looked at the turtle they did not want to make the fish and the corals sad they wanted to be good friends to them thank you turtle tom and mia said we did not know that we will be more gentle and respectful to the reef we will only look and not touch the turtle smiled he was happy that tom and mia learned a lesson he said you are very welcome you are very smart and kind the reef is lucky to have you as visitors come back anytime but remember to be careful and gentle tom and mia nodded they said goodbye to the turtle and swam away they still enjoyed the reef but they did not play with the fish or touch the corals anymore they only looked and admired they felt good in their hearts they knew they were doing the right thing they knew they were helping the reef and the fish and the corals they knew they were popular with them

up the ladder lily followed him but she was slower and weaker at the top of the slide ben saw something that made him scared it was a big green alligator with sharp teeth and a long tail it was sitting on the slide blocking the way down ben wanted to go back but lily was behind him he did not know what to do hello little boy the alligator said do you want to play with me ben shook his head he did not want to play with the alligator he wanted to go away too bad the alligator said im very hungry and you look very tasty the alligator opened his mouth and moved closer to ben ben screamed and tried to push the alligator away but the alligator was too big and strong ben felt the alligators teeth on his leg lily saw what was happening and got angry she loved her brother and did not want him to get hurt she grabbed a stick from the ground and hit the alligator on the head the alligator was surprised and let go of ben he turned to lily and growled who are you the alligator said you are very small and weak you cant hurt me lily did not care she hit the alligator again and again she was brave and strong the alligator felt pain and fear he did not like the stick he decided to leave the slide and find another place to seat go away bad alligator lily shouted you cant eat my brother the alligator ran away and lily and ben hugged each other they were happy and safe they slid down the slide and ran to their mom they told her what happened and she was very proud of them she gave them a big hug and a kiss you are both very brave and strong she said you saved each other from the alligator i love you very much lily and ben smiled and said they loved her too they learned a lesson that day they learned that size and strength are not everything they learned that courage and love are more important they learned that they were a good team they never fought again

once upon a time there was a monkey named max max loved to eat bananas one day max found an unusual banana it was very big and had spots all over it max wanted to eat it but he didnt know how to prepare it max asked his mom how to prepare the unusual banana his mom said first peel the banana then cut it into small pieces max did just that and took a bite it was the best banana he ever tasted from that day on max looked for more unusual bananas to prepare and eat

once upon a time there was a young boy who wanted to explore the world around him one day he came across an old hut and wanted to explore inside but when he tried to push the door open it was locked he looked around but couldnt find the key anywhere the boy sighed and was about to give up when he heard a voice from a nearby tree the voice said are you looking for the key i have the key you can have it in exchange for a hug the boy was a bit wary at first but decided to accept the offer he stepped forward and gave the voice a hug as soon as he did the voice revealed itself to be an old sparrow the sparrow gave him the key and said go ahead and explore the hut im sure youll find something interesting inside the boy thanked the sparrow and used the key to unlock the door of the hut after a few moments of exploring inside he found a beautiful old desk that was covered in dust he was amazed by his find and smiled as he closed the door and locked it again with the key he was sure he would come back to explore the hut again soon

tom and lily were at the beach with their mom and dad they liked to play in the sand and look at the water sometimes they saw fish or birds or boats but today they saw something big and gray and spouty it was a whale wow look at that whale tom said it is so big and strong and loud i want to see it closer lily said maybe it will talk to us or play with us mom and dad shook their heads no lily you cant go near the whale it is too far and too deep and too dangerous the whale might not like it if you bother it it might get angry or scared or hurt you but why lily asked the whale looks nice and friendly it is just swimming and splashing and having fun maybe it is lonely and wants some friends tom decided to agree with lily he thought mom and dad were ignorant they did not know anything about whales he wanted to learn more about them and make them happy he said to lily lets go find the whale we can sneak away when mom and dad are not looking we can swim to it and say hello and give it a hug lily nodded she thought tom was brave and smart she wanted to go with him and see the whale she said to tom ok lets go but we have to be quick and quiet we dont want mom and dad to stop us they waited until mom and dad were busy with their books and towels then they ran to the water and jumped in they swam as fast as they could following the whales spout they did not see the big waves or the sharp rocks or the other animals they only saw the whale they got closer and closer to the whale they saw its eyes and mouth and fins and tail they saw its skin and teeth and blowhole they thought it was beautiful and amazing they smiled and waved and shouted hi whale we are tom and lily we want to be your friends the whale heard them and saw them it did not smile or wave or shout back it did not want to be their friends it did not like them at all it thought they were annoying and rude and stupid it decided to teach them a lesson it opened its mouth and sucked them in it swallowed them whole it felt them squirm and scream in its belly it felt satisfied and proud and happy it spouted a big jet of water and dived deeper into the sea it left behind mom and dad who were looking for tom and lily they did not see the whale or hear their children they only saw the water and felt the fear and the sadness

tim and kim are twins who like to play outside they have a big yard with many flowers and trees they also have a cat named spot who likes to chase birds and mice one morning tim and kim wake up early and see the sunrise the sky is pink and orange and the sun is bright and warm they want to go outside and have fun they put on their shoes and coats and run to the door but spot is sleeping on the rug by the door he does not like to be woken up he is grumpy and hissy when tim and kim try to open the door spot jumps up and scratches them they cry and drop their shoes and coats they scatter all over the floor mom hears the noise and comes to see what is wrong she sees tim and kim with red marks on their arms and legs she sees spot with his fur standing up and his ears back she sees the shoes and coats on the floor she is not happy she picks up tim and kim and hugs them she tells them to be careful with spot he is old and needs his sleep she tells them to say sorry to spot and give him a treat she tells them to pick up their shoes and coats and put them away she tells them to wait until spot is calm before they go outside tim and kim do what mom says they say sorry to spot and give him a treat they pick up their shoes and coats and put them away they wait until spot is calm before they go outside they still want to play and see the sunrise they hope spot will join them later they love spot even when he is grumpy and hissy
once upon a time there was a boy named timmy timmy loved to ride his bicycle around the park he was very strong and could pedal very fast one day timmy saw a big puddle on the ground he wanted to splash in it but he didnt want to get his shoes wet suddenly timmy saw his friend sally hi sally timmy said do you want to ride bikes with me sally said yes and they rode around the park together they saw the puddle again and sally said lets splash in it timmy was hesitant but sally convinced him it would be fun they rode their bikes through the puddle and water splashed everywhere timmy and sally laughed and had a great time timmy realized that sometimes its okay to get a little wet if it means having fun with friends from that day on timmy never hesitated to splash in puddles again
mandy and her mom were walking through a big park mandy saw lots of boats in the lake and she was excited to ride one she asked her mom if they could go for a boat ride her mom said maybe later mandy it looks a bit cold out there mandy shivered and wrapped her blanket around her her mom smiled and said it looks like you need to get inside to stay warm mandy and her mom headed towards the house when they got there her mom said lets make something to eat we can use the dishwasher to help us cook mandy liked the idea and they began cooking but when they opened the dishwasher they saw a mouse inside mandys mom looked very serious and said we cant turn it on now we will have to find another way to cook the food mandy started to look around the kitchen she finally found an old pot and said we can use this pot to cook the food her mom smiled and said thats a great idea mandy so mandy and her mom were able to cook their dinner without the dishwasher mandy was glad that even though there was a problem she could help to solve it
once upon a time there was a mighty lion he was very strong and brave one day he found a word on the ground he picked it up and tried to read it but he didnt know how he asked his friends but they didnt know either the lion was so frustrated that he started to tear the word into little pieces but then a wise owl flew by and saw what was happening she asked the lion what was wrong and he explained the owl told him that the word was just a bunch of letters put together to make a message the lion was amazed and grateful to the owl he learned that words are powerful and should be respected from that day on he promised to never tear apart a word again
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to draw pictures with her crayons she was very creative and made beautiful pictures of flowers animals and her family one day her mom told her they needed to hurry to the gas station to get some fuel for their car lily quickly put away her crayons and ran to the car she saw that the fuel was very low and they needed to fill it up her mom told her to wait in the car while she went to pay for the fuel while waiting lily took out her crayons and started drawing on a piece of paper she drew a picture of a car with a big fuel tank when her mom came back she saw the picture and said wow lily you are so creative lily smiled and felt proud of her drawing they got back in the car and drove home safely with a full tank of fuel

once upon a time there was a bald tiger he was always so messy and sloppy his fur was not clean and he was always covered in dirt and leaves the tiger was sad because he felt so icky and unclean he went on a quest to find something to clean him up he searched high and low but he couldnt find anything to help him finally he stumbled upon a stream he sat down beside it and put his paws in the cool water he began to splash around and play and the stream began to clean away all of the dirt and leaves the bald tiger was so happy because he was sparkly clean again he thanked the stream and went on his merry way the end
