anna and ben are twins they go to school every day they learn many things they learn to read and write and count they also learn to spell spelling is hard but fun one day their teacher gives them a spelling test she says ten words and they have to write them on a paper anna listens carefully and writes the words she likes spelling ben does not listen he draws pictures on his paper he likes drawing he thinks spelling is boring the teacher collects the papers and looks at them she smiles at anna and says well done anna you spelled all the words right you are a good speller she frowns at ben and says oh ben you did not spell any words you only drew pictures you are a naughty boy you did not learn you have to stay after school and practice spelling anna feels happy and proud she gives ben a hug and says im sorry ben spelling is not so bad i can help you learn maybe you can teach me how to draw better ben feels sad and sorry he says thank you anna you are a good sister i will try to learn spelling maybe you can draw with me sometimes they hug again and go home they learn to spell and draw together
once there was a little girl named amy who loved to play outside one sunny day she went out to the garden with her dad she was wearing her special sunglasses that her dad had given her so she could see better in the sunshine she loved them and felt very special while she was playing she started to realize that the garden didnt look very tidy chewed up sticks and leaves were everywhere and the plants were a bit messed up amy got an idea and decided to help her dad tidy it up she picked up sticks and branches and tidied the plants until the garden looked perfect when shed finished amy was so proud of how tidy it was she realized that even though she was only three she could still do something useful dad was very pleased with her hard work too so he gave her a special reward of a new pair of sunglasses amy put them on right away and couldnt believe how cool they looked she ran back outside and continued playing in her tidy garden with her new sunglasses
tom was a bald boy who liked to eat a lot he ate bread cheese fruit meat and cake he ate more than his mom and dad and his sister ann he ate so much that he became very big and round one day he saw a shiny silver spoon on the table he thought it was candy and he wanted to eat it he grabbed the spoon and put it in his mouth but it was not candy it was hard and cold and bitter he tried to spit it out but it was stuck he cried and cried his mom and dad and his sister ann heard him and came to see what was wrong they saw the spoon in his mouth and they were scared they tried to pull it out but it was too tight they called the doctor to help the doctor came and looked at tom he said you are very silly tom you cannot eat a spoon it is not food it is metal it can hurt your teeth and your tummy you have to be careful what you eat you have to eat only good things that are good for you and you have to eat less or you will get sick the doctor used a tool to take out the spoon it hurt a little but tom was glad to be free he said im sorry doctor im sorry mom and dad and ann i was greedy and foolish i will not eat spoons or anything else that is not food i will eat only good things and i will eat less i want to be healthy and happy the doctor smiled and said thats good tom im proud of you you learned a lesson today eating is good but too much eating is bad and you have to eat the right things not the wrong things remember that and you will grow up strong and smart tom nodded and hugged his mom and dad and his sister ann he thanked the doctor and said goodbye he went to his room and looked at his toys he saw a silver car and a silver robot he liked them but he did not want to eat them he played with them instead he was happy he learned to be careful and wise

once upon a time there was a nosy little skeleton who liked to care for all of his friends he was always looking out for them and wanted to make sure that everyone was happy one day he decided to take a walk in the woods to make sure everyone was happy there too as he walked he saw lots of animals playing and jumping around he smiled and kept walking soon he came to a big old tree he decided to climb up so he could have a better view of the wood when he reached the top he smiled again he saw all the animals gathering around and he knew he was doing a good job caring for them he waved goodbye as he climbed down from the tree as he made his way home he felt good knowing that he had taken care of his friends and made sure everyone was happy

once upon a time there was a little bunny named benny benny loved to hop around in the grass and play with his friends one day benny went into his burrow and opened his drawer to get his favorite carrot but when he stood up too quickly he got dizzy and fell over bennys friends heard him fall and came running to see what happened they found him lying on the ground feeling very dizzy one of his friends helped him up and they all sat down together to rest after a little while benny felt better and decided to hop around again his friends were happy to see him feeling better and they all played together until it was time to go home benny went back to his burrow and put his carrot back in the drawer he was happy to have such good friends who cared about him
one day a little boy was feeling very lonely he had no one to play with at home he decided to go for a walk and see where he could find someone to talk to soon he came to a park and he saw lots of children playing the little boy wanted to join in but he didnt know what to do he looked around the park and he saw a big table covered with glue the little boy thought it looked like fun so he asked the other children if he could join them they said yes and soon the boy was having a great time playing with the glue but then one of the other children accidentally knocked the bottle of glue over and it spilled all over the floor the little boy felt very sad because now they had all lost the glue the others started to cry and the little boy couldnt help feeling sorry for them so he gave them each a big hug and soon they were all laughing and playing together again the little boy had found new friends and he was no longer lonely

one day a boy and a girl went to the park with their mom they saw a big tree with many birds and squirrels the boy and the girl liked to watch the wild animals and listen to their sounds look there is a nest with eggs the boy said pointing to a branch can we see them closer no we have to be careful and not touch them the mom said they are not our stuff they belong to the birds they need to be safe and warm the boy and the girl nodded and moved away from the tree they saw a slide a swing and a sandbox they decided to play there for a while but then they heard a loud noise a big dog was running towards the tree he barked and jumped and tried to reach the nest the birds and the squirrels were scared and flew and ran away oh no the dog will break the eggs the girl said we have to save them the boy and the girl ran to the tree they shouted and waved their arms to scare the dog away the mom followed them and called the dogs owner hey stop that your dog is not allowed to chase the wild animals the mom said he could hurt them or their babies the dogs owner came and grabbed the dog by the collar he said he was sorry and that the dog was just curious he took the dog away from the park the boy and the girl looked at the nest the eggs were still there unbroken the birds and the squirrels came back to the tree they made happy sounds and thanked the boy and the girl you did a good job kids the mom said you saved the wild stuff they are very grateful to you the boy and the girl smiled and hugged their mom they felt proud and happy they liked to help the wild animals they said goodbye to the tree and went home
once there was a patient gorilla the gorilla was very tired and needed to rest but it was stuck in a small cage and could not get out one day a kind and brave person saw that the gorilla was tired and decided to help the person opened the cage and the gorilla was so excited they carefully let the gorilla out and it ran around feeling the wind through its fur the person was very happy that they could help the gorilla and they watched it run and play with a smile when the gorilla was ready the person carefully closed the cage and released the gorilla into the wild the gorilla ran away and was free again thanks to the kind person who saved it the gorilla was so happy and the person was very proud of their kind deed
once upon a time there was a little girl named lucy she had a big toy box with a lock every day she would play with her toys but there was one toy she never played with it was a magnet lucys mom told her not to play with it because it could unlock the toy box all by itself one day lucys friend tom came over to play they played with all the toys but they did not play with the magnet tom saw the magnet and asked lucy about it lucy told tom what her mom said about the magnet tom wanted to see if it was true so they put the magnet near the lock on the toy box the magnet unlocked the toy box lucy and tom were so happy they played with all the toys in the toy box but they did not clean up after they were done playing when lucys mom came home she saw the mess she was not happy she said that lucy and tom had spoiled the nice clean room lucy and tom felt bad they knew they should have cleaned up they promised to always clean up after playing from now on and they put the magnet back in the toy box so it could not unlock the toy box again
once upon a time there was a charming hive it printed a lot of honey which the bees kept safe and the hive was happy one day the hive wanted to print even more honey so it worked hard to produce it but the hive quickly ran out of space and so it had to find a new bigger place to store all the honey it printed the hive spotted a nice little house nearby and decided to visit it inside the house were two lovely children playing with their toys the kids were so excited to see the charming hive and they welcomed it in with open arms from then on the hive lived in the house and the kids helped it to print honey every day the kids and the hive worked together to make honey the pretty honey filled the house and was soon overflowing into the garden and yard everyone was so pleased with the work that the hive and the kids had done together and so the hive and the children lived happily ever after
once upon a time there was a little girl called milly milly loved to eat every day she would take a modern stick and eat her snack with it one day milly decided to explore her garden she brought her modern stick with her to eat her snack there as she enjoyed her snack she noticed a tall tree oh what a pretty tree milly said the tree replied back thank you would you like to climb me milly was so excited she rushed to the tree trunk and grabbed a modern stick to help her climb the tree with lots of effort and determination she made it to the top of the tree milly was so happy she crossed her arms and looked around her she admired the beautiful view and ate her snack with her modern stick she was so proud of her achievement milly then said farewell to the tree and made her way down what a great adventure milly said with a smile

anna loved to sing and play with her new guitar she got it for her birthday from her mom and dad they said she was a big girl now and could learn to make music anna liked to strum the strings and make up songs about her toys her friends and her family one day anna wanted to show her guitar to her best friend ben she called him on the phone and asked him to come over ben said yes and ran to his bike he was excited to see anna and her new guitar he liked music too but he did not have a guitar he had a drum that he got from his grandpa when ben arrived anna opened the door and hugged him she took him to her room and showed him her new guitar it was shiny and red and had six strings ben thought it was very cool and asked if he could try it anna said yes and handed him the guitar ben held it and tried to strum the strings but he did not know how to do it he made a loud and funny noise that made anna giggle ben you have to be gentle with the guitar you have to use your fingers to make the strings sound nice like this anna said and showed him how to play a simple tune ben watched and listened and tried to copy her he did a little better but he still made some mistakes he felt frustrated and said anna this is hard i cant play the guitar like you maybe i should play something else anna thought for a moment and then had an idea she suggested ben why dont we play together you can play your drum and i can play my guitar we can make a band and sing songs that would be fun dont you think ben smiled and nodded he liked annas suggestion he ran to his bike and got his drum he brought it to annas room and set it up anna picked up her guitar and tuned it they looked at each other and counted to three then they started to play and sing they made a lot of noise but they also made a lot of joy they were happy and proud of their band they did not care if they were not perfect they just wanted to have fun and share their music

once there was a little girl named lucy she loved to play with her toys but today was different she was outside with her parents and there were a lot of people around they were all wealthy people and were talking about something strange lucy listened carefully but the words were all strange to her she then noticed one wealthy man pointing to his toes she wondered why and asked her dad whats he pointing at her dad laughed and smiled that man is showing off his money hes wealthy and he wants everyone to know this made little lucy excited she wished she had money too she wanted to show off her wealth like the man but then her dad said something that made her sad he said its just playing pretend you dont need money to have fun so lucy put away her dreams of being wealthy and went back to playing with her toys but secretly she still hoped one day she could show off her own wealth too

once upon a time there was a mighty turtle he liked to swim in the sea and look for shells he saw a big shell bigger than any he had ever seen before he decided to take it home on the way home the turtle saw a big sandy beach he stopped and sat down he started to break up the shell so he could get inside after a long time he finally finished breaking it open inside the shell the turtle saw a bright light he touched it and was very surprised when it made a loud sound inside was a magical star it was very shiny and sparkly the turtle was very happy to have found a magical star he took it home with him he had finished his adventure and was rewarded with a mighty magical star

ralph lived in the countryside with his family his parents had a measure for every job they told ralph that it was important to be dependable like the measure one bright and sunny morning ralphs mom sent him for an errand ralph was to wrap up a package and get it ready to be sent to the post office ralph gathered the necessary items and then went to work wrapping all the items after spending a little time ralph measured the parcel to make sure it was the right size like his mom had told him ralph tied the strings but they were too loose he tried retying them but this time they too were too tight frustration set in and ralph started to throw a fit his father suddenly appeared and said ralph dont worry you have done your job very well however remember to be dependable like the measure and the job would be perfect ralph looked up at his father and thought he decided to try it once again this time using the measure he re measured the parcel and tied the strings and the parcel was perfect he smiled at his dad with pride and took the package to the post office ralph realized the importance of being dependable and learned to do every job as accurately as possible the moral of the story is that it is important to be dependable and accurate in every
once upon a time there was a little girl named daisy daisy decided to go for a walk to feed the ducks in the pond she walked calmly and soon came to the pond with a big smile she opened her bag and scattered grain in the pond the ducks were so excited to eat the grains that they quacked joyfully but then something unexpected happened an angry duck came and started chasing the other ducks away daisy moved closer and saw that the angry duck had a hurt hand she asked it kindly what is wrong little duck the duck calmly replied back my hand is injured so i cannot eat the grains please help daisy quickly understood that the duck was hungry and decided to help she made a pile of grain next to the duck and helped him eat it safely after the duck finished eating daisy was a bit sad to see him go but then the duck spread its wings and flew away with a quack of gratitude daisy waved goodbye and then continued her walk with a smile

once upon a time there was a friendly little dog named spot spot liked to go for walks in the evening and explore the neighbourhood one day spot started his walk and noticed a river he wanted to stop and explore it so he paused but the water was too deep and he felt afraid he wasnt sure what to do then he heard a noise coming from behind him it was a friendly fox calling out to him the fox said lets have an evening adventure together ill show you a safe way to explore the river spot was so happy he followed the fox and they played together all evening together they found a shallow area in the river where spot could explore with no fear he splashed and swam in the river and had so much fun when it was time to go home spot said goodbye to the fox he was so glad to have made a new friend from then on spot always paused to explore whenever he went for his evening walks

once upon a time there was an enormous gray elephant he lived in the jungle and his name was jack every day jack would carry logs from the forest to other animals so they could use them for shelter he liked helping others and was always so strong one day jack was carrying a particularly heavy log when something special happened he spotted an enormous gray egg on the ground he had never seen an egg that big before jack carefully carried the egg to the animals in the jungle so they could take a look everyone was excited but they had no idea what was in the egg after a few days the egg started to crack and jack heard loud squawks coming from inside when the egg finally hatched jack was amazed to see an enormous gray parrot he had never seen a bird that big before jack and the parrot quickly became friends and they would play in the jungle and have adventures together from that day on jack always remembered to carry the enormous gray egg to the animals in the forest

once there was a little boy named tom tom wanted to go outside and play he put on his shoes and ran outside he saw a big puddle in his garden he hopped in it and started to zip around he splashed and laughed with glee suddenly tom felt something very bitter in his mouth he tasted a bit of the puddle water and it was salty and sour tom didnt like it he decided to jump out of the puddle and go find his mom toms mom was very happy to see him he told her what he had tasted and she explained to him that the puddle was made from sea water when the sea water evaporates it leaves a salty bitter taste behind tom was so glad he hadnt drank a lot of the puddle water because it would have made him feel very poorly from that day on tom steered clear of puddles and only zipped around in the safety of his garden

anna and ben like to play in the garden they have a big squash plant that grows many squashes they like to pick the squashes and make soup with mom one day they see a big squash that is almost ready to pick they run to the plant and each grab one end of the squash they pull and pull but the squash does not come off let go its mine anna says no its mine ben says they pull harder and harder until the squash breaks in half they fall to the ground with a thud the squash juice spills on their clothes and faces they look at each other and start to cry mom hears the noise and comes to the garden she sees the broken squash and the upset children she hugs them and says its okay dont cry you can share the squash and make soup together it will still taste good anna and ben stop crying and say sorry to each other they wipe their faces and clothes and help mom carry the squash to the kitchen they wash the squash and cut it into pieces they put it in a pot with water salt and pepper they stir the soup and wait for it to boil soon the soup is ready and they fill their bowls they sit at the table and eat the soup it is warm and yummy they smile and say this is the best squash soup ever they are happy and forget about the fight they thank mom for the soup and hug each other they love squash and they love each other

once upon a time there was a little girl called lola she was very brave and liked to try new things one day lolas mom gave her an onion lola was uncomfortable because she had never tried an onion before mom smiled and said lola why dont you try it youll feel better when you taste how good it is lola took a deep breath and bit the onion at first she felt uncomfortable and wanted to stop but she kept trying with each bite she felt better and better finally after eating the entire onion she felt much better she was surprised and made a huge smile mom i like onions now she said it was hard at first but it was worth it so i could improve mom nodded and said im very proud of you lola you tried something new and you got better at it
lily and ben were playing in the park they liked to run and jump and slide lily had a hoop that she could roll on the ground ben had a ball that he could bounce and throw they were having fun but then a big dog came to the park it was furry and brown and had a loud bark the dog saw lilys hoop and wanted to play with it it ran to lily and took the hoop in its mouth lily was scared and sad she wanted her hoop back hey thats my hoop lily shouted give it back dog but the dog did not listen it ran away with the hoop wagging its tail ben saw what happened and ran after the dog he had a plan come here dog ben called i have something for you the dog heard ben and turned around it saw ben holding his ball the dog liked balls too it dropped the hoop and ran to ben ben threw the ball far away the dog chased the ball ben quickly picked up the hoop and ran back to lily he gave her the hoop and hugged her thank you ben lily said you are a good friend ben smiled youre welcome lily you are a good friend too they reminded each other to be careful of dogs then they continued to play with their hoop and ball they were happy
once upon a time there was a little bird the little bird was very happy and liked to fly around in the sky one day the little bird wanted to lay an egg so the little bird flew around to find a good place to lay the egg the little bird found a tree with a big branch the branch was very strong and could hold the little birds egg the little bird felt very graceful as she laid her egg on the branch but then a big cat came along and saw the little birds egg the cat wanted to eat the egg the little bird was very scared and didnt know what to do suddenly the little bird had an idea she flew down to the ground and found a cell phone she picked up the cell phone with her beak and flew back up to the tree she dropped the cell phone on the cats head and the cat ran away scared the little bird felt very proud of herself for being so clever and saving her egg

once upon a time there lived a green mole he lived in a grassy hill and would often spin around in circles one day he heard a loud sound coming from beyond his hill curious the mole decided to investigate the mole dug and dug until he reached the end of the hill to his surprise he saw a spinning wheel he was amazed by its beauty so he jumped onto the wheel and began to spin the wheel spun faster and faster until the mole began to spin so quickly that he was a blur he kept spinning until suddenly the wheel came to a stop when the wheel stopped the mole saw a bright shiny object in the center of the wheel he carefully stepped off the wheel and nudged the object with his nose he realized that it was a magical coin he had found a treasure that would bring him luck for the rest of his days

one day a lazy rabbit was hopping down a path he was so lazy that he wanted to take the easiest way but the path he chose didnt yield the easiest way it curved around and became a very winding route the rabbit tried to take shortcuts but he couldnt find them on the path he was getting tired and frustrated he wanted to find the quickest way home so he hopped a little bit faster at last the rabbit saw some light at the end of the path suddenly the path opened up to a wide open field the rabbit saw a much easier and direct way home he leapt through the field and followed this path the happy rabbit arrived at his home safe and sound he had finally yielded the easiest route home

anna and ben were playing in the park with their ball they liked to kick the ball to each other and run after it sometimes they missed the ball and it rolled away they had to be careful not to lose the ball or let it go near the road one time the ball went too far and landed in the bushes anna and ben ran to get it but they saw a big dog in the bushes the dog was barking and growling it looked angry and scary anna and ben were afraid of the dog they did not want to get near it lets hide anna whispered to ben maybe the dog will go away they ran behind a tree and crouched down they hoped the dog did not see them they waited for a long time but the dog did not leave it kept barking and growling in the bushes where are you anna and ben they heard their mom calling them she was looking for them in the park she sounded worried we have to tell mom ben said to anna she will help us get the ball and make the dog go away but we will be in trouble anna said we were not supposed to go near the bushes mom said they were dirty and had bugs ben thought for a moment he did not want to be in trouble but he also did not want to be afraid of the dog he decided to be brave and tell the truth come on anna lets go to mom she will not be mad if we tell her what happened she will be happy that we are safe they got up and ran to their mom they told her about the ball and the dog their mom hugged them and said they did the right thing she said the dog was harmless and just wanted to play with the ball she said she would get the ball for them and they could play some more anna and ben were glad they listened to ben they learned that hiding was not always the best way to solve a problem they also learned that the dog was not so scary after all they thanked their mom and played with the ball and the dog they had fun in the park

lily and ben were twins who liked to play with their toys they had many toys but they always wanted more they asked their mom and dad for new toys every day mom and dad said no because they had enough toys and they should be happy with what they had but lily and ben did not listen they cried and whined and threw tantrums they said they were not happy and they wanted more toys one day mom and dad had to go to work and they left lily and ben with their grandma grandma was very kind and gentle she made them pancakes for breakfast and read them stories she also gave them a big box of toys that she had saved from when mom and dad were little lily and ben were very excited they opened the box and saw many toys that they had never seen before there were cars and dolls and puzzles and books and blocks and animals lily and ben grabbed the toys and ran to their room they did not say thank you to grandma they did not share the toys with each other they fought and snatched and broke the toys they made a big mess in their room grandma heard the noise and came to their room she saw the toys scattered and torn and ruined she saw lily and ben crying and yelling she was very sad and angry she said lily and ben you have spoiled the toys that i gave you you have spoiled the fun that you could have had you have spoiled the day that we could have spent together you have been very selfish and ungrateful you do not deserve these toys you need to learn to be happy with what you have and to share and care for others now you have to clean up this mess and put the toys back in the box and you have to say sorry to me and to each other and you have to sit in the corner and think about what you have done no more toys for you today lily and ben felt very ashamed and sorry they did what grandma said they cleaned up the mess and put the toys back in the box they said sorry to grandma and to each other they sat in the corner and thought about what they had done they realized that they had been very bad and that they had hurt grandma and themselves they wished they had been more kind and thankful and happy they wished they had played nicely with the toys and with each other they wished they had spent more time with grandma and listened to her stories the rest of the day was very quiet and boring there was no more noise and fun and laughter there was only silence and sadness and regret lily and ben learned a hard lesson that day they learned that being greedy and spoiled can make you lose what you have and what you love they learned that being happy and grateful and sharing can make you gain more than you expect they learned that being good and respectful and loving can make you and others happy they learned that sometimes less is more

once upon a time there was a cute bear who liked to chew his food he was always eating something no matter how small one day he was chewing on some grass when an emergency happened he didnt know what it was but he knew it must be something important the bear was scared and froze on the spot he watched as all the other animals ran away and he wanted to do the same but he was too scared to move finally he mustered up the courage and started to run away from the emergency he tried to chew his food as he ran but it was hard to do both at the same time after a few minutes he managed to escape the emergency and found a safe spot to rest he was so relieved and so pleased he had managed to run away he lay down on the grass and went back to his favourite thing chewing his food he was glad that he was safe and that he hadnt had to face the emergency alone he was a brave and a cute bear

once upon a time there was a grumpy old fish named bob he lived in a big blue sea bob had a small red sail that he liked to use on sunny days one day bob met a little fish named tim tim was sad because he lost his sail bob decided to help tim find his sail they swam around the sea looking for the lost sail finally they found it stuck in some seaweed tim was so happy bob and tim returned the sail to its place tim thanked bob for his help bob learned that helping others made him feel less grumpy the moral of the story is that being kind and helping others can make us feel happier

once upon a time there was a little bear the little bear was very hungry so he went to find some food he walked and walked until he found a big barrel the barrel was very heavy but the little bear was strong he shook the barrel and some apples fell out the little bear was happy because he loved apples he took a bite of an apple but it was bitter the little bear did not like the bitter taste so he kept looking for more apples
once upon a time there was a wealthy fairy who liked to hang around in a park one day while he was hanging in the park he spied a 3 year old girl who was playing by herself the fairy went over to her hello little one the fairy said what are you doing here the little girl looked up at him wide eyed i am playing with my toys she said the fairy smiled that looks like fun i will join you if you like the little girl nodded and the fairy started to play alongside her together they hung from the trees and twirled around in circles the fairy pulled out a few coins from his pocket here you go he said handing them to the little girl this is for you to buy more toys the little girl grinned from ear to ear she thanked the fairy and skipped away delighted with her newfound wealth the fairy watched the little girl go and smiled he would never forget the pure joy on her face
the boy was very glad he was going for a walk by the creek he had his recorder with him he was so excited he stopped in one spot and looked around he heard the birds chirping in the trees and the water lapping against the creeks banks he listened to the sounds and then started to record them he played back the recording to see how it sounded he couldnt believe how it sounded it was like he was really there he recorded some more sounds and then he decided to walk a little further he was very glad as he walked he recorded the sounds of the creek the birds chirps and the rustling of the leaves in the wind he was so happy he kept on recording until his recorder ran out of batteries but even after his recorder ran out of power he still remembered the wonderful sounds of nature he was so glad that he got to record it all

once upon a time there was a gorilla named bob who lived in the jungle he loved to play with his friends and eat bananas one day bob found a broken stick on the ground he picked it up and started to twist it around bobs friend a monkey named max saw what he was doing and asked what are you doing bob im twisting this stick bob replied max said be careful bob that stick looks dangerous but bob didnt listen and kept twisting the stick suddenly it broke in half and a sharp piece flew into bobs eye he cried out in pain and his friends rushed to help him but it was too late bob had lost his eye and could no longer play with his friends like he used to the moral of the story is to always listen to your friends and be careful when playing with broken things

once upon a time in a green garden there lived a restless caterpillar named tim tim liked to test all the leaves he could find he would crawl from one leaf to another munching and testing to see which one tasted the best one day tim met a little girl named lily hi tim said lily what are you doing tim replied i am testing leaves to find the yummiest one lily smiled and said that sounds like fun can i help you together tim and lily tested many leaves they found a big green leaf that tasted the best tim was so happy and he was not restless anymore he had a new friend and they both enjoyed the yummy leaf and from that day on tim and lily played together in the garden having lots of fun
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to draw and write on her blackboard one day she wanted to draw a picture of her family but she couldnt find her chalk lilys mom came into the room and asked whats wrong lily i cant find my chalk lily said sadly her mom smiled and said dont worry ill help you find it together they looked for the chalk and finally found it under the couch lily was so happy and said thank you mommy her mom replied youre welcome lily always remember to be careful with your things and spread kindness wherever you go lily nodded and drew a beautiful picture of her family on the blackboard feeling grateful for her moms help and advice
once there was a boy named sam he was only 3 and very silly one day sam wanted to do something different so he decided to polish a brick he got out his polishing cloth and some wax and started rubbing it onto the brick sam worked very hard and eventually the brick shone like a diamond sam thought it looked so great that he kept on polishing it everyone who saw it couldnt believe how shiny the brick was sam loved showing his special polished brick to all of his friends they were so impressed and thought it was very silly
max loved football he saw the other children all playing so he wanted to join in he asked his mum and dad for a football but they said his football was too wide max felt sad he wanted a football to play with so his dad went to the shop and bought a smaller football that would be easier for him to play with max was so happy he hugged his dad and thanked him he couldnt wait to go out and play with the other children once outside max kicked and dribbled the football following all the other boys they played and had fun and max felt so relieved he had a football to join in no matter what max loves playing with his football even when he watches his dad and siblings playing football he likes to sit with his own wide football and play he loves running with it bouncing it and throwing it around its one of maxs favourite things to do
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily who loved ice cream she liked to eat it every day but her mom said she could only have it once a week one day lily had an idea she decided to make her own ice cream she mixed together some milk sugar and strawberries and put it in the freezer to freeze the next day lilys mom helped her separate the frozen mixture into small cups lily was so creative she even added some sprinkles on top she was so excited to eat her homemade ice cream but her mom told her she had to wait until after dinner as they ate dinner lily couldnt stop thinking about her ice cream she was so excited to eat it that she didnt finish her dinner finally it was time for dessert and lily ran to the freezer to get her ice cream but when she opened the freezer she saw that the cups had fallen over and spilled all over the freezer lily was so sad that she didnt get to eat her ice cream
once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy timmy loved to play outside with his friends one day timmy lost his glove while playing outside he looked everywhere for it but couldnt find it timmys mom told him not to worry and that they would buy a new glove the next day timmy and his friends decided to go on an adventure to find the distant mountain they could see from their backyard timmys mom warned him not to go too far but timmy was determined to find the mountain as they walked timmys friends started to get tired but timmy kept going suddenly they heard a loud noise and saw a big scary bear timmys friends ran away but timmy couldnt find his other glove and was too scared to move the bear came closer and closer until it was too late timmy never found his glove or made it to the distant mountain
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she lived in a house with a big chimney the chimney was very important because it helped keep the house warm one day lilys mom gave her a special toy it was a teddy bear that lily loved very much she hugged it tightly and said i value my teddy bear so much but one day lily accidentally dropped her teddy bear down the chimney she was very sad because she thought she would never see it again but her dad climbed up the chimney and found the teddy bear lily was so happy and hugged it tightly again she realized how important her teddy bear was to her
lily and max were at the zoo with their mom they wanted to see the penguins they liked how they looked in their black and white coats they followed the signs to the penguin house when they got there they saw a big pool of water with ice and rocks there were many penguins in the water and on the land some of them were swimming and diving some of them were standing and flapping their wings some of them were marching in a line look mom they are marching lily said they look like soldiers yes they do mom said they march to keep warm and to stay together it is very cold where they live can we march like them max asked sure why not mom said lets march around the pool and see if they notice us lily and max started to march like the penguins they lifted their feet high and swung their arms they made funny noises with their mouths they had fun but one penguin did not like their marching he was the leader of the penguin group he thought they were mocking him and his friends he felt angry and annoyed he decided to teach them a lesson he jumped out of the water and ran towards lily and max he opened his beak and squawked loudly he pecked at their shoes and legs ow ow ow lily and max cried stop it stop it stop it they ran away from the penguin they were scared and hurt they ran to their mom and hugged her mom mom mom they said the penguin is mean he bit us mom looked at the penguin he was still chasing them he looked angry and proud she picked up lily and max and carried them away from the penguin house im sorry kids she said that penguin was not nice he did not like your marching he thought you were making fun of him he wanted to protect his group he did not know you were just playing lily and max nodded they understood they felt sorry for the penguin they did not mean to upset him they just wanted to have fun can we say sorry to the penguin lily asked maybe later mom said lets go see some other animals first how about the monkeys they like to play too lily and max smiled they liked the monkeys they hoped they would be nicer than the penguin they followed their mom to the monkey house they forgot about the penguin they were happy again

lily and tom were playing in the park they liked to look for stones of different shapes and colors lily found a round stone that was shiny and smooth she showed it to tom and said look this is my stone it is pretty and nice tom nodded and said yes it is can i see it he reached out his hand to touch the stone but lily pulled it away she said no it is mine you can find your own stone tom felt sad and angry he said that is not fair you have to share we are friends he tried to grab the stone from lily but she held it tight they started to fight over the stone pulling and pushing each other a man who was walking his dog saw them and came over he said hey hey what is going on here why are you fighting he looked at the stone in lilys hand and said is this what you are fighting about a stone lily and tom stopped fighting and looked at the man they felt ashamed and said yes sir we are sorry the man smiled and said it is okay i understand stones can be very special but you know what there are many stones in the park and they are all special in their own way why dont you look for more stones together and then you can trade them or make a collection that way you can both enjoy the stones and be happy lily and tom thought that was a good idea they said thank you sir we will do that they gave the stone to the man and said you can have this stone it is a gift from us the man thanked them and said that is very kind of you i will keep it as a reminder of your friendship he put the stone in his pocket and walked away with his dog lily and tom hugged and said we are sorry we are friends they went to look for more stones together they hoped to find many stones that were pretty and nice they also hoped to never fight again they were happy and sleepy they had a good day
once upon a time there was a girl who wanted to have fun she loved to have parties and run around with friends one day she and her friends decided to go on an adventure they found a big zip in the ground and decided to open it inside the zip was full of toys and sweets the girl and her friends had a lot of fun playing with the things in the zip but soon they started to spoil them breaking them and spilling all over the place the girl felt really bad and got really serious she knew she had been naughty and not to do it again the next time she was extra careful with the things inside the zip and made sure she did not spoil them she had learned her lesson and has ever since been careful when opening a zip
once upon a time there was a big strong truck the truck could drive really fast on the road one day the truck went on a bumpy rough road it was not an easy drive for the truck suddenly the truck got stuck in a trap it was a big hole in the ground the truck tried to move but it couldnt it was trapped the driver of the truck was very sad but then a kind farmer came to help he used his tractor to pull the truck out of the trap the truck was free again the driver was so happy and thanked the farmer from then on the truck always drove carefully so it wouldnt get trapped again

pirates in the world yes we are anna said we can find treasure and have fun they sailed around the yard looking for adventure but then they saw tom the mean boy from next door he was holding a water gun and a bucket hey you two tom shouted this is my yard not yours get off my barrel he ran towards them spraying water everywhere anna and ben were scared they did not like tom he was always rude and nasty go away tom anna said this is our ship not your barrel no its not tom said its mine and ill take it he grabbed the barrel and tried to pull it away anna and ben held on tight they did not want to lose their ship stop it tom ben said youre being mean i dont care tom said im bigger and stronger than you they tugged and pulled but no one could win the barrel rolled and bounced making a loud noise they were making a mess of the yard hey whats going on here a voice said they looked up and saw mom she was holding a basket of laundry she looked angry mom anna and ben cried tom is trying to take our ship tom mom said is that true tom dropped the barrel and the water gun he looked guilty um yes mom he said but they started it mom shook her head she was not happy tom you know better than that she said you cant just take things that dont belong to you and you cant be mean to other kids thats not nice she turned to anna and ben and you two you cant play in the yard without asking me first she said and you cant make so much noise youre disturbing the neighbors she sighed come on all of you she said lets go inside and have a snack maybe you can play nicely together after that she once upon a time there was a little squirrel named nutty nutty loved to play and eat acorns one day nutty found a big oak tree with lots of yummy acorns nutty ate and ate until he was full but he didnt stop there nutty kept eating and eating until he couldnt eat anymore the next day nutty went back to the oak tree but all the acorns were gone nutty realized that he had eaten all the acorns and didnt leave any for the other animals nutty felt very spoiled and greedy he knew he had to make things right so nutty started to pack all the acorns he could find and brought them to the other animals the animals were very happy and thanked nutty for sharing nutty realized that it feels good to share and not be spoiled from that day on nutty always shared his acorns with the other animals and they all lived happily ever after

once there was a ranch it had been used by many animals and was looking old but one day a patient animal called a dog came to the ranch and decided to restore it the dog started by cleaning the floor and walls then it painted the walls and the fence next the dog found seeds and started to plant some vegetables and fruits as the dog worked the vegetables and fruits started growing quickly the vegetables and fruits were soon ready and the ranch was full of life the other animals of the ranch were very happy they thanked the dog for restoring the ranch now they all had enough food to eat and they could also use the place to play the dog was very proud of what it had done from that day it would often come back and visit the ranch to show its hard work to the other animals

ben is a dog he likes to play and run and bark he has a bone he likes his bone very much he chews it and buries it and digs it up again one day ben sees another dog the dog is big and black and has a collar the dog sees bens bone he wants it he runs to ben and growls give me your bone the dog says it is mine now ben is scared he does not want to give his bone he loves his bone he barks at the dog no it is my bone ben says you go away the dog does not go away he jumps on ben and tries to take his bone ben and the dog fight they bite and scratch and pull a man comes he is the dogs owner he sees the fight he is angry he shouts at the dog stop it bad dog the man says he grabs the dog and puts him on a leash he speaks to ben i am sorry my dog is hungry he does not know how to share are you okay the man says ben is hurt he has a cut on his ear and a bruise on his leg he whimpers he holds his bone tight i am okay thank you ben says he is glad the dog is gone he is glad he still has his bone the man gives ben a treat he says he is sorry again he walks away with his dog ben eats the treat he feels better he buries his bone again he hopes no other dog will try to take it he is happy he wags his tail
sara was a big sister she had a baby brother named tom sara loved tom very much but sometimes she was jealous she wanted to play with mom and dad but they were busy with tom one day sara saw tom sleeping in his crib she had an idea she took her doctor kit and went to examine tom she put a stethoscope on his chest a thermometer in his mouth and a band aid on his arm she said i am a doctor i will make you better tom but tom did not like saras game he woke up and started to cry he spit out the thermometer and pulled off the band aid he was scared and hurt he wanted mom and dad mom and dad heard toms cry and ran to his room they saw sara and her doctor kit they were angry and worried they said sara what did you do to tom you should not play with him like that you could hurt him or make him sick he is a baby he needs love and care not games and toys sara felt sorry and ashamed she said i am sorry mom and dad i wanted to play with you but you were busy with tom i wanted to examine him like you do i wanted to be intelligent like you are mom and dad hugged sara and said sara we love you very much you are a big sister and a smart girl you can play with us and with tom but you have to be gentle and kind you can examine him but only with your eyes and your words you can ask him questions like how he feels what he likes and what he learns you can help him grow and learn too that is how you show your intelligence and your love sara smiled and said thank you mom and dad i understand i will be a good sister and a good doctor i will love tom and play with him nicely she went to toms crib and said hi tom i am sorry i scared you i love you do you want to play with me tom stopped crying and looked at sara he smiled and reached for her hand he said yes sara i love you too you are my sister you are intelligent the end
tim and sue like to play with balls they have many balls of different colors and sizes they like to throw them catch them kick them and roll them sometimes they play with their friends in the park and sometimes they play in their backyard one day they decide to play a new game with their balls they call it strike and strip the game is easy and fun they take turns to throw a ball at a big box the box has many strips of paper taped on it if they hit the box they can take off one strip if they miss they have to wait for their next turn are you ready sue tim asks holding a red ball yes i am ready tim sue answers standing behind the box tim throws the ball hard he hopes to strike the box and take off a strip but the ball flies too high and lands on the roof oh no tim you missed sue says laughing its okay sue i will try again later now its your turn tim says smiling sue picks up a blue ball she aims at the box she throws the ball gently she wants to strike the box and take off a strip and she does the ball hits the box and makes a loud noise sue runs to the box and peels off a yellow strip yay sue you did it tim says clapping thank you tim this game is easy and fun sue says holding the strip they continue to play strike and strip until they run out of balls and strips they have a lot of fun and laugh a lot they like their new game very much
john went for a walk with his dog spot spot was having lots of fun chasing after birds and sniffing all the smells john jumped into a puddle and started to soak suddenly spot started to jump around like crazy yelping and scratching john was worried so he looked closer and noticed a big ugly flea ewww shouted john he tried to flick the flea away but it was too late the flea had already jumped onto spot and was biting him john tried to get the flea off spot but it was no use the flea just kept jumping back onto spot and biting him again john was so sad and scared he started to cry just then spot stopped yelpping and started to run back home wait john yelled but it was too late spot was gone john never saw his poor dog again he never knew what happened to spot and his ugly flea
lily and tom were playing in the park they liked to swing on the swings and slide on the slide they also liked to hang from the monkey bars and pretend they were monkeys one day they saw a new thing in the park it was a big rope with a loop at the end it was hanging from a tree lily and tom wondered what it was for maybe it is for jumping lily said or for flying tom said they decided to try it lily went first she put her foot in the loop and pulled the rope she felt the rope lift her up she felt happy and excited look at me tom i am flying she shouted tom clapped his hands and cheered he wanted to try it too he waited for lily to come down but lily did not come down she was stuck the loop was too tight around her foot she could not get it off she started to cry help me tom i am stuck she cried tom ran to the tree he tried to pull the rope but the rope was too high and too strong he could not reach it he felt scared and worried help help he yelled a man heard them he was walking his dog in the park he saw lily and tom he saw the rope he knew what it was for it was not for playing it was for catching animals it was a trap he felt angry and sorry he ran to the tree he had a knife he cut the rope he freed lily he lifted her down he checked her foot it was red and sore but it was not broken he felt relieved and glad are you okay little girl he asked lily nodded she hugged him she thanked him she felt safe and grateful tom hugged lily he hugged the man he thanked him too he felt happy and thankful the man smiled he told them to be careful he told them not to play with the rope he told them it was dangerous he told them it was a trap he felt kind and helpful lily and tom felt guilty they knew they did a bad thing they knew they should not have played with the rope they knew they could have been hurt they felt sorry and ashamed they said sorry to the man they said sorry to each other they said sorry to the animals they felt sorry and sorry they learned a lesson they learned to be safe they learned to be smart they learned to be good they felt better and better

once upon a time there lived a little girl named clara clara was very curious one day she went for a walk in the park with her mom as she walked around clara noticed something very special a lot of colorful notes laid on the ground clara asked her mom what the notes were and her mother said these are called notes and they are very special we can collect them clara was very excited and she quickly started to collect the notes but when she placed them in her pocket she noticed that some of them were dirty she asked her mother why the notes were dirty her mother replied sometimes the wind can make things like this dirty dont worry you can still collect them clara smiled and quickly gathered all the notes she could find when she was done she had quite a big collection she hugged her mom and said thank you for helping me collect these
lily liked to knit she had many balls of wool in different colors she kept them in a big basket she was very organized she knew where to find each color when she wanted to knit one day she decided to knit a scarf for her friend tom she chose blue and green wool because they were toms favorite colors she started to knit but it was hard she made many mistakes the scarf was too long or too short or too loose or too tight she was not happy with her scarf she asked her mom for help her mom was a good knitter she looked at lilys scarf and smiled she said dont worry lily you are doing a good job knitting is not easy you just need to practice more you will improve with time she showed lily how to fix her mistakes she taught her how to make the scarf even and neat she gave her some tips and tricks lily listened and learned she thanked her mom and continued to knit after a while she finished her scarf she was very proud of her scarf it looked beautiful she wrapped it in a nice paper and put a bow on it she wrote a card for tom she said dear tom i made this scarf for you i hope you like it it is blue and green like your eyes and the grass i worked hard to make it i improved a lot your friend lily she gave the scarf to tom the next day tom was very happy he hugged lily and thanked her he put on the scarf and said wow lily this is the best scarf ever you are a great knitter i love it you are a very good friend lily smiled and felt warm in her heart she was glad that tom liked her scarf she was glad that she improved her knitting she was glad that she had a mom who helped her she was glad that she had a friend like tom

once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to play with her toys and go on adventures one day lily was playing with her toy boat in the bathtub when she saw her dad on the phone dad what are you doing asked lily im talking to uncle tom hes coming to visit us tomorrow and we need to pick him up at the port replied her dad whats a port asked lily a port is a place where big boats come to load and unload things explained her dad the next day lily and her dad went to the port to pick up uncle tom as they were waiting lily saw a big ship with a deep hull she wondered what it was carrying look dad that ship is so big and deep what do you think its carrying asked lily i dont know lily maybe its carrying toys like yours replied her dad later that day when they were playing with lilys toys uncle tom gave her a surprise he had brought her a big box of toys from the ship he had just unloaded at the port lily was so happy and grateful she knew that the big ship with the deep hull had brought her new toys to play with

one sunny day jimmy found an old bicycle in the grass it was hairy with lots of rust he couldnt wait to try it jimmy ran to get his older brother dave who was very happy to help him lets push it to the street said dave so they both grabbed the handle bars and pushed the old bicycle suddenly they heard a loud noise it was jimmys dad you kids stop right now he said in a angry voice jimmy and dave were scared but it was too late when they looked down they saw that a strange hairy creature surged out of the bike it had sharp teeth and long claws then it angrily growled at jimmy and dave the two brothers ran away in terror leaving the old bicycle behind they never saw it again or the creature that had grown out of it
once upon a time there was a little boy called joe joe liked to mix different things together and see what happened one night joe went into his dads shed and grabbed a handle he decided he was going to mix something special joe took the handle outside and looked up he saw the dark night sky all the stars were twinkling he knew he had to add something to make the night even brighter joe went back inside and got some paints from his moms art supplies he quickly stirred the paints together and created a big colourful mixture he grabbed the handle and stirred it around until it was all mixed up joe stepped back and looked at his masterpiece he smiled as the colours twirled around in the mix his dad saw him and asked what are you doing joe joe proudly held up the handle look dad i made the night sky even more colourful now the stars are really shining his dad smiled and gave joe a hug he said that looks great now the dark night sky is even more beautiful

once upon a time there was a little girl named sam sam was three years old and she was very curious one day she saw a bright red laser in the living room she wanted to know what it was and so she walked up to it she tried to reach out and touch it but her dad said to stay away sam asked her dad why she couldnt touch the laser but he just said it was too dangerous frustrated sam turned away and played with her toys instead as she played she noticed something strange whenever she pointed her toy laser at her dad he would act silly and move away quickly at first sam didnt understand why her dad was being so ignorant then she realized that the laser was like her toy she figured out it must be shooting out some kind of force thats why her dad said to stay away from it from then on sam was very careful with lasers and made sure to always stay safe

once upon a time there was a parrot named polly polly was very colorful and had a big beak polly lived in a deep forest with many other animals one day polly decided to travel to a new place polly flew for a long time until she reached a big city she saw many people and buildings but she didnt know where to go suddenly a man came and took polly away he put polly in a small cage and took her to his house polly was very sad because she missed her friends in the deep forest she tried to escape from the cage but she couldnt she realized that it was not a good idea to travel alone without knowing where to go the moral of the story is that its important to be careful when we travel and to always have a plan we should also be kind to animals and not take them away from their homes
once there was a woman she was walking in the park when she saw two dogs playing together she was surprised to see them because they were different colours she watched them smiling as they seemed to unite and play happily together the woman had an idea she went to her village and told her neighbours what she had seen telling them they should do the same she told them they should all unite and work together no matter what their differences were the neighbours were hesitant at first they did not know if it was a good idea or not but the woman was very persuasive and she persuaded them that it was a good thing to do they all agreed and decided to have a meeting the next week however the woman was very strict about what time people should arrive some people thought she was too harsh but she believed it was the only way to make sure everyone would arrive on time at the meeting all the neighbours united and decided to work together the woman was proud of what she had accomplished and the whole village was very happy
once upon a time there was a girl named sarah who lived in a big old house every night before bed sarah would look out the window and see a bright glowing star in the sky one night as sarah was looking out the window the glowing star began to move closer and closer to her house she was scared so she ran away from the window but then a magical print began to appear on the floor sarah took a step closer to take a better look at the print as she took a step closer a friendly voice began to speak to her it said hello sarah dont be scared im a friendly star sarah was still scared but she was also curious she asked the star why are you here im here to grant you a wish said the star sarah was filled with joy she thanked the star and wished for the most beautiful dress in the world suddenly the print began to glow and her wish was granted the star said goodbye to sarah and flew away into the night sky from that night on sarah always looked out the window and smiled knowing that a friendly star was always there to look after her

once upon a time there was a bear named bob who lived in the woods one day bob felt very sleepy and he didnt feel like doing anything unfortunately he had to find some food so he started to walk around to look for something to eat suddenly bob heard a loud noise he was a bit scared so he slowly peeked around the corner what he saw made him very surprised it was two foxes arguing and fighting over something bob felt bad for them so he decided to try and help he stepped into the clearing and said hey why are you fighting the foxes looked at bob and stopped the bigger fox said this is my food but the other fox said that it was his too bob thought for a minute then he said i have an idea why dont you both step back and ill increase the amount of food so that theres enough for both of you the foxes looked at each other and then agreed with bobs plan as bob had promised he added more food so that both of the foxes could have equal amounts the foxes thanked him and promised him to not fight again bob was glad that he could help he felt really happy as he continued his journey to find food

once there was an old man he wanted to go on a journey and so he set off he wanted to find who was the quickest of all the old man followed the path but he wasnt sure where it would take him then he saw a little girl he stopped and asked her do you know who is the quickest of all the little girl thought for a moment and smiled i know who is the quickest of all she said follow me and i will lead the way so the old man followed the little girl she took him up the hill and along the river finally she stopped at a tree this is the tree of the quickest the little girl said proudly she pointed to a rabbit hopping around in circles the rabbit is quick the old man watched the rabbit as it hopped around he laughed and thanked the little girl together they watched the rabbit and smiled
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she had a big fluffy pillow that she loved to snuggle with at night one day lilys mommy said its time for bed lily you need to get some sleep so you can grow big and strong lily climbed into bed and hugged her pillow tight im not sleepy mommy she said but as soon as her head hit the pillow she started to yawn i guess i am sleepy after all she said with a smile her mommy kissed her on the forehead and said goodnight lily sleep tight lily closed her eyes and fell asleep fast dreaming of rainbows and unicorns the end
tom and anna are friends they like to play in the farm they see many animals and plants they see cows pigs chickens and corn one day they want to pick some corn they ask the farmer if they can the farmer says yes but they have to be careful he says the corn is very big this year he says the corn increased a lot because of the rain and the sun tom and anna are happy they run to the corn field they see many yellow ears of corn they pull some of them and put them in a basket they want to eat the corn later but they pull too many the basket is full they cannot carry it they try to lift it but it is too heavy they fall down the corn falls out of the basket the basket is empty the farmer sees them he laughs he says they are silly he says they do not need so much corn he says he will help them he takes some of the corn and puts it in his truck he says he will give some to the other animals he says they can keep some for themselves tom and anna are sorry they say they are sorry they say they were greedy they say they will not pull so much corn next time they say they will share the corn with the farmer and the animals the farmer smiles he says it is okay he says he is glad they like the corn he says the corn is good for them he says they can eat some now he says he will cook some for them he says he will add some butter and salt tom and anna are excited they say thank you they say they love the corn they say they love the farmer they follow him to his house they smell the corn they taste the corn they say the corn is yummy they are happy
once upon a time there was a kind and compassionate girl she loved to ride her bike around her neighbourhood feeling the breeze on her face one day as she was riding she spotted a coin in the road she got off her bike and picked it up the girl was so excited because she knew that this coin could help her buy something special she decided to use the coin to visit her local animal shelter as soon as she arrived the girl was greeted by all the tails wagging and the purring cats she looked around and spotted a scruffy little pup he looked so sad and lonely she immediately knew that she had to adopt him the girl got back on her bike and rode home with the pup feeling excited to be a new pet parent from then on she kept the coin as a reminder of her compassionate act a sign of how she chose to spend her money
once upon a time in a small house there lived a little girl named amy amy was very sleepy she put on her pajamas and went to bed in the middle of the night amy heard a soft sound she opened her eyes and saw a friendly ghost the ghost said hello amy i am here to help you amy asked the ghost can you help me pick a dream the ghost smiled and said of course lets pick a happy dream for you together they picked a dream about playing in a big park with lots of friends amy said thank you ghost the ghost smiled and said youre welcome now go back to sleep and enjoy your dream amy closed her eyes feeling happy and safe with her new friend and so amy had a wonderful dream thanks to the kind ghost from that night on the ghost would always visit amy and help her pick the best dreams and they became the best of friends

once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to eat blueberries one day she went to the forest to pick some blueberries she saw a big hungry bear who also loved blueberries the bear said give me your blueberries or i will eat you lily said no these are my blueberries i picked them myself the bear didnt want to be honest so he tried to take the blueberries from lily but lily had an idea to prevent the bear from taking them she threw a handful of blueberries to the other side of the forest the bear ran after them and lily quickly ran away with her blueberries lily was happy because she prevented the bear from taking her blueberries she went home and ate them all up the end

once upon a time there was a very lazy boy who lives in a small house he never did any housework and was always playing one day he was playing outside when a friendly dragon flew over to him the dragon asked the boy to sign a contract so they could be friends the boy was so excited that he quickly ran to get his pen and signed the contract the dragon gave the boy a magical necklace and said wear this and you will be granted 3 wishes the boy was so excited and started thinking about all the things he could wish for but when he got home he decided to be lazy and just do nothing the next morning he woke up to find that all his dreams had come true he had really found a lazy way to fulfill his wishes the moral of the story is that if you take the time to do things the right way you will always be rewarded being lazy may seem easier in the short term but it will never get you the results that hard work will
once upon a time there was a big field full of pretty flowers a little girl named lily loved to pick daisies and make pretty necklaces from them one day she saw a big beautiful daisy in the middle of the field but it was very difficult to reach lily tried to walk to the daisy but it was too far away she tried to jump but she couldnt jump high enough she thought about giving up but she really wanted that daisy finally she had an idea she found a long stick and used it to pull the daisy towards her but just as she was about to grab the daisy a big mean dog came running towards her lily was scared but she remembered that she had the stick she used it to pull the daisy and herself away from the dog she ran all the way home with her pretty daisy necklace and felt very proud of herself for being so brave
once upon a time there lived a dependable ghost it loved to play and be with friends everyday it went to the lake to supply food for its animal friends the squirrels rabbits foxes and birds all came to gather the ghost was so dependable they all knew it would supply food for them one day the ghost saw something strange near the lake there was a big house and it was surrounded by fog the ghost was curious and decided to explore as it got closer to the house the ghost could see what looked like an old man in the window the old man waved to the ghost as if he had been expecting it the ghost cautiously approached the strange house slowly the old man opened the door and asked the ghost to come inside the ghost felt scared but something made it stay the old man told the ghost he had a special mission for it the mission was to supply food to those who were hungry and could not get it themselves the ghost was honoured and agreed to take on the task it quickly returned to the lake and began to supply food to all of its animal friends it quickly became known as the dependable ghost always helping those in need the ghost was proud to have been asked to help and remained dependable for years to come

once upon a time there was a little monkey named pete pete was a very sad monkey he would cry all day long one day pete heard a very strange noise coming from underground it sounded very unusual so pete decided to investigate he got down on his hands and knees and started crawling through the tunnel that was underground as he kept moving through the tunnel the sound became louder and louder when pete finally reached the end of the tunnel he discovered a small cave inside the cave there was a puddle of water suddenly pete heard a soft muffled voice coming from the puddle it said help me pete im stuck here and i cant get out pete was surprised and asked who are you the voice answered im an unusual turtle i was exploring underground and i got stuck in this puddle please help me out so pete looked around for a stick and used it to get the turtle out of the puddle he hugged the turtle and said im so happy i could help you the turtle hugged him back and said thank you you made me so happy and ill never forget you pete smiled and said lets go home now and ill never cry again
once upon a time there was a modest turtle named tim tim lived in a small pond with his fish friends tim had a pretty skull on his back that he was very proud of one day tim saw a big frog named fred fred was sad because he lost his toy tim wanted to help so he made a promise to fred tim said i promise to find your toy fred tim looked and looked for the toy he asked all his fish friends to help too they found the toy under a big rock fred was so happy that he hugged tim tim felt good for keeping his promise the moral of the story is that when we make a promise we should always try our best to keep it
ben was miserable today he wanted to go outside and play with his ball but it was raining he looked out the window and saw big drops of water falling from the sky he sighed and said rain rain go away come again another day his mom heard him and came to his room she smiled and said i know you are sad ben but rain is good for the plants and the animals and we can still have fun inside do you want to read a book with me or play a game or draw a picture ben shook his head he did not want to do any of those things he wanted to go outside and play with his ball he said no thank you mom i dont want to do anything i just want the rain to stop his mom hugged him and said i understand ben but sometimes we have to wait for things we want maybe the rain will stop soon and then you can go outside and play with your ball but until then why dont you try to find something fun to do inside maybe you can make a fort with your blankets or pretend to be a pirate or sing a song ben thought for a moment he liked to make forts and to pretend and to sing maybe he could do one of those things and have some fun he said okay mom maybe i will try that can you help me make a fort his mom nodded and said of course ben i would love to help you make a fort lets go get some blankets and pillows and chairs and make the best fort ever ben smiled and said okay mom lets do that maybe today is not so miserable after all he got up from his bed and followed his mom to the living room he forgot about the rain and the ball and started to have fun with his mom he was not miserable anymore he was happy

once upon a time in a deep deep forest there lived a tutor named mr fox mr fox was very good at helping little animals learn new things one day a small bird named billy came to mr fox for help mr fox can you teach me how to ring my bell asked billy mr fox smiled and said of course billy lets start right now they practiced all day long billy tried to ring the bell by flapping his wings and tapping it with his beak at first it was hard but with mr foxs help billy got better and better finally billy could ring the bell loudly and clearly thank you mr fox said billy very happy mr fox was proud of billy and knew that he had helped another friend in the deep deep forest
