once upon a time there was a girl she was playing in the garden suddenly she saw a dove it was flying high up in the sky she watched it for a long time the dove flew down closer to the girl she was scared at first but then she saw how beautiful the dove was she kept watching it as it flew around her the girl wanted to act like the dove so she put her arms out and started to flap them she moved them real fast like the wings of the dove she felt like she was flying in the sky then the dove did something scary it flew away very quickly the girl was sad but then she saw the dove had left her a present it was a small white feather the girl smiled and hugged the feather she knew the dove would always be with her
tom was a big rat who liked to live in the dark he did not like the sun because it made his eyes hurt he only came out at night when he could find food and play with his friends one night tom saw something shiny in a trash can he was curious so he climbed up and looked inside he saw a shiny ball that looked like a small sun he wanted to touch it but it was too high he jumped and jumped but he could not reach it hey tom what are you doing asked sam another rat who came by i want to touch the shiny ball said tom thats not a ball thats a trap said sam its a trick to catch rats like us if you touch it it will snap and hurt you come on lets go away but tom did not listen he was too stubborn and greedy he jumped one more time and this time he reached the shiny ball but as soon as he touched it he heard a loud snap and felt a sharp pain the shiny ball was a trap and it closed around his paw he was stuck and helpless help help he cried it hurts it hurts sam heard his cries and ran back he saw tom in the trap and felt sorry for him he tried to open the trap but it was too strong he could not help him im sorry tom he said i tried to warn you but you did not listen now you are in trouble maybe someone will come and free you but i have to go its almost dawn and the sun will shine soon i dont want to be seen by the big people goodbye tom sam left and tom was alone he wished he had listened to sam he wished he had not been so curious and greedy he wished he had not touched the shiny ball he was scared and sad he did not know what would happen to him he hoped someone would come and help him but he did not see anyone he only saw the sky getting brighter and brighter and the sun starting to shine
jane and her mom were having a picnic in the park janes mom spread the red and white checked cloth napkin on the grass jane looked at her mom and said what should i do now her mom smiled and pointed to the sky lets gaze up at the deep blue sky and look at the fluffy white clouds she said jane looked up and saw many shapes in the clouds then she looked for a bird in a tree and noticed a big yellow feather floating on the ground she picked it up and put it under the napkin to save it for later jane looked back up and said can we gaze at the clouds again her mom smiled and said yes lets take a napkin break and gaze at the clouds they both laid back and watched the fluffy clouds float by above them jane smiled and said this gazing is so much fun her mom agreed and said yes it is
lily and ben were twins who liked to help their mom cook one day mom asked them to make some soup for dad who was sick lily and ben put some water carrots potatoes and chicken in a big pot they stirred and stirred with a big spoon soup is good for dad lily said it will make him warm and happy yes and we can give him a scarf too ben said a scarf will keep his neck cozy they looked for a scarf in the closet but they could not find one they saw a ball of wool and some needles they had an idea lets make a scarf for dad lily said we can knit it with the wool and the needles they tried to knit but it was hard they made many knots and holes the wool was scratchy and the needles were pointy they got frustrated and sad knitting is not fun ben said it hurts my fingers and makes me angry me too lily said and our scarf is ugly and small dad will not like it they heard mom call them from the kitchen lily and ben the soup is ready come and taste it they left the wool and the needles on the floor and ran to the kitchen they tasted the soup and it was delicious they smiled and hugged mom mom you are the best cook lily said your soup is yummy and smooth thank you my loves mom said you are very good helpers im sure dad will love the soup too and look i have a surprise for you she showed them a big soft colorful scarf that she had knitted for dad it had stripes of red blue green and yellow it was long and warm wow mom you are the best knitter too ben said your scarf is beautiful and big thank you my loves mom said i knitted it while you were making the soup i used the wool and the needles that you left on the floor im sorry i hope you dont mind lily and ben looked at each other and felt ashamed they had wasted the wool and the needles and made a mess they had not finished their scarf and had given up mom we are sorry lily said we wanted to make a scarf for dad too but we could not do it we did not know how to knit we made a bad scarf and a big mess mom we are sorry ben said we should have asked you to teach us how to knit we should have tried harder and been more patient we did not do our best mom hugged them and kissed them its okay my loves she said im proud of you for wanting to make a scarf for dad that was very kind and thoughtful of you but knitting is not easy it takes time and practice and skill you cant learn it in one day you have to be willing to make mistakes and learn from them you have to keep trying and not give up thats how you get better at anything lily and ben nodded and understood they felt sorry for their bad scarf and their big mess but they also felt happy for their good soup and their moms scarf they learned a lesson that day they learned that cooking and knitting are both ways of showing love but they also require effort and perseverance they learned that they can do anything if they try hard and ask for help they gave mom a big hug and said we love you mom thank you for teaching us how to cook and knit we want to learn more from you we want to do our best mom smiled and said i love you too my loves you are my best gifts come on lets go and give dad the soup and the scarf he will be very happy to see you
anna and ben were playing in the park they had a ball and a kite they liked to run and throw the ball and to watch the kite fly in the sky they were having fun but then they saw a big dog the dog was barking and running towards them anna and ben were scared they did not know the dog they did not know if the dog was kind or mean lets go away anna said to ben the dog might bite us but ben did not want to go he wanted to stay and play he liked the dog he thought the dog was kind and wanted to play too no lets stay ben said to anna the dog is nice look he has a tail and ears he is like us anna and ben did not agree they started to argue they did not hear the dog coming closer the dog reached them he sniffed them and licked them he wagged his tail and barked he wanted to play with them he took the ball in his mouth and ran away he set the ball on the grass and waited for them to chase him anna and ben stopped arguing they saw the dog was kind he was not mean he was just lonely they felt sorry for him maybe you are right ben anna said the dog is nice he just wants to be our friend lets play with him anna ben said he looks happy maybe he has no other friends anna and ben ran after the dog they played with him and the ball and the kite they had more fun they forgot their fear they made a new friend the dog was happy too he had new friends he was not lonely anymore

anna and ben were playing in the park they liked to run jump and slide on the grass and the swings they saw a big pond with ducks and fish anna wanted to feed them some bread look ben the ducks are hungry lets give them some bread anna said ok anna but be careful the pond is deep and wet dont fall in ben said they walked to the edge of the pond and threw some bread crumbs the ducks came closer and quacked the fish jumped and splashed anna and ben laughed and clapped suddenly a big cloud covered the sun the sky became gloomy and dark anna and ben heard a loud noise it was thunder oh no ben its going to rain we have to go home anna said ok anna lets go grab your coat and your bag ben said they picked up their things and started to run but anna slipped on a wet stone and fell into the pond she screamed and cried ben saw her and ran to help her anna anna are you ok hold my hand ill pull you out ben said he reached out his hand and anna grabbed it he pulled her out of the pond she was wet and cold and scared ben hugged her and rubbed her back its ok anna its ok youre safe now dont cry well go home and get dry and warm ben said they ran to their mom who was waiting for them at the gate she saw them and gasped oh my what happened youre soaked and muddy are you hurt she asked mom mom anna fell into the pond she tried to feed the ducks and she slipped i helped her out shes ok but shes sad ben said mom hugged them both and kissed them youre such a brave boy ben and youre such a lucky girl anna im so glad youre ok come on lets go home and change and next time be more careful around the pond ok she said they nodded and smiled they got into the car and drove home the rain stopped and the sun came out the pond sparkled and the ducks quacked anna and ben looked at each other and giggled they had a big adventure they learned to dive and to land and they learned to help each other they were happy

once upon a time jack and his mom were getting ready for a long trip jack was very excited his mom pulled out their suitcases ready to pack up she helped jack unpack his toys and clothes into one of the suitcases as jack was putting his toys into the suitcase he noticed something very large in the corner of his bedroom he gasped and asked his mom what is that his mom chuckled and said that is just a monster jack was unsure he asked his mom can we take the monster with us his mom replied no we cant take it on the trip jack jack thought for a moment and then asked again why not his mom said jack it is important to identify what is important to have with you and what you do not need we cannot take the monster on our trip because it is too big when we take things with us on a trip we must be sure that it is necessary to bring jack understood and he and his mom continued to unpack jack knew that while it was fun to have things with him on his trip it was important to recognize what he really needed

tim and kim were twins who liked to play with kites they had many kites of different colors and shapes one day they saw a fancy kite in the store it was big and shiny and had a long tail they wanted to buy it but it was too expensive they asked their mom and dad to buy them the fancy kite but they said no they said they already had enough kites and they should be happy with what they had tim and kim were sad and angry they thought their mom and dad were mean and unfair the next day they decided to sneak out of their room and go to the store they took some money from their piggy bank and ran to the store they bought the fancy kite and hid it in their backpack they were very happy and excited they wanted to fly the fancy kite in the park but when they got to the park they saw a big problem the wind was too strong and the fancy kite was too heavy they tried to fly the fancy kite but it kept falling and crashing they tried to fix it but it was too hard they started to cry and regret then they saw their mom and dad coming they had followed them to the park they were very worried and angry they scolded tim and kim for being dishonest and disobedient they took the fancy kite and the money and said they would return them to the store they said they were very disappointed and sad tim and kim felt very sorry and ashamed they realized they had made a big mistake they hugged their mom and dad and said they were sorry they said they learned their lesson they said they didnt need the fancy kite they said they loved their mom and dad and their other kites their mom and dad forgave them and hugged them back they said they loved them too and they were proud of them for being sorry they said they could still play with their other kites but they had to be careful and respectful they said they hoped they would be more grateful and happy with what they had the moral of the story is be honest and obedient and be happy with what you have

block it is a square where should i put it ben asked put it here ben it will make the tower stronger i have a blue block it is a circle i will put it on top of your red block lily said they kept building the tower higher and higher they were happy and proud of their work they counted the blocks they used they knew some numbers like one two three four and five ben how many blocks do we have lily asked i dont know lily i cant count more than five lets ask mom she knows all the numbers ben said they ran to the kitchen where mom was making cookies they asked her to come and see their tower they wanted her to tell them how many blocks they used wow lily and ben you made a very big tower it is very nice you used a lot of blocks let me see you used one two three four five six seven eight nine ten eleven twelve thirteen fourteen fifteen sixteen seventeen eighteen nineteen twenty blocks that is a big number mom said lily and ben were confused they did not understand what mom said they did not know what twenty meant they thought it was a funny word they laughed and repeated it twenty twenty twenty ha ha ha they said they ran back to their tower they wanted to play some more they wanted to make the tower even bigger they looked for more blocks they saw a box in the corner it had a label that said supply they did not know what that meant they thought it was another funny word they opened the box it had more blocks inside they were happy they took some blocks and added them to their tower but the box did not have blocks for playing it had blocks for building they were heavy and hard they were not meant for children they were meant for dad he was a builder he used them to make houses and walls he left them in the corner by mistake he forgot to put them away when lily and ben put the heavy blocks on their tower the tower became unstable it could not hold the weight it started to wobble and shake it fell down with a loud crash it broke into pieces it hurt lily and ben they cried and screamed they had cuts and bruises they were scared and sad mom heard the noise she ran to the living room she saw the mess and the children she was shocked and angry she called dad he came home quickly he saw what happened he was sorry and worried he took lily and ben to the hospital they had to get stitches and bandages they had to stay in bed for a long time they could not play with blocks anymore the moral of the story is do not play with things you do not know they can be dangerous and hurt you always ask your parents before you use something new they can tell you what it is and how to use it safely they can supply you with the right toys and the right numbers they can help you have fun and learn they love you and want you to be happy and healthy

once upon a time there was a gorilla named george george was very sad because he lost his favorite banana he looked everywhere for it but couldnt find it one day a little girl named lily came to the jungle she saw george and asked him why he was sad george told her about his lost banana lily felt sorry for george and decided to help him find it they searched everywhere but still couldnt find the banana suddenly lily had an idea she asked george to throw a coconut at a tree to see if the banana would fall out george threw the coconut and to their surprise the banana fell out of the tree george was so happy that he hugged lily and thanked her for helping him from that day on george and lily became good friends and went on many adventures together

one day a small boy named tim and his soft toy bunny went for a walk they saw a big tree with many turns tim and bunny wanted to climb the tree tim said lets take turns climbing the tree bunny bunny nodded and let tim go first tim climbed up the tree and saw a birds nest the bird said hello tim can you tell me a story tim smiled and began to tell the bird a story about a brave cat when tim finished it was bunnys turn to climb bunny climbed up the tree and saw the bird too the bird asked bunny can you tell me a story too bunny thought for a moment and then told the bird a story about a kind dog the bird liked both stories and thanked tim and bunny they all became friends and played together until the sun went down tim and bunny went back home excited to tell their mom about their new friend and the fun they had
there once was a girl named jenna she was three years old and loved the water she always wanted to go to the beach one day she asked her mom if she could go to the beach her mom agreed with a smile and soon jenna and her mom were on their way to the beach when jenna arrived she was so eager to get in the water she ran straight to the edge of the ocean and pointed in the navy blue water what do you see jenna her mom asked fish jenna shouted with a smile on her face her mom smiled and said lets go play in the ocean shall we and so jenna and her mom spent the whole day in the ocean jenna pointing out different kinds of fish and having a wonderful time
once upon a time in a small town there was a busy street on this street there were many people and cars they all moved around a lot it was always noisy and full of life one day a little girl named lily wanted to cross the busy street she knew she had to be careful she looked both ways and saw a big car coming the car saw lily too the car stopped and let lily go first the car did a good thing called yield lily said thank you and crossed the street safely on sunday lily and her mom went for a walk on the busy street they held hands and looked at all the people and cars they had a fun time lily remembered to be careful and look both ways when crossing the street and the cars remembered to yield for her
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to paint with her colorful paints one day lilys mommy bought her a new mattress for her bed it was very soft and comfortable and lily liked it a lot she thought it was very attractive because it was pink and had flowers on it one night lily decided to paint on her mattress she thought it would be fun to make a picture on her bed she used her red paint to draw a big heart on her mattress but when lily woke up the next morning she saw that the paint had made a big mess the heart was all over her sheets and pillow and it wouldnt come off no matter how hard she tried to clean it lilys mommy was very upset when she saw what had happened she scolded lily for painting on her mattress and ruining it lily felt very sad and wished she could take it back from that day on lily learned to always ask for permission before she painted on anything and she never painted on her mattress again

once upon a time there was a big wide river on one side of the river was a small village and on the other side was a lush green forest the village people wanted to cross the river but they couldn tmt they tried to build a bridge but it kept collapsing so they asked the forest animals for help the animals insisted that they use a big long fork to bridge the river the village people thought it was a silly idea but they trusted the animals the animals showed them how to take the big long fork and slip it over the wide river the villagers pushed and the animals pulled and the fork stayed in place the village people were so happy that they could finally cross the river and the animals were happy to help they all lived happily ever after

stop robber or i will shoot lily ran as fast as she could but tom was faster he caught her and said you are under arrest you stole the candy from the store he took her to the jail which was a i am sorry i took the candy i will give it back to you please please please tom said no you have to stay in jail for a long time you are a bad robber you have to learn your lesson he went to play with the candy and the gun he did not care about lily lily cried and cried she wanted to go home she wanted to hug her mom she wanted to play with tom again she looked around the jail and saw a hole in the corner she crawled to the hole and pushed it with her hands the hole got bigger and bigger she saw the sun and the grass and the flowers she smiled and said i can get out i can release myself from the once there was a small girl named nina she was three years old and loved to explore one day nina was out walking in the forest all alone she passed by a huge tree and spotted a funny knob on its bark she smiled and giggled in delight suddenly she heard a deep booming laughter she was surprised and scared nina was so lonely and thought no one else was there then from behind the tree an old man appeared he saw nina smiled and said hey there little one he had a funny twinkle in his eye he asked her why she was so lonely and she told him about the knob the old man grinned put his hand on the knob and started to spin it suddenly the knob opened inside was a box of chocolates for me nina said amazed the old man nodded and they both laughed together from that day on they both went to the tree every day and had lots of fun

lily liked to learn new things she learned how to count how to draw and how to sing but she wanted to learn more she wanted to learn how to climb a mountain one day she asked her dad if he could take her to a mountain he said yes but he warned her that it was hard and dangerous he said she had to be brave and careful lily said she was brave and careful she packed her bag with water snacks and a hat they drove to the mountain and started to climb lily followed her dad and held his hand she saw rocks trees and birds she felt the sun the wind and the sweat she heard the sound of her breath her steps and her dads voice she learned how to find a good path how to balance and how to rest the higher they climbed the harder it got lily felt tired thirsty and scared she wanted to go back but she also wanted to reach the top she remembered that she was brave and careful she looked at her dad and smiled he smiled back and said they were almost there they reached the top and saw the whole world lily felt happy proud and amazed she learned how to climb a mountain she hugged her dad and thanked him he hugged her back and said he was proud of her they learned that they could do anything if they were brave and careful

john saw something cute on the other side of the playground he wanted to know what it was he ran to the other side and saw a prize he wanted it he ran to the prize but then he saw that someone else was coming for it too john said to the other person i want the prize the other person said i want it too john thought for a moment then he said i know we can both have it we can share the prize the other person agreed and they shared the prize they were both happy john was glad he got to keep a part of the cute prize
tom and sam are brothers they like to play in the park but the park has a big road next to it the road is dangerous there are many cars and trucks that go fast and make noise one day tom and sam are playing with a ball the ball is red and shiny they throw the ball to each other and catch it they have fun but then the ball goes too far it goes over the fence and onto the road tom runs after the ball he does not look at the road he does not see the cars and trucks he only sees the ball sam sees tom run he is scared he shouts to tom tom stop come back the road is dangerous but tom does not hear sam he hears the ball he reaches the ball he picks it up he smiles he turns around he sees a big truck the truck is coming fast the truck is loud the truck does not see tom sam sees the truck he shouts louder tom watch out the truck is coming but it is too late the truck hits tom tom falls down the ball flies away sam runs to tom he cries he calls for help help help someone help tom but no one comes the park is empty the road is quiet tom does not move tom does not breathe tom is gone sam is alone he is sad he is sorry he wishes he had listened to his mom his mom had given him an order boys do not play near the road the road is dangerous stay in the park be careful but they did not listen they did not obey they did not follow the order they played near the road they were not careful they were in danger and now tom is dead and sam is alive but he wishes he was not
once upon a time there was a young girl called ann ann was three years old one day ann wanted to go for a march with her friend sammy but the only problem was that ann didnt have any shoes to wear ann was so embarrassed that she couldnt walk with sammy but sammys mom was nice she said she would lend ann a pair of shoes so she could join the march ann was so happy she put on the shoes held sammys hand and went for a march the two of them had so much fun walking talking and laughing together they really enjoyed their march at the end of the day ann and sammy said goodbye ann was grateful for the shoes that sammys mom had lent her ann was no longer embarrassed she was happy and content

once upon a time in a small house there lived a cat named kitty kitty loved to bathe in the sun one day while bathing she smelled a nice herb she followed the smell and found a big garden in the garden there were many herbs and plants kitty felt very happy in the garden kitty met a dog named doggy doggy was very alert he said kitty be careful some herbs are not good for you but kitty did not listen she wanted to eat all the herbs doggy tried to stop her but she did not care kitty ate the herbs and soon felt sick she wished she had listened to doggy now kitty learned a lesson she should have been alert and listened to her friend the moral of the story is to listen to others when they try to help you

once upon a time there was a sunny day and bobby and his friends were playing in the park bobby liked to run around and around and laugh suddenly everything went quiet and still bobby noticed that it got very cold and it was so quiet you could hear the leaves rustling in the wind bobby was scared because it felt like everything was frozen his friends were all standing still like statues and bobby couldnt move either he heard a loud crack that made him jump he was so scared that he closed his eyes tight when he opened them again he saw that the sun was shining his friends were laughing and it was warm again bobby was so happy and he laughed with his friends they all agreed that it was strange and loud noise that had made them freeze they all played and had a great time in the park that day bobby was so glad that the loud noise hadnt stopped them from having fun

once upon a time there was a little girl called lola lola was very hungry so she went to find something to eat she knew there was some rice in the cupboard so she decided to go and get it when lola opened the cupboard she found a big bowl of white rice she took it out and put it on the table then she got a spoon from the drawer and began to eat but as she was eating it became very quiet lola looked around but she couldnt see anyone then she heard a noise coming from outside the window when she looked out she saw a bird sitting on the branch of a nearby tree the bird was chirping its beautiful song lola stopped eating and just listened the birds song made her feel very happy and she decided to sing along with it she sang a quiet song and the bird sang with her when she finished singing lola took one last scoop of the rice before putting the bowl away then she went back to playing with her toys feeling very happy
once upon a time there was a cool otter who lived alone at the bottom of the river every single day the otter had lots of fun swimming in the water eating fish and playing with its friends one day while the otter was swimming it saw a little boy and his mom looking down into the water the boy was so excited to see the otter and shouted look mommy an otter the otter smiled and said hi would you like me to show you something cool the little boy was so excited he jumped and said yes please so the otter jumped up out of the water did a big somersault and then came back down with a splash the little boy and his mom laughed as the otter swam back up to them that was so cool said the little boy the otter smiled said goodbye and swam away the little boy and his mom waved goodbye and continued to laugh even after the otter was gone

mark was a boy who liked to act he liked to make funny faces and voices and pretend to be different animals and people he had a big box of costumes and props that he used for his shows he liked to act for his mom and dad his sister and brother and his friends one day he decided to act for his teacher and his classmates at school he brought his box of costumes and props and asked his teacher if he could do a show for everyone his teacher said yes but he had to wait until after lunch mark was very happy and grateful he thanked his teacher and put his box in a corner after lunch mark got his box and went to the front of the class he put on a hat and a coat and said hello i am a detective and i am going to solve a mystery he took out a magnifying glass and a notebook and started to look around the room he said hmm i see some clues there is a red crayon on the floor a cookie wrapper on the desk and a wet spot on the rug who did this mess he pointed his magnifying glass at different classmates and asked them questions he said did you do this did you do this did you do this some of the classmates laughed but some of them felt scared and angry they did not like mark accusing them of making a mess they did not like mark acting like a detective one of the classmates sam got very mad he did not like mark at all he thought mark was silly and annoying he wanted mark to stop acting and go away he grabbed marks hat and coat and threw them on the floor he said you are not a detective you are a dummy you are a bad actor and a bad friend go away and leave us alone mark felt very sad and hurt he did not understand why sam was so mean to him he did not mean to make anyone upset he just wanted to act and have fun he picked up his hat and coat and his box and ran out of the class he cried and cried he wished he never acted for his teacher and his classmates he wished he never brought his box of costumes and props he wished he never liked to act he wished he had no friends he wished he had no mark

once there was a brave frog he was looking for a home he hopped and hopped for days suddenly he came to a big swamp he felt lonely but he decided to explore it as he hopped around he saw something strange something seemed to happen in the middle of the swamp he was curious he hopped closer and saw a big orange snake the snake seemed angry the frog was scared but he wanted to find out what was happening he hopped closer and saw a pond nearby thats when he noticed a small blue frog it was in the water and the orange snake was trying to get it the brave frog knew he had to help the little blue frog he jumped right into the pond the snake was taken by surprise and quickly left the small blue frog thanked the brave frog the brave frog now had a new home and he wasnt lonely anymore he had a new friend in the swamp together they hopped around and explored the swamp they made sure the orange snake never returned
johnny was walking in the park and it was a very cold day he felt the icy wind on his cheeks he shivered and his teeth chattered johnny stopped and looked up he saw a big tree with lots of peppers growing over it they were a bright red color and hanging off the branches johnny smiled he loved peppers he picked a pepper off the tree and put it in his pocket then he ran to the pond nearby he saw lots of ducks swimming around and he smiled johnny dipped his finger in the pond and it was very very cold icy cold he giggled and all the ducks started to quack he put his hands in the icy cold water and gave the ducks a little splash johnny was so happy and he laughed and smiled he stayed for a bit more watching the ducks swim around and around then he went home with a big smile on his face his pocket full of peppers

once upon a time there was a big family of rabbits they lived in a cozy home in the forest the rabbits were very happy together and loved to play and eat carrots one day a new rabbit came to their home her name was rosie and she was very envious of the other rabbits she wanted to have all the carrots for herself and didnt want to share with anyone the other rabbits noticed that rosie was not very friendly and they decided to separate from her they knew that it was not nice to be envious and selfish they wanted to teach rosie a lesson and show her the importance of kindness and sharing after some time rosie realized her mistake and apologized to the other rabbits she learned that it was better to be friends and share the carrots from that day on they all played together and shared their food the rabbits lived happily ever after
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily one day she was playing with her toys in the living room when she saw her mommy put a cookie in the cupboard she wanted the cookie so she went to the cupboard to get it but when she opened the cupboard the cookie was gone it had vanished into thin air lily was very sad that she couldnt find the cookie but then her mommy came over and saw her looking in the cupboard dont worry lily she said i put the cookie in a different place lets go find it together they looked all around the kitchen and finally found the cookie on the counter lily was so happy she took a big bite of the cookie and it was very dry so she drank some milk to help it go down from then on she always made sure to ask her mommy where she put the cookies so they wouldnt vanish again
tom and sam were brothers who liked to play in the woods they found a big shelter made of sticks and leaves they thought it was a good place to hide and have fun lets go inside and pretend we are bears tom said ok but be careful it looks old and weak sam said they crawled into the shelter and made growling noises they felt cozy and warm they did not see the bugs and worms that lived in the shelter they did not smell the rot that filled the air suddenly they heard a loud crack the shelter collapsed on them they screamed and tried to get out but they were trapped the sticks and leaves were too heavy and sharp they hurt their skin and eyes they felt the rot and the bugs and the worms on them they were scared and in pain help help they cried but no one heard them no one came to save them they were alone in the terrible shelter they wished they never went inside they wished they listened to sam they wished they were home but it was too late they were stuck in the rot they were going to die
one day a girl named sue wanted to make a new friend she went to the park and saw a boy named tim tim was playing with a big scary bug sue was scared but she wanted to be brave and make friends with tim sue went to her house and found a big jug she had an idea she would catch a bug in the jug and show it to tim then maybe tim would want to be her friend sue went outside and looked for a bug to catch sue found a bug and put it in the jug she went back to the park and showed tim the bug in the jug tim was happy to see the bug and they both played with it sue was not scared anymore sue and tim became good friends and they had fun playing with bugs together

lily and ben were friends who liked to play outside they had a lovely wagon that they shared they took turns to pull the wagon and put things in it like rocks leaves and toys they had fun with their wagon one day they saw a big hill near their house they wanted to go down the hill with their wagon lily said lets go ben it will be fast and fun ben said ok lily but we have to be careful the hill is steep and the wagon is heavy they pushed their wagon to the top of the hill they climbed in and held on tight lily said ready ben ben said ready lily they let go of the brakes and the wagon started to roll down the hill at first they laughed and screamed with joy the wagon was fast and fun they felt the wind in their hair and the sun on their faces they saw the trees and the flowers and the birds they were happy but then the wagon went too fast it bumped and shook and rattled it went out of control lily and ben were scared they tried to stop the wagon but they couldnt they saw a big rock in their way they shouted help help but no one heard them no one came to help them the wagon hit the rock and crashed lily and ben flew out of the wagon and landed on the ground they were hurt and bleeding they cried and cried their lovely wagon was broken and smashed their rocks leaves and toys were scattered and lost they had no fun with their wagon the moral of the story is be careful when you play with your wagon dont go down a big hill with your wagon it can be dangerous and hurt you listen to your parents and follow the rules they know what is best for you
the sun was shining brightly on the stream frogs were hopping happily around as bugs flew by sammy was sitting by the stream his hands were busy building a castle in the sand he didnt notice his big brother joe coming up behind him until he heard joes voice whoa there sammy what are you doing asked joe sammy was surprised but he answered making a castle is the stream trust to play in asked joe sammy thought for a moment then smiled and said yes i trust it so joe and sammy played in the stream sammy was really busy catching frogs and making little boats to float downstream joe showed him how to make bridges with twigs and rocks when it was time to go home sammy was sad but joe told him dont worry ill come back soon and we can play in the stream again sammy smiled he knew he could trust joe to keep his promise

lily and max were playing in the garden they liked to look at the flowers and the bugs lily saw a purple flower that was very pretty she wanted to smell it look max a purple flower she said i want to smell it she ran to the flower and bent down but she did not see the bee that was on the flower the bee was busy getting nectar it did not like to be disturbed max saw the bee and got scared he knew that bees could sting he wanted to stop lily lily no he shouted there is a bee it can hurt you he ran after lily and tried to pull her away he urged her to leave the flower alone but lily did not listen she was too curious she reached out her hand and touched the flower the bee felt her and got angry it flew up and buzzed around her head lily screamed and dropped the flower she ran back to max and hugged him ow ow ow she cried the bee is mad it wants to sting me max hugged her back and tried to calm her down he looked around and saw the bee fly away he was relieved its okay lily he said the bee is gone it wont sting you but you should not touch the flowers with bees they dont like it they need the flowers for food lily nodded and sniffed she was sorry for making the bee mad she learned her lesson im sorry max she said i wont touch the flowers with bees again ill just look at them they are still pretty max smiled and kissed her cheek thats good lily he said lets go and find some other flowers maybe we can find some yellow ones or pink ones or blue ones there are many colors of flowers and they all smell nice lily smiled and wiped her tears she took maxs hand and followed him they went to look for more flowers but they were careful to avoid the bees they wanted to be friends with the bees not enemies

once upon a time there was a big white seal the seal lived in the ocean with all of his friends one day the seal wanted to play with his friends but he couldnt find them he looked and looked but they were nowhere to be found the seal decided to raise his head up high and look around suddenly he saw his friends playing in the distance he quickly swam over to them and joined in on the fun they played and laughed for hours until the sun began to set as the seal swam back home he felt happy and content he knew that even though he couldnt find his friends at first he was able to raise his head and see them from afar the end

tom is a fat sheep who lives on a farm he likes to eat grass and play with his friends he has a lot of wool on his body which keeps him warm and soft one day a man comes to the farm with a big machine he wants to cut the wool from the sheep and take it away tom is scared of the machine he does not want to lose his wool he runs away from the man and hides behind a tree he sees his friend lily a small sheep who is also hiding they talk to each other tom what are we going to do lily asks the man will find us and cut our wool i dont know lily i wish we could save our wool it is ours not his tom says maybe we can trick him maybe we can make him think we are not sheep lily says how can we do that tom asks lily looks around and sees a pile of hay she has an idea come on tom follow me she says she leads tom to the hay and tells him to roll in it they cover themselves with hay and look like big balls they stay very still and quiet the man comes to the tree and looks for the sheep he does not see them he only sees the hay he thinks they ran away he shrugs and leaves with his machine tom and lily peek out from the hay and smile they saved their wool they are happy they shake off the hay and run back to their friends they tell them their story and they all laugh they are proud of tom and lily they are brave sheep

once upon a time there was a little frog named freddy freddy lived in a pond with his friends one day it started to rain really hard and the pond began to flood freddy and his friends had to hop to higher ground to stay safe as they were hopping freddy noticed that his friend lily was feeling uncomfortable her feet were getting wet and she was shivering freddy decided to help her he found a big leaf and held it over her head to keep her dry lily blinked her big green eyes at freddy and smiled she felt much better now that she was dry and comfortable freddy was happy that he could help his friend they all waited on the higher ground until the rain stopped and the flood went away from that day on freddy and lily were the best of friends

once upon a time there was a bird that lived in the sky its feathers were soft and its wings were strong the bird liked to soar through the sky feeling the wind and the suns warmth on its wings one day the bird saw something wonderful on the ground below it there was a meadow full of beautiful flowers and small animals the bird wanted to find out more about this new life on the ground so it flew down to take a closer look the bird was amazed at what it saw the animals ran around and the flowers seemed to be very happy the bird knew that it wanted to stay in this new place and experience the beauty of life the bird spent all day in the meadow and when it was time for it to leave it was feeling very sleepy with big slow wingbeats the bird rose up into the sky and the meadow disappeared from view the birds life had changed from then on it was not just soaring but experiencing life from both the sky and the ground

once upon a time there was a little boy his name was jack and he wanted to learn how to play the flute his parents bought him a fake flute but jack was not sure how to play it he tried to put the fake flute to his lips but the sound was terrible jack struggled every day to learn how to make real music with his flute one day he heard his neighbor playing beautiful notes with her flute he didnt know what they were but he wanted to learn how to make them too he stared at her and listened carefully trying his best to remember what she was doing jack spent hours and hours practicing to make the same notes he used the fake flute but he could not make real music he was getting so frustrated he wanted to give up then something happened on one particular day he finally made a real music he couldnt believe it jack was so happy and proud of himself it wasnt easy but he had finally done it now jack has become a great flute player and all it took was hard work and a little bit of struggle
once upon a time there was a big worm who lived in a garden he loved to wriggle and squirm in the dirt all day long one day he saw a big apple on a tree and wanted to eat it but the apple was too high up and he couldnt reach it the worm thought and thought about how he could get the apple suddenly he saw a big leaf on the ground he thought he could use it to climb the tree so he crawled onto the leaf and started to climb but as he climbed the leaf slipped and he fell down to the ground the worm was sad and frustrated but then he had an idea he crawled over to a group of ants and asked for their help the ants were happy to help and together they climbed up the tree and got the apple the worm was so happy and grateful that he shared the apple with all the ants from that day on they were all friends and helped each other whenever they needed it
once there was a bird named tiki tiki loved to soar in the sky and feel the warm wind below its wings one day tiki was gliding through the sky and saw a cherry tree below tiki smelled the sweet scent of the cherry and wanted to have one tiki flew to the cherry tree and perched on a branch tiki stretched out its wings to reach the cherry suddenly a gust of wind blew and the branch started to break tiki tried to flap its wings to stay in the sky but it wasnt strong enough tiki fell to the ground and its wings were broken tiki tried to fly but it couldnt it didnt even flutter its wings tiki sadly looked up and saw a large bird gliding in the sky hey said tiki can you help me im stuck here on the ground and cant fly anymore the large bird scoffed flying high is only for big birds like me it sneered you are too small to soar in the skies tiki sadly looked away and never tried to fly again so its wings stayed broken and it stayed on the ground
anna loved to bake cakes with her mom she liked to mix the flour the eggs the sugar and the butter in a big bowl she liked to pour the batter in a round pan and put it in the oven she liked to smell the sweet aroma of the cake as it baked but most of all she liked to taste the cake when it was done one day anna decided to bake a cake by herself she wanted to surprise her mom and dad she remembered the ingredients and the steps but she did not measure them carefully she put too much sugar too little butter and forgot the eggs she also added some salt pepper and ketchup because she thought they would make the cake more colorful and spicy when the cake was ready anna took it out of the oven and put it on a plate she was very proud of her work she called her mom and dad to the kitchen and said look i made a cake for you do you want to taste it her mom and dad smiled and thanked her for her effort they each took a small bite of the cake and tried not to make a face the cake was very sweet very dry and very weird they did not like it at all but they did not want to hurt annas feelings they said wow anna this is a very interesting cake you are very creative and brave to try new things but you know sometimes it is better to follow a recipe and measure the ingredients that way the cake will be more delicious and more balanced do you want to learn how to bake a cake with us next time anna nodded and said yes please i want to learn how to bake a cake like you im sorry i did not mean to make a bad cake i just wanted to make you happy her mom and dad hugged her and said we are happy anna because you are our daughter and we love you you are very intelligent and kind and we are proud of you but remember not everything that looks good tastes good and not everyone who tastes your cake will be as nice as us some people might be mean and judge you so be careful and listen to your mom and dad okay anna said okay mom and dad i love you too and i love cake can we bake a cake together now they said of course anna lets bake a cake together and lets taste it together too the end

once upon a time there was a small mouse his name was tony and he was very fussy about his appearance every day he would clean his fur very carefully and make sure he looked his best one day when he was out exploring he came across a very big trunk he realized it was someones luggage and started to chew on it just as he was about to take a big bite a voice shouted wait it was a young girl who had been watching him from afar the girl said to tony it is not polite to chew peoples luggage without asking if you had been more modest maybe you could have asked me for a snack instead tony was embarrassed but also learnt an important lesson from that day on tony was always very careful when it came to taking things that were not his he asked people for permission before he shared something with them and made sure that he was being polite
once upon a time there was a turtle who lived in the sea he was very excited to explore his new home he zoomed all around swimming near the brightly coloured coral and beautiful shells he peered into every nook and cranny of the ocean floor one day he found a secret cave when he went inside he saw a sparkling white shell he was so excited that he picked it up he decided that this would be his special shell it became his best friend and they went on lots of fun adventures together they swam all around the ocean zooming from one end to another they would laugh and giggle as they explored all the lovely sights one day they even met some dolphins and waved to them then it was time for the turtle to go home but wherever he went he made sure to bring his special shell with him because it was always a reminder of the many exciting adventures that he had experienced
once upon a time there was a brave pink rabbit called bob bob was a gentle creature and he spent most of his days observing the world around him one day bob had a funny urge to try something crazy he felt something was telling him to do something wild like hopping up to the sun bob thought this was a silly thought and dismissed it but then something strange happened as bob continued to observe he noticed a cloud up in the sky slowly moving directly over the sun perhaps this was bob tms sign he took a deep breath and decided that he should try something he never did before so bob hopped as hard as he could and jumped right on top of the cloud he was shocked he was so high up for a moment bob felt like he could touch the sun after a while bob started to feel scared and had to quickly make his way back down once he was back in his little home bob learnt an important lesson he didn tmt have to do something wild and crazy to have an exciting adventure he could just observe and appreciate the world around him bob was satisfied that he had learnt a valuable lesson and happily hopped off to bed

once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy timmy was a very ordinary boy he liked to play with his toys and eat snacks but one day timmys mom told him they were going on a trip in their car timmy loved going on trips in the car because it was so much fun to go fast as they were driving timmy saw a big truck on the road the truck was going very fast and timmys mom told him to be careful timmy didnt listen and he kept looking at the truck suddenly the truck stopped and timmys mom had to brake really hard timmy cried because he was scared after that timmys mom told him to always listen to her and not to look at other cars while they were driving timmy learned his lesson and he never cried again in the car he also knew that speed could be dangerous and he should always be careful
once upon a time there was a big lion the lion lived in the jungle with his friends the monkeys and the birds one day the lion found an axe in the jungle the lion thought the axe was charming and decided to keep it the next day the lion heard a loud roar it was coming from the other side of the jungle the lion and his friends went to see what was happening they found a big bear who was very angry the bear was roaring because he had lost his axe the lion remembered he had found an axe and showed it to the bear the bear was very happy and thanked the lion the bear stopped roaring and became friendly with the lion and his friends from that day on they all played together in the jungle
lily and sam were playing a game they had cards with animals on them they had to match the cards with the same animals lily had a lot of cards sam had only a few cards look i have more cards than you lily said i am going to win the game and get the trophy sam felt sad he wanted to win the game and get the trophy too he looked at his cards he saw a card with a lion on it he remembered where he saw another card with a lion on it he flipped it over it was a match yay i found a match sam said he put the cards in his pile he looked at lily she had no more cards he had one more card than her i win i win sam said he jumped up and down he grabbed the trophy it was shiny and big he was very happy lily was not happy she cried she wanted the trophy too she looked at the trophy it was empty there was nothing inside it hey this trophy is empty lily said there is no prize in it sam looked at the trophy he saw that it was empty he felt sorry for lily he had an idea maybe we can share the trophy sam said we can take turns to have it and we can put something in it like a sticker or a candy or a toy lily stopped crying she liked sams idea she smiled okay we can share the trophy lily said that sounds fun what do you want to put in it first sam thought for a moment he had a sticker of a lion he liked lions he gave it to lily here you can have this sticker sam said it matches your card you can put it in the trophy lily took the sticker she thanked sam she put it in the trophy it looked nice thank you sam lily said you are a good friend do you want to play another game sam nodded he was happy too he liked lily he liked playing games with her yes lets play another game sam said maybe we can both win this time

year they wanted to do something different they asked their mom and dad if they could go to the fair the fair had many rides games and vendors vendors were people who sold things like food toys and tickets mom and dad said yes but they had to be careful and stay together at the fair ben and lily saw a vendor who had a big wheel the wheel had many colors and numbers the vendor said spin the wheel and win a prize only one dollar per spin ben and lily wanted to try but they did not have any money they looked at their mom and dad who smiled and gave them each a dollar ben went first he gave his dollar to the vendor and spun the wheel the wheel went round and round and stopped at the number seven the vendor said you win a teddy bear congratulations he handed ben a soft and fluffy teddy bear ben was very happy and hugged his teddy bear lily went next she gave her dollar to the vendor and spun the wheel the wheel went round and round and stopped at the number ten the vendor said you win the jackpot you are very lucky he opened a big chest and took out a lot of money he said this is all yours you are very wealthy now he gave lily a big bag of money lily was very surprised and did not know what to do with the money ben and lily looked at each other and then at their mom and dad they did not need the money they had everything they wanted they had a cake balloons and presents they had their friends and their family they had each other they decided to give the money back to the vendor and share their prizes with their friends they said thank you but we dont need the money we have enough we want to celebrate our birthday with our friends can we give them some teddy bears and some tickets for the rides the vendor was very touched by their kindness and generosity he said of course you can you are very sweet and smart happy birthday ben and lily he gave them some more teddy bears and some tickets for the rides he also gave them a big hug ben and lily thanked the vendor and ran to their friends they gave them the teddy bears and the tickets and said lets have fun lets celebrate they all went to the rides the games and the food they laughed and played and ate they had the best birthday ever
once upon a time there was a big heavy box inside the box there was a yummy waffle the waffle was very special because it could talk it was a cold day and the waffle was feeling very cold it wanted to find a warm place so it would not freeze the waffle jumped out of the heavy box and started to look for a warm place it found a big warm house the waffle went inside the house and saw a nice warm fire the waffle was very happy because it would not freeze now it sat close to the fire and started to feel warm and cozy but then a big hungry dog came into the room the dog saw the waffle and thought it looked very yummy the waffle was scared and tried to run away but it was too late the dog ate the waffle and the waffle was gone forever the waffle could not find a warm place to stay and it had a bad ending

once upon a time in a small village there lived a little girl named lily lily loved to play outside but she was scared of the dark when the sun went down she would run inside her house and hide under her bed one day lily found a magical stone that could glow she was so happy that she could play outside even when it was dark the glowing stone made her feel safe and brave she showed her friends the stone and they all played together in the dark but one night lilys friend tom found it difficult to see his way home lily shared her glowing stone with tom and they walked home together from that day on lily learned that sharing her light with others made the dark less scary for everyone the moral of the story is that when we share our gifts with others we can make difficult things easier and bring happiness to everyone
once upon a time there was a busy hunter he lived in a small house near the woods every day he went to the woods to look for food he had a big dog who helped him find animals one day the hunter and his dog saw a big tree with lots of fruits the hunter wanted to cut the fruits down to eat he took out his knife and cut the fruits from the tree the dog was very happy to see the fruits and wagged its tail they took the fruits home and ate them the hunter and his dog were very happy they played together and had lots of fun the busy hunter always made sure they had food to eat and a warm place to sleep and they lived happily ever after
once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to play outside in her garden she had a small garden with pretty flowers and yummy vegetables every day she would water her garden and watch it grow one day lilys friend came over and asked if she could have some of her vegetables but lily said no because she was being selfish her friend was sad and went home that night lily thought about what she had done and realized that it wasnt nice to be selfish the next day lily went to her friends house with a big basket of vegetables from her garden her friend was so happy and they played together in the garden from that day on lily learned that sharing is important and her garden continued to grow with love and kindness
ben was a big boy who liked to play with his toys he had many cars trucks and trains that he kept in his pocket he always took them with him when he went outside he liked to make them zoom and honk and crash one day he saw a new toy in the store it was a shiny red fire truck with a ladder and a siren he wanted it very much but his mom said no she said he had enough toys and he should be happy with what he had ben was angry and sad he decided to take the fire truck anyway he waited until his mom was not looking and put it in his pocket he ran out of the store with the fire truck in his pocket he thought he was very clever and nobody saw him but he was wrong a man who worked in the store saw him and followed him he called his mom and told her what ben did his mom was very upset and disappointed she came to get him and made him give back the fire truck she said he was naughty and he had to say sorry she also said he had to give away some of his toys to other kids who had none ben felt very ashamed and sorry he realized he had been greedy and dishonest he learned that stealing was wrong and he should be grateful for what he had he said sorry to the man and his mom he also gave away some of his cars trucks and trains to other kids who were happy to have them he felt better and promised to be good and never steal again he learned that the best things in life are not in his pocket but in his heart

once upon a time a brave girl named lilly went for a walk in the woods it was a wild place full of tall trees and deep shadows she wore her sunglasses so she could see better suddenly she heard a noise in the bushes she shivered feeling scared but then out of the bushes came a very small deer it was a baby deer and lilly knew it must be looking for its mum lilly felt brave enough to check on the baby deer she saw that it looked very tired and cold what should i do lilly thought then she remembered her sunglasses she took them off and put them over the deer the deer stopped shivering and soon it fell asleep lilly stayed with the deer until its mother returned with a happy neigh the mother and baby deer went back into the woods and were never seen again lilly was very happy that she had helped the little deer she put her sunglasses back on feeling proud and wild

once upon a time there was a small and humble tiger who lived in a beautiful forest he was very eager to find a solution to the problem he had which was his missing tail so one day he decided to ask all of the animals living in the forest for help the first creature he found was a mouse hole he asked the mouse inside the hole to help him but the mouse said he couldnt then the tiger asked a squirrel and an owl but neither of them could solve his problem finally the tiger asked a wise old elephant for help the elephant smiled and told him that he knew the answer he said that the tiger could find his tail if he searched in an old tree near the edge of the forest so the tiger set off to the old tree and sure enough he found his missing tail he was so relieved to have his tail back again and he thanked the wise old elephant for his help and kindness from then on the tiger was a much happier creature and he always remembered to stay humble and respectful

tim and tom were two squirrels who lived in a big park they liked to play and find nuts to eat one day they saw a big tree with many nuts on it they ran to the tree and started to climb look at all these nuts tim said we can have a feast yes and we can store some for winter tom said but we have to be careful there are other animals who want nuts too they reached the top of the tree and began to pick the nuts they were so happy and busy that they did not notice a wild cat sneaking up on them the cat saw the squirrels and licked its lips it jumped on the tree and tried to catch them help help tim and tom shouted there is a wild cat they dropped their nuts and ran down the tree the cat followed them but it was not good at climbing it slipped and fell to the ground it hurt its paw and ran away tim and tom were safe but they had lost their nuts they felt sad and hungry they looked around and saw a group of children playing in the park the children had a basket of nuts that they had brought for a picnic they saw the squirrels and smiled hello squirrels one of the children said do you want some nuts the children threw some nuts to tim and tom the squirrels were surprised and happy they ate the nuts and thanked the children thank you children tim and tom said you are very kind and generous the children were happy too they liked to share and make friends they clapped their hands and applauded the squirrels yay squirrels the children said you are very brave and smart tim and tom learned a lesson that day they learned that nuts are good but friends are better they learned that sharing is caring and that kindness is rewarded they learned that wild cats are bad but children are good they learned to applaud the good and avoid the bad

once upon a time there was a brown dog named max max loved to play with junk he found in the park one day max found an old can and started to play with it he barked and jumped around with the can in his mouth suddenly a little girl walked by and saw max playing she clapped her hands and said good job max max felt happy and wagged his tail the little girl continued to applaud as max continued to play with the can from that day on max would always look for junk to play with in the park and every time someone would pass by and see him playing they would applaud and max would feel proud the end
once upon a time there were two friends joe and sally they loved playing together and always had fun one day they were walking in the park and noticed a tall tree joe looked up and saw a big nest in the branches he asked sally lets get it sally wanted to try too so she asked joe what they should do joe had an idea he said lets make a rope to climb up sally was excited and thought it was a great plan the pair used some pieces of string and tied them together to make a rope they were very creative and made a strong rope joe tested the rope to make sure it was safe and then used it to climb up the tree and into the nest he found some eggs and then made a special request to sally he called down can you bring me a basket to carry them in please sally ran off to get a basket and came back with it joe carefully packed the eggs in the basket and the two friends carried them home they kept the eggs in the basket until they hatched and then they had the cutest baby birds ever

once upon a time there was a charming bear he had a special cooler that was filled with his favourite treats one day he wanted to take a break from his busy day and settle down in the park he found a nice spot and opened up his cooler for a snack but when he opened it a mean badger was already inside the badger had sneaked into the cooler and taken all of the bears snacks the bear was so angry that he started to chase the badger the badger was fast and the bear couldnt catch him the bear was so frustrated that he started to roar and growl just then a wise old skunk came along he saw the bears cooler and knew what had happened the skunk called out to the badger to come back the badger was scared and ran back to the cooler he put all of the snacks back where they belonged and ran away the bear was happy that all of his snacks were back in the cooler he thanked the skunk for helping him then settled down for his snack the bear had a very quiet and peaceful rest of the day

once upon a time there was a boy named timmy timmy had a wallet with all of his money in it he loved his wallet because it was his favorite color blue one day timmy went to the park to play while he was playing he saw an interesting bird he wanted to get closer to the bird so he put his wallet down and walked away timmys mom saw him put his wallet down and she told him timmy always keep your wallet with you you dont want to lose it timmy replied but mom the bird was so interesting i wanted to see it up close his mom said i understand that but you should never remove your wallet from your pocket timmy learned his lesson and promised to always keep his wallet safe he realized that its important to keep your things close to you so you dont lose them the moral of the story is to always be careful with your belongings and never remove them from your sight
once upon a time there was a girl named jane who had a pet it was a furry dog called rusty every morning jane would wake up early and play with rusty in the backyard she would whisper to him and tell him lots of stories rusty always seemed to understand and listen eagerly jane would then make sure he was ready for their daily walk around the block before they had breakfast sometimes jane would get so excited shouting and playing with rusty that he would bark out loud but when it was time for her to go inside for dinner she would just whisper to him softly because she knew he always liked that he would lay his head on his paws and listen intently to her until she finished it was the perfect way to end the day
one day lily and tom went to the park with their mom they saw a big pond with many ducks and doves lily liked the doves because they were light and pretty tom liked the ducks because they made funny noises look mom a dove lily said pointing to a bird on a branch can i feed it sure honey here are some seeds mom said giving lily a handful lily walked slowly to the dove and held out her hand the dove looked at her and flew down to eat the seeds wow it likes you tom said watching from a distance he wanted to feed a duck so he ran to the edge of the pond and threw some bread a big duck saw the bread and swam to get it quack quack the duck said nibbling the bread tom laughed and threw more bread the duck was happy and followed him look mom a duck tom said waving to his mom can i pet it be careful sweetie ducks can bite mom said walking to tom she helped him stroke the ducks feathers gently the duck seemed to like it and wagged its tail wow it likes you too lily said joining them she wanted to pet the duck too so she reached out her hand the duck saw her and quacked loudly quack quack the duck said snapping at lilys hand lily was scared and pulled back her hand she cried and ran to her mom ow ow ow lily said sobbing the duck bit me im sorry honey are you okay mom said hugging lily she looked at her hand and saw a small red mark its just a scratch dont worry the duck didnt mean to hurt you it was just protecting its food sorry lily i didnt know the duck was mean tom said feeling sorry for his sister he gave her a hug and a kiss do you want to play with the doves again okay tom thank you lily said wiping her tears she smiled and took toms hand they walked back to the branch where the doves were they fed them some more seeds and watched them fly and jump the doves were nice and gentle they made lily and tom happy mom smiled and took a picture of them they had a fun day at the park
tom and lily were twins who liked to play outside one day they saw a big tree with red fruits in their neighbors yard they wanted to try the fruits but they did not ask their neighbor first they climbed over the fence and picked some fruits from the tree they took a bite and made a face the fruits were bitter and sour not sweet and juicy they spit them out and threw them on the ground yuck these fruits are bad tom said lets go back to our yard and play with our toys lily said but their neighbor saw them and was angry he came out and shouted at them hey you two what are you doing in my yard you have no right to take my fruits without asking those are not for eating they are for making jam you have wasted them and made a mess go away and dont come back tom and lily were scared and ran away they felt sorry and ashamed they learned a lesson that day they should not order things that are not theirs they should respect other peoples property and ask before they take they should also be grateful for what they have and not be greedy for what they dont

once there was a 3 year old boy named jack every day jack liked to help his mom in the kitchen today jack wanted to bake something special for his mom for her birthday in the kitchen jack found some flour and sugar and other ingredients he needed he mixed them together in a big bowl then he started to stir the mixture he stirred it round and round until it was thick and creamy after he was done stirring the mixture jack put it in the oven he set the oven to the right temperature and waited for it to finish baking when the baking was done jack could smell the delicious aroma coming from his cake he carefully took take it out of the oven and saw that it was a perfect fit he let it cool down once it was finally cooled down jack added some decorations he put a beautiful flower on the top of the cake he also put some icing on the top and sides of the cake finally jack put the cake on a comfortable chair next to his moms bed he put his heel right next to the cake so she could see it when she woke up jack was very proud of his special cake he could not wait to see his moms reaction when she saw the cake

the cup and the doll to her room look doll this is wine it is a drink for grown ups you can try some but only a little bit okay lily said to her doll she held the cup to the dolls mouth and pretended to make her drink mmm do you like it it is sweet and sour but then lily heard a knock on the door it was her mom she opened the door and saw lily and the doll with the cup of wine she was very angry wine spilled on the floor she started to cry and hugged her doll im sorry mom i just wanted to teach my doll how to drink wine i didnt know it was bad lily said between sobs her mom sighed and picked up lily and the doll she took them to the bathroom and cleaned them up she also cleaned the floor and threw away the cup lily wine is not for children it can make you sick and hurt your body you once upon a time there was a big reef in the ocean it was big and bumpy and made the water sparkle one day a hungry fish swam up to the reef and asked if it could have a snack no way shouted the reef you need to swim away the fish was not happy but it knew it had to go it turned around and kicked its tail to swim away but it was so hungry suddenly a crab came from behind the reef and said hey i know you tmre hungry but why don tmt you try another way to get food the fish was very happy to hear this it thanked the crab and started to look for something to eat after a while it found a bunch of tasty seaweed and gobbled it up the fish was very happy and thanked the crab again it then swam away full and content
once upon a time there was a little boy named timmy timmy loved to play outside with his friends one day while they were playing they saw a monster the monster was big and scary and it started to run after them timmy and his friends were very scared but they knew they had to be brave they decided to run away from the monster as fast as they could they ran and ran until they were far away from the monster after they were safe timmy and his friends talked about what had happened they decided that they wanted to be famous for being brave and running away from the monster so they told everyone in their town about their adventure soon everyone knew about timmy and his friends and how they had run away from the scary monster
once upon a time there was a girl called molly she was three years old and loved learning new things one day she saw something new she did not know what it was called it was a big green thing she asked her mother what is that thing her mother smiled and said its called a plant would you like to learn about it molly was very excited and said yes please her mother introduced her to the plant and explained how to take care of it she said you need to water it every day so it will stay healthy molly really wanted to make her new plant happy every day she would water the plant and scream out happiness whenever she saw it grow she was so happy when she saw the plant grow bigger and bigger she was very persistent in taking care of the plant and she never stopped finally the plant blossomed and molly was so proud from then on molly introduced her plant to everyone she knew

once upon a time there was a little girl named lily she loved to play with her toys and go on adventures one day lily and her friends decided to go on a picnic in the park they packed their gear and set off on their journey as they were walking lily noticed that her friend jack was feeling very tired he yawned and said he wanted to go home and sleep lily felt bad for jack and wanted to help him feel better she thought of an idea and asked her friends to help her together they made a cozy bed for jack to sleep on they fluffed up the pillows and tucked him in with a warm blanket jack felt so happy and enthusiastic about his friends kindness he fell asleep feeling loved and cared for the moral of the story is that when we see someone who needs help we should always try to do something kind for them it can make a big difference in their day and make them feel happy and loved just like jack

sara and ben like to play in the sand near the sea they make castles and dig holes and look for shells one day they find a big shell that is shiny and pretty sara wants to keep it but ben wants it too give me the shell sara ben says it is mine no it is mine sara says i saw it first they pull and tug at the shell but it does not break they get angry and yell at each other they do not see the octopus that is hiding under the water the octopus is hungry and curious it sees the shiny shell and wants to touch it it reaches out with one of its arms and grabs the shell from sara and ben they are surprised and scared they let go of the shell and run away the octopus is happy it has a new toy to play with it opens the shell and finds a pearl inside the pearl is round and white and smooth the octopus thinks it is beautiful it puts the pearl in its mouth and feels how hard it is it bites the pearl and hears a crunch ow the octopus says this pearl is sharp it hurts my teeth the octopus spits out the pearl and the shell it does not want them anymore it swims away to look for something else to eat sara and ben come back to the sand they see the shell and the pearl on the ground they are happy and amazed they pick them up and look at them wow sara says this is a pearl it is so rich and rare wow ben says this is a sharp pearl it can cut things they decide to share the shell and the pearl they make a necklace with them and put it around saras neck they hug and say sorry to each other they are friends again they play in the sand and have fun they do not see the octopus that is watching them from the water the octopus is not hungry and curious anymore it is sad and lonely it wishes it had a friend to play with

once upon a time there was a silly monkey named max max loved to climb trees and play with his friends one day max climbed to the top of a tall tree and found a big juicy banana he was so excited to eat it but he didnt want to share with his friends as max was eating the banana he realized it was starting to spoil he didnt want to eat it anymore but he didnt want to waste it either so he decided to give it to his friends as a gift his friends were very happy and thanked max for the banana max felt proud that he could make his friends happy even if it meant giving away his spoiled banana from that day on max learned that sharing is better than being selfish

once upon a time there was a small fish called fin fin loved to swim around in the calm river one day fin noticed a gentle wave rise up in the distance and he swam towards it as he got closer he saw something strange a small wood boat was being carried by the wave with a smiling old man inside when fin was close enough the old man called out hello there fin you look so strong and brave could you help me get to the other side of the river fin was so excited he wanted to help the old man so he nodded his head then he swam alongside the boat pushing it with all the strength he had the old man thanked him patting fins head with a gentle hand then with fins help the boat rose up to the other side of the river the old man waved goodbye and fin waved back before swimming off to explore the other side of the river
